schConfigureFirst: Shyiramo URL ya portal muri settings
learnLibrarySubtitle: Yubatswe nububiko bwamasomo afite isoko yizewe kumashuri na kaminuza.
learnHomeschoolTitle: Kwiga Mu Rugo no mu Masomo
learnHomeschoolSubtitle: Senga imyitwarire yo kwiga mu rugo, hitamo icumbi cyiza, kandi ukurikire gahunda ya buri cyumweru.
learnEmpty: Ntahantu ho kwigira haboneka ubu buryo.
studyModeDescription: Hitamo niba imyigire yawe iteganijwe neza kwishuri cyangwa kaminuza.
learnBookmarkEmpty: Nta kimenyetso kiranga. Shyira ahagaragara ingingo kugirango ikomeze nyuma.
learnInAppSubtitle: Ibintu byose biri hepfo birashobora gukoreshwa muri porogaramu udafunguye amahuza yo hanze.
learnExplainSchool: bivuze kwiga igitekerezo kimwe icyarimwe, hanyuma ugakoresha ingero zoroshye kubitoza.
learnExplainUni: bisobanura gusobanukirwa igitekerezo nyamukuru, impamvu gifite akamaro, nigihe gikoreshwa mukwiga cyangwa mubikorwa.
learnStep2: Andika igitekerezo cyingenzi mumagambo yawe bwite.
learnStep3: Gukemura ikibazo kimwe gito hanyuma urebe amakosa.
learnHintSimple: Inama: Niba byunvikana, gabanya ingingo mubice bito hanyuma usubiremo nurugero rumwe buri.
learnExamBasicsHint: Uburyo bwibanze: gukomera shingiro ubanza, hanyuma imyitozo ntoya.
learnExamBalancedHint: Uburyo bwibanze: gusobanukirwa kuringaniza, kwitoza, no gusuzuma.
learnExamHardHint: Uburyo bwibanze: ibizamini-byuburyo bwimikorere hamwe nigitutu cyigihe hamwe nibitekerezo byihuse.
demoModeEnabled: Uburyo bwa Demo burashoboka. Kwemeza kurengana kugirango ugerageze.
learnSelectSubject: Hitamo ingingo iri hejuru kugirango utangire kwiga
dashNoHomeschool: Shiraho gahunda muri Wige kubona ubuyobozi hano.
emptyTasksDesc: Ongeraho imirimo yo gukurikirana inshingano zawe nigihe ntarengwa.
emptyFilesDesc: Kuramo ibikoresho byo kwiga, inyandiko, cyangwa ibikoresho.
emptyGradesDesc: Amanota yawe azagaragara hano umaze kongerwaho.
emptyCoursesDesc: Injira mumasomo ariho hamwe na code cyangwa ukore ibyawe.
emptyMessagesDesc: Tangira ikiganiro gishya kugirango uhuze nabandi.
joinCourseDesc: Injira inyuguti 6 yinyigisho uhereye mwarimu wawe cyangwa mwigana.
courseNoDesc: Nta bisobanuro bihari kuri aya masomo.
tasksAddHint: Ongeraho imirimo yo gukurikirana inshingano zawe nigihe ntarengwa.
settingsAppearanceSub: Insanganyamatsiko yijimye irakora kandi itezimbere kwibanda.
teacherToolsSubtitle: Gucunga ibyiciro, funga uburyo bwabanyeshuri no gukwirakwiza ibikubiye mu kwiga udahaye uburenganzira bwabarimu.
teacherClassControlDesc: Funga abanyeshuri guhinduranya hagati yishuri na kaminuza hanyuma ukomeze amasomo yibanze kuri gahunda zubu.
teacherShareMaterialDesc: Tangaza umukoro cyangwa inyandiko zisubiramo byihuse kumasomo yawe.
settingsCountrySub: Hindura umunzani amanota, ibyiciro byishuri, nimero yimibare kuri sisitemu yuburezi.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_desc: Algebra ikoresha inyuguti n'ibimenyetso byerekana imibare no gusobanura umubano. Ninkingi yimibare yose yateye imbere. Wiga gukemura ibingana, gukorana nibihinduka, ugasanga indangagaciro zitazwi ukoresheje intambwe yumvikana.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_task: Gukemura: 3x - 5 = 10. Andika buri ntambwe. Noneho reba igisubizo cyawe usimbuza x inyuma.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp0: Impinduka (nka x cyangwa y) igereranya numubare utazwi.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp1: Ikigereranyo cyerekana ko imvugo ebyiri zingana (urugero: 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp2: Kugira ngo ukemure ikigereranyo, kora ibikorwa bimwe kumpande zombi kugirango utandukanye impinduka.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp3: Imikorere ikarita buri cyinjijwe mubisohoka neza: f (x) = 2x bisobanura gukuba kabiri ibyinjijwe.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp4: Polinomial ni imvugo ifite amagambo menshi: 3x² + 2x - 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_desc: Geometrie yiga imiterere, inguni, nubusabane butandukanye. Irakwigisha gutekereza neza no kwerekana imvugo ukoresheje ibisobanuro na theorem. Geometrie igaragara mubwubatsi, ubuhanzi, ubwubatsi, nubuzima bwa buri munsi.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_task: Inyabutatu iburyo ifite amaguru ya cm 3 na cm 4. Kubara hypotenuse ukoresheje a² + b² = c².
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp0: Ingingo ntigira ubunini; umurongo urambuye bitagira ingano mubyerekezo byombi.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp1: Inguni zapimwe muri dogere: inguni iburyo = 90 °, inguni igororotse = 180 °.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp2: Igiteranyo cyimfuruka muri mpandeshatu iyo ari yo yose ni 180 °.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp3: Pythagorean theorem: muri mpandeshatu iburyo, a² + b² = c² (c ni hypotenuse).
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp4: Imiterere ihuriweho irasa mubunini no mumiterere; imiterere isa ifite inguni imwe ariko ingano zitandukanye.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_desc: Ibarurishamibare rigufasha gukusanya, gutunganya, no gusobanura amakuru kugirango ufate imyanzuro. Ibishoboka bipima uburyo ibyabaye bishoboka. Hamwe na hamwe ni ngombwa mubumenyi, ubukungu, no gufata ibyemezo bya buri munsi.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_task: Kuzuza urupfu: ni ubuhe buryo bwo kubona umubare uringaniye? Erekana kubara.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp0: Hagati = igiteranyo cyindangagaciro zose ÷ umubare wagaciro.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp1: Hagati = agaciro hagati mugihe amakuru yatondekanye.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp3: Histogramu yerekana inshuro zo gukwirakwiza amakuru.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp4: Isano ryerekana niba impinduka ebyiri zikunda kugenda hamwe - ariko ntabwo ari impamvu.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_desc: Trigonometry yiga umubano hagati yinguni nuburebure bwuruhande muri mpandeshatu. Ikoreshwa muri physics, injeniyeri, kugendagenda, na muzika. Imikorere itatu yingenzi - sine, cosine, na tangent - ihuza inguni nu mibare yimpande.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_task: Urwego rufite metero 5 z'uburebure rushingiye ku rukuta kuri 60 °. Igera he? Koresha icyaha (60 °) = √3 / 2.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp0: Muri mpandeshatu iburyo: icyaha (θ) = ikinyuranyo / hypotenuse, cos (θ) = yegeranye / hypotenuse, tan (θ) = ibinyuranye / byegeranye.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp1: Fata mu mutwe hamwe na SOH-CAH-TOA.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp2: Uruziga rw'ibice rugura trig ku mpande zose zirenga 90 °.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp3: Sine na cosine nibihe: basubiramo buri 360 ° (2π radians).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_desc: Imibare yimibare yiga ibiranga integer - cyane cyane imibare yibanze, kugabana, no gushyira mubikorwa. Nimwe mumashami ya kera yimibare kandi ashingiye kumashusho agezweho.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_task: Shakisha GCD (48, 18) ukoresheje algorithm ya Euclidean. Noneho shakisha LCM (48, 18).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp0: Umubare wambere ufite ibintu bibiri neza: 1 kandi ubwayo (urugero: 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp1: Buri integer> 1 irashobora kwandikwa nkigicuruzwa cyihariye cya primes (theorem yibanze ya arithmetic).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp2: Amategeko yo gutandukana: umubare ugabanywa na 3 niba igiteranyo cyimibare yacyo igabanijwe na 3.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp3: GCD (igabana rikomeye): umubare munini ugabanya byombi. Koresha algorithm ya Euclidean: GCD (a, b) = GCD (b, mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp4: LCM (byibuze isanzwe myinshi): LCM (a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD (a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f5_desc: Inzitizi ifite ubunini (ubunini) n'icyerekezo. Vector ni ngombwa muri fiziki (imbaraga, umuvuduko) n'imibare yo hejuru. Birashobora kongerwaho, gukuramo, no gupimwa, kandi mubisanzwe mubisanzwe kumwanya wa 3D.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_task: Uhaye u = (2, 3) na v = (4, -1), shakisha: (a) u + v, (b) | u |, (c) u · v. Ese u na v perpendicular?
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp0: Vctor yanditswe nkumwambi cyangwa nka coordinateur: v = (3, 4) bisobanura ibice 3 iburyo, ibice 4 hejuru.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp2: Vector yongeyeho: (a, b) + (c, d) = (a + c, b + d). Gukuramo ni kimwe no gukuramo.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp4: Igicuruzwa cyadomo: (a, b) · (c, d) = ac + bd. Niba akadomo k'ibicuruzwa = 0, ibice ni perpendicular.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_desc: Urukurikirane ni urutonde rwimibare ikurikira icyitegererezo. Urukurikirane ni igiteranyo cyamagambo akurikirana. Byombi bigaragara mu mibare no kwerekana imiterere-yisi (gukura, imari, fiziki).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_task: Urukurikirane rutangira 2, 6, 18, 54,… (a) Ari imibare cyangwa geometrike? (b) Shakisha manda ya 7. (c) Shakisha igiteranyo cyamagambo 5 yambere.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp0: Imibare ikurikirana: buri jambo ritandukana numubare uteganijwe d (itandukaniro rusange). aₙ = a₁ + (n - 1) d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp1: Igiteranyo cyimibare ikurikirana: Sₙ = n / 2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp2: Urutonde rwa geometrike: buri jambo ryikubye ku kigereranyo cyagenwe r. aₙ = a₁ · rⁿ⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp3: Igiteranyo cya geometrike ikurikiranye: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 - rⁿ) / (1 - r) kuri r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp4: Urukurikirane rwa geometrike rutagira ingano ruhinduka kuri S = a₁ / (1 - r) iyo | r | <1.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_desc: Itandukaniro ritandukanye ryiga igipimo cyimpinduka nubuso bwimirongo. Inkomoko irakubwira uburyo imikorere ihinduka vuba aho ariho hose. Nibyingenzi kuri physics, injeniyeri, ubukungu, na siyanse yuzuye.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_task: Shakisha inkomoko ya f (x) = 4x³ - 2x² + 5. Noneho shakisha aho umusozi uhwanye na zeru.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp0: Inkomoko f ′ (x) itanga umurongo wumurongo wa tangent kuri f (x) kuri x.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp1: Amategeko yimbaraga: niba f (x) = xⁿ, noneho f ′ (x) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Urugero: (x³) ′ = 3x².
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp2: Amategeko yose: (f + g) ′ = f ′ + g ′. Amategeko y'ibicuruzwa: (fg) ′ = f′g + fg ′.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp3: Amategeko y'urunigi: inkomoko ya f (g (x)) ni f ′ (g (x)) · g ′ (x).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp4: Igikorwa gifite aho ntarengwa cyangwa byibuze aho f ′ (x) = 0 (ingingo ikomeye).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_desc: Ibara ryuzuye rigereranya uturere munsi yumurongo hamwe ninshi. Nibikorwa bihindura byo gutandukana. Imikorere ikoreshwa muri fiziki (akazi, intera), imibare (bishoboka), hamwe nubuhanga.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_task: Suzuma ∫₀² (3x² + 2) dx. Erekana intambwe zose ukoresheje theorem yibanze ya calculus.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp0: Intangiriro idasobanutse ∫f (x) dx itanga umuryango wimirimo ikomokaho ni f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp1: Amategeko yimbaraga kubintu byose: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹ / (n + 1) + C (kuri n ≠ −1).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp2: Igice cyuzuye ∫ₐᵇ f (x) dx gitanga ubuso nyabwo hagati yumurongo na x-axis kuva a kugeza kuri b.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp3: Inyigisho yibanze ya calculus: ∫ₐᵇ f (x) dx = F (b) - F (a), aho F ′ = f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp4: Ubuso buri hagati y'imirongo ibiri: ∫ₐᵇ [f (x) - g (x)] dx, aho f (x) ≥ g (x).
learnSch_physics_f0_desc: Ubukanishi nubushakashatsi bwimikorere nimbaraga zibitera. Amategeko atatu ya Newton yimikorere niyo shingiro. Gusobanukirwa ubukanishi bifasha gusobanura ibintu byose kuva kugwa kugeza kurasa roketi.
learnSch_physics_f0_task: Umupira wa kg 2 wihuta kuri 3 m / s². Ni izihe mbaraga zibikoraho? Koresha F = ma.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp0: Itegeko rya 1 rya Newton: ikintu kuruhuka kiguma kuruhuka keretse gikorewe imbaraga.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp1: Itegeko rya 2 rya Newton: Imbaraga = misa × kwihuta (F = ma).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp2: Itegeko rya 3 rya Newton: ibikorwa byose bifite reaction zingana kandi zinyuranye.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp3: Ingufu za Kinetic = ½ × mass × umuvuduko² (KE = ½mv²).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp4: Akazi = Imbaraga × intera mu cyerekezo cyimbaraga (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f1_desc: Amashanyarazi nigitemba cyamashanyarazi binyuze mumashanyarazi. Magnetism ituruka kumyuka yimuka nibikoresho bya magneti. Byombi byahujwe na electromagnetism, itanga ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.
learnSch_physics_f1_task: Umuzunguruko ufite bateri 12 V hamwe na 4 Ω résistor. Ubu ni ubuhe? Koresha V = IR.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp0: Amategeko ya Ohm: Umuvuduko = Ibiriho × Kurwanya (V = IR).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp1: Uruhererekane rw'uruhererekane: icyerekezo kimwe binyuze mubice byose; voltage yongeyeho.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp2: Inzira ibangikanye: voltage imwe mubice byose; imigezi yongeyeho.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp4: Imashini ya rukuruzi ikoresha imbaraga zamafaranga yimuka: F = qvB.
learnSch_physics_f2_desc: Imiraba ihererekanya ingufu itimuye ibintu. Ijwi n'umucyo byombi ni imiraba. Optics yiga uburyo urumuri rwitwara - rugaragaza indorerwamo, kugoreka ukoresheje lens, no gukora amashusho.
learnSch_physics_f2_task: Ijwi ryijwi rifite inshuro 440 Hz n'umuvuduko 340 m / s. Uburebure bwacyo ni ubuhe? Koresha v = fλ.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp0: Umuvuduko wumuvuduko = inshuro × uburebure bwumurongo (v = fλ).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp1: Ijwi rigenda mubintu; ntishobora kunyura mu cyuho.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp2: Umucyo ugenda kuri 300.000 km / s mu cyuho (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp3: Ibitekerezo: inguni yibibaho = inguni yo gutekereza.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp4: Gucika intege: urumuri rugoramye iyo runyuze hagati yububiko butandukanye (amategeko ya Snell).
learnSch_chemistry_f0_desc: Ibintu byose bikozwe muri atome. Buri atom ifite nucleus (protons + neutron) ikikijwe na electron. Imbonerahamwe yigihe itegura ibintu ukurikije umubare wa atome hamwe nimiterere yimiti.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_task: Carbone ifite numero 6. Aton ifite proton, electron, na neutron zingahe?
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp0: Umubare wa Atome = umubare wa proton; Kugena Ikintu.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp2: Electron ifata urwego rwingufu (shells); electroni zo hanze zerekana reaction.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp3: Isotopes ni atome yibintu bimwe hamwe numubare utandukanye wa neutron.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp4: Inkunga ya Ionic: ihererekanyabubasha rya electron. Covalent bonds: electron zirasangiwe.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_desc: Imiti yimiti itunganya atome kugirango ibe ibintu bishya. Ibicuruzwa bihindurwa mubicuruzwa. Gusobanukirwa reaction bifasha mubuvuzi, ibikoresho siyanse, guteka, ninganda.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_task: Kuringaniza iri gereranya: H₂ + O₂ → H₂O. Ukeneye molekile zingahe H₂ na O₂?
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp0: Amategeko yo kubungabunga misa: atome ntabwo yaremewe cyangwa ngo isenywe mubitekerezo.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp1: Kuringaniza ibingana: umubare wa buri atom ugomba kuba ingana kumpande zombi.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp2: Igipimo cyibisubizo cyiyongera hamwe nubushyuhe bwo hejuru, kwibanda, cyangwa ubuso.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp4: Stoichiometry ikoresha ibipimo bya mole kugirango ibare ingano mubitekerezo.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_desc: Acide itanga hydrogene ion (H⁺); shingiro ubyemere. Igipimo cya pH gipima acide kuva kuri 0 (acide cyane) kugeza kuri 14 (shingiro cyane), hamwe 7 itabogamye. Ukutabogama guhuza aside hamwe nishingiro kugirango bibe amazi numunyu.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_task: Niba uvanze aside hydrochloric (HCl) na sodium hydroxide (NaOH), ni ibihe bicuruzwa? Andika ikigereranyo.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp0: pH <7 = acide (urugero vinegere pH ≈ 3). pH> 7 = shingiro (urugero: soda yo guteka pH ≈ 9).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp2: Ibipimo (nka litmus) bihindura ibara muri acide na base.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp3: Acide ikomeye itandukana rwose (HCl); acide nkeya itandukana igice (CH₃COOH).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp4: Titration igena kwibanda kutazwi mugukemura igisubizo kizwi.
learnSch_biology_f0_desc: Akagari nigice cyibanze cyibinyabuzima byose. Ingirabuzimafatizo zikora imirimo yose yubuzima: kubona ingufu, gusubiza ibidukikije, gukura, no kubyara. Gusobanukirwa selile ni ishingiro ryibinyabuzima byose.
learnSch_biology_f0_task: Vuga itandukaniro ritatu hagati yikimera nigitereko cyinyamanswa gifite imikorere imwe kuri buri tandukaniro.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp0: Prokaryote (bacteria) nta nucleus ifite; eukaryote (inyamaswa, ibimera, ibihumyo) bifite nucleus.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp1: Nucleus irimo ADN, igishushanyo mbonera cya selile.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp2: Mitochondria itanga ingufu binyuze mu guhumeka neza (ATP).
learnSch_biology_f0_kp3: Mitose itanga selile ebyiri zumukobwa kugirango zikure kandi zisanwe.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp4: Meiose itanga ingirabuzimafatizo enye (gametes) hamwe na kimwe cya kabiri cya chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f1_desc: Umubiri wumuntu nuburyo bukomeye bwimikorere yingingo zikorana kugirango zibungabunge ubuzima. Kumva uburyo sisitemu ikora ifasha mubuzima, ubuvuzi, no kumererwa neza kwawe.
learnSch_biology_f1_task: Kurikirana inzira yo guhumeka umwuka wa ogisijeni kuva mu zuru kugera mu ngirangingo. Vuga buri sisitemu igizwe.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp0: Sisitemu yo gutembera isohora amaraso mumubiri, igatanga ogisijeni nintungamubiri.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp1: Sisitemu y'ibiryo igabanya ibiryo intungamubiri umubiri ushobora gukuramo.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp2: Sisitemu ya nervous itunganya amakuru kandi igahuza ibisubizo.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp3: Homeostasis ituma imiterere yimbere ihagaze neza (urugero ubushyuhe bwumubiri kuri 37 ° C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp4: Imirire: karubone itanga imbaraga; poroteyine zubaka; ibinure bibika ingufu kandi bikarinda ingingo.
learnSch_biology_f2_desc: Ibidukikije byiga uburyo ibinyabuzima bikorana n’ibidukikije. Gusobanukirwa urusobe rw'ibinyabuzima bidufasha kurinda urusobe rw'ibinyabuzima, gucunga umutungo, no guhangana n’imihindagurikire y’ikirere.
learnSch_biology_f2_task: Shushanya urubuga rwibiryo rworoshye hamwe nibinyabuzima 5. Abakora ibirango, abaguzi bambere, nabaguzi ba kabiri.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp0: Abaproducer (ibimera) bakora ibiryo bakoresheje fotosintezeza; abaguzi bararya.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp1: Urunigi rwibiryo rwerekana ingufu: Izuba → igihingwa → ibyatsi → inyamanswa.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp2: Gusa hafi 10% yingufu zoherezwa kurwego rukurikira tropique.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp3: Ibinyabuzima bitandukanye bituma urusobe rwibinyabuzima rwihanganira guhinduka.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp4: Imihindagurikire y’ibihe ihindura aho ituye, ihindura amoko atandukanye, kandi ihagarika urubuga rw’ibiribwa.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_desc: Gutekereza kubara ni uburyo bwo gukemura ibibazo bukoreshwa muri gahunda na nyuma yaho. Igabanya ibibazo bigoye mubice byacungwa kandi igashakisha intambwe ku yindi mudasobwa (cyangwa umuntu) ishobora gukurikiza.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_task: Andika intambwe-ku-ntambwe algorithm (mu rurimi rworoshye) kugirango utondekanye igorofa ihindagurika yamakarita 5 ukurikije umubare.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp0: Kwangirika: kumena ikibazo kinini mubibazo bito, bikemurwa.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp1: Kumenyekanisha icyitegererezo: menya ibisa nibisanzwe mubibazo.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp2: Gukuramo: kwibanda kubice byingenzi kandi wirengagize amakuru adafite akamaro.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp3: Algorithm: urutonde rwukuri rwintambwe zo gukemura ikibazo.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp4: Pseudocode ifasha gutegura algorithm mururimi rworoshye mbere yo kwandika.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_desc: Porogaramu isobanura ibitekerezo byumvikana mumabwiriza mudasobwa ishobora gukora. Porogaramu yose ikoresha impinduka, imiterere, izunguruka, nibikorwa. Gukemura - gushakisha no gukosora amakosa - nubuhanga bwingenzi.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_task: Andika pseudocode cyangwa code nyayo isaba uyikoresha numero hanyuma wandike niba bidasanzwe cyangwa niyo.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp0: Impinduka ibika agaciro gashobora guhinduka: x = 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp1: Umuzingo usubiramo kode: kuri i murwego (5) ikoresha umubiri inshuro 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp2: If-imvugo ifata icyemezo: niba x> 0: icapa ("positif").
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp3: Amatsinda yimikorere yongeye gukoreshwa kode: def kuramutsa (izina): garuka "Mwaramutse" + izina.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp4: Ubwoko bw'amakosa asanzwe: amakosa ya syntax (imyandikire itari yo), amakosa yo gukora (guhanuka), amakosa ya logique (ibisubizo bitari byo).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_desc: Sisitemu ya sisitemu igizwe nibikorwa remezo bya interineti na mudasobwa igezweho. Gusobanukirwa imiyoboro, kwerekana amakuru, hamwe numutekano wa cyber nibyingenzi kubantu bose bakoresha cyangwa kubaka ikoranabuhanga.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_task: Hindura umubare wimibare 13 kuri binary. Erekana akazi kawe (gabana na 2 inshuro nyinshi).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp0: Amakuru abitswe muri binary (0s na 1s): 8 bits = 1 byte.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp1: Ikarita ya ASCII na Unicode nimero yinyuguti (urugero: A = 65 muri ASCII).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp2: Interineti numuyoboro wisi yose ukoresha protocole ya TCP / IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp3: HTTP ikoreshwa kurupapuro rwurubuga; HTTPS yongeyeho ibanga ry'umutekano.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp4: Encryption ishakisha amakuru kugirango gusa uwagenewe ashobora kuyisoma.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_desc: Gusoma no gusesengura bikwigisha gusobanukirwa no gusuzuma inyandiko neza. Wiga kumenya intego yumwanditsi, imiterere yimiterere, no gusuzuma ubwiza bwibimenyetso byakoreshejwe.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_task: Soma igika kimwe mu ngingo iyo ari yo yose. Menya: (1) ikirego nyamukuru, (2) ikimenyetso kimwe, (3) kubogama.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp0: Ubwoko bwimiterere yinyandiko: ibihe byakurikiranye, ikibazo-igisubizo, impamvu-ngaruka, kugereranya-itandukaniro.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp1: Impamvu nyamukuru nigitekerezo nyamukuru umwanditsi ashaka ko wemera.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp2: Ibimenyetso bishyigikira ibirego: reba amakuru, imibare, amagambo y'impuguke, n'ingero.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp3: Suzuma inkomoko: umwanditsi yizewe? Ibimenyetso biraherutse kandi bifite akamaro?
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp4: Kubogama bibaho mugihe inyandiko yerekana uruhande rumwe rwimpaka.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_desc: Kwandika neza bitanga ibitekerezo neza kandi byemeza. Inzira ikubiyemo gutegura, gutegura, gusubiramo, no guhindura. Imiterere nibimenyetso nibyingenzi nkamagambo.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_task: Andika igika kimwe cya PEEL (interuro 5-7) uvuga ko umukoro ari ingirakamaro cyangwa wangiza. Koresha ibimenyetso bimwe.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp0: PEEL igika: Ingingo → Ibimenyetso → Sobanura → Ihuza inyuma.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp1: Intangiriro yerekana inyandiko ivuga; umwanzuro ubisubiramo ubushishozi.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp2: Kwandika byemewe birinda kwikuramo, gusebanya, numuntu-wambere keretse bisobanuwe.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp3: Ijwi rikora rirasobanutse neza: "Umunyeshuri yakemuye ikibazo" (ntabwo "yakemuwe na").
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp4: Buri gihe usubiremo: reba logique, ibimenyetso, ikibonezamvugo, ninteruro zitandukanye.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_desc: Amategeko yikibonezamvugo agenga uburyo amagambo ahuza interuro iboneye. Amagambo akomeye atuma kwandika neza kandi byemeza. Byombi bisaba imyitozo ikora - ntabwo ari ugusoma gusa.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_task: Andika iyi nteruro mu bihe bitatu bitandukanye: "Ikipe yatsinze umukino." (ibyahise, ejo hazaza, ubungubu biratunganye)
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp1: Ibihe byerekana igihe: byoroheje (kwiruka), ibyahise (biruka), ejo hazaza (biziruka), byerekana neza (byirutse).
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp2: Ingingo: ingingo nyamukuru ihagaze yonyine; ingingo iyobowe ikeneye ingingo nkuru.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp3: Utumenyetso two kuruhuka tuyobora umusomyi: koma = guhagarara gato, semicolon = guhuza ibitekerezo bijyanye.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp4: Ibimenyetso bifatika bifasha gutandukanya amagambo utamenyereye: reba amagambo akikije.
learnSch_history_f0_desc: Amateka yisi akurikirana uburyo societe yabantu yateye imbere mumyaka ibihumbi, kuva mumico ya kera binyuze mubwami, impinduramatwara, nintambara yisi kugeza gahunda yisi igezweho. Amateka adufasha kumva impamvu isi imeze.
learnSch_history_f0_task: Hitamo ikintu kimwe cyingenzi cyamateka hanyuma usobanure: (1) icyabiteye, (2) ibyabaye, (3) ingaruka zigihe kirekire.
learnSch_history_f0_kp0: Mezopotamiya (Iraki) na Egiputa biri mu mico ya kera izwi.
learnSch_history_f0_kp1: Impinduramatwara mu nganda (18 - 19 c.) Yahinduye ubukungu buva mu buhinzi bugera ku nganda.
learnSch_history_f0_kp2: Intambara ya Mbere y'Isi Yose (1914–1918) n'Intambara ya Kabiri y'Isi Yose (1939–1945) byahinduye gahunda y'isi.
learnSch_history_f0_kp3: Intambara y'ubutita (1947–1991) yagabanyije isi hagati ya Amerika n'Ubumwe bw'Abasoviyeti.
learnSch_history_f0_kp4: Kuba isi ihinduka kuva mu myaka ya za 90 byateje imbere ubukungu n’umuco.
learnSch_history_f1_desc: Inkomoko yibanze ninyandiko zumwimerere cyangwa ibihangano kuva mugihe cyigwa - amabaruwa, disikuru, amafoto, amategeko, iminsi. Abahanga mu by'amateka barabakoresha mu kubaka ibyahise uko bishoboka kose.
learnSch_history_f1_task: Shakisha amagambo magufi (uhereye kumvugo cyangwa ibaruwa). Menya umwanditsi, itariki, hamwe nibishobora kubogama.
learnSch_history_f1_kp0: Inkomoko y'ibanze ikubiyemo iminsi, amategeko, amafoto, disikuru, n'amasezerano.
learnSch_history_f1_kp1: Amasoko yisumbuye asobanura inkomoko yibanze: ibitabo, biografiya, documentaire.
learnSch_history_f1_kp2: Baza: Ninde wanditse ibi? Ryari? Ni abahe bakwumva? Babona iki?
learnSch_history_f1_kp3: Kubogama ntibitera isoko ubusa - byerekana uko umwanditsi abona isi.
learnSch_history_f1_kp4: Gushimangira: reba inkomoko kubindi bimenyetso kugirango umenye kwizerwa.
learnSch_geography_f0_desc: Imiterere ya geografiya yiga imiterere karemano yisi - imiterere yubutaka, inzuzi, ikirere, nibidukikije. Gusobanukirwa imiterere yimiterere isobanura impamvu imijyi, inzira zubucuruzi, numuco byateye imbere aho bigeze.
learnSch_geography_f0_task: Sobanura impamvu umutingito ubaho kuri "Impeta yumuriro" ukoresheje tectoniki ya plaque.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp0: Tectonics ya plaque: Ubutaka bwisi bugabanijwemo amasahani agenda, atera umutingito nibirunga.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp1: Inzira y'amazi: guhumeka → kondegene → imvura → gutemba → gusubiramo.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp2: Ibihe by'ikirere: tropique, arid, ubushyuhe, umugabane, polar.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp3: Sisitemu yinzuzi ifite isoko (ubutaka burebure), imigezi, numunwa (aho ihurira ninyanja).
learnSch_geography_f0_kp4: Ibyago bisanzwe (nyamugigima, imyuzure, inkubi y'umuyaga) byakozwe na geografiya.
learnSch_geography_f1_desc: Imiterere yumuntu yiga uburyo abantu bakorana nibidukikije ndetse nuburyo bategura umwanya. Ingingo zirimo aho abantu baba, impamvu imijyi ikura, nuburyo ubukungu butandukanye kwisi.
learnSch_geography_f1_task: Gereranya ibihugu bibiri na HDI yabo. Menya impamvu ebyiri imwe ishobora gushyira hejuru kurenza iyindi.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp0: Ubucucike bwabaturage = abantu ÷ agace. Ubucucike mu turere two ku nkombe n'uburumbuke; gake mu butayu no mu misozi.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp1: Ibisagara: abantu bimuka bava mucyaro bajya mumijyi kubikorwa na serivisi.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp2: Gusunika ibintu birukana abantu (urugero ubukene, amakimbirane); gukurura ibintu bikurura (urugero akazi, umutekano).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp3: Kuba isi ihinduka: ibicuruzwa, imari shingiro, abantu, nibitekerezo byambukiranya imipaka mubwisanzure.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp4: Iterambere rishobora gupimwa na GDP kuri buri muntu, icyizere cyo kubaho, nuburezi (HDI).
learnSch_economics_f0_desc: Microeconomics yiga uburyo abantu nibigo bafata ibyemezo kubutunzi. Irasobanura uburyo ibiciro byashyizweho, impamvu amasoko rimwe na rimwe ananirwa, nuburyo gushimangira bigira imyitwarire.
learnSch_economics_f0_task: Niba igiciro cya kawa kizamutse, bigenda bite kugirango usabe icyayi? Sobanura ukoresheje ibicuruzwa bisimburwa.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp0: Icyifuzo: uko igiciro kigabanuka, ubwinshi busabwa burazamuka (umubano mubi).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp1: Isoko: uko ibiciro bizamuka, ingano yatanzwe irazamuka (umubano utaziguye).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp2: Kuringaniza: aho itangwa ryujuje ibisabwa - igiciro cyo gukuraho isoko.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp3: Elastique ipima uburyo ibyifuzo bikenewe cyangwa itangwa ari ihinduka ryibiciro.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp4: Kunanirwa kw'isoko: iyo amasoko atanga umusaruro mwinshi (ibintu bitagaragara) cyangwa bike cyane (ibicuruzwa rusange).
learnSch_economics_f1_desc: Amafaranga yumuntu kugufasha gucunga neza amafaranga yawe. Gusobanukirwa bije, kuzigama, hamwe ninguzanyo bivuze ko ushobora gufata ibyemezo byuzuye mubuzima bwawe.
learnSch_economics_f1_task: Winjiza € 800 / ukwezi. Andika ibyiciro 5 byamafaranga hanyuma ugabanye bije kuri buri wongeyeho € 800.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp0: Bije ikurikirana amafaranga yinjira n’ibisohoka. Koresha amafaranga make kurenza ayo winjiza.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp1: Inyungu yoroshye: I = P × r × t (Umuyobozi × igipimo × igihe).
learnSch_economics_f1_kp2: Inyungu zingana zongera kuzigama kuburyo bugaragara - tangira kare.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp3: Inguzanyo: kuguza nonaha no kwishyura nyuma hamwe ninyungu; koresha witonze.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp4: Ikigega cyihutirwa kigomba kwishyura amezi 3-6 yakoreshejwe.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_desc: Geologiya yiga imiterere yisi, urutare ikozwemo, nuburyo ihinduka mugihe. Isi imaze imyaka igera kuri miliyari 4.5. Ibice byayo - igikonjo, imyenda, intangiriro yinyuma, intangiriro yimbere - bifite imiterere itandukanye.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_task: Imigezi ya lava irakonja kandi igakomera. Ni ubuhe bwoko bw'urutare? Niki gishobora kuyihindura urutare metamorphic mugihe runaka?
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp0: Inzinguzingo y'urutare: igneous → sedimentary → metamorphic → gusubira muri magma.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp1: Ibitare bidafite ishingiro biva muri magma ikonje cyangwa lava (urugero: granite, basalt).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp2: Ibitare byo mu butayu biva mu bice byegeranye byimyanda (urugero: ibuye ryumucanga, hekeste).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp3: Metamorphic urutare ruhindurwa nubushyuhe nigitutu (urugero: marble, plate).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp4: Isahani ya tectonike isobanura umutingito, ibirunga, no kubaka imisozi.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_desc: Astronomie yiga ibintu byose birenze Isi - imibumbe, inyenyeri, injeje, n'isi ubwayo. Imirasire y'izuba yashizweho hashize hafi miliyari 4,6. Isanzure rimaze imyaka miriyari 13.8.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_task: Kubara: urumuri rugenda kuri 300.000 km / s. Umucyo ukora urugendo rungana iki muminota 1? Mu isaha 1?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp0: Imirasire y'izuba: imibumbe 8 izenguruka izuba. Tegeka: Merkuri, Venusi, Isi, Mars, Jupiter, Saturne, Uranus, Neptune.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp1: Inyenyeri zitanga ingufu binyuze mu guhuza ingufu za kirimbuzi: hydrogène atom fuse ikora helium.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp2: Umwaka-mucyo ni intera urumuri rugenda mumwaka umwe (km 9.46 km).
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp3: Inzira y'Amata niyo galaxy yacu; irimo inyenyeri zirenga miliyari 200.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp4: Igitekerezo cya Big Bang: isanzure ryatangiye ari ahantu hashyushye cyane, huzuye miliyari 13.8 ishize.
learnSch_health_f0_desc: Ubuzima bwawe bwite bukubiyemo ingeso no guhitamo bigira ingaruka kumibereho yawe yumubiri no mumutwe. Ibikorwa bito bya buri munsi - gusinzira, imirire, imyitozo - bigira ingaruka ndende kubuzima.
learnSch_health_f0_task: Tegura ifunguro ryuzuye byibuze amatsinda 4 y'ibiryo. Menya intungamubiri imwe n'imikorere yayo kuri buri biryo.
learnSch_health_f0_kp0: Abakuze bakeneye gusinzira amasaha 7-9 buri joro; ingimbi zikeneye amasaha 8-10.
learnSch_health_f0_kp1: Indyo yuzuye irimo karubone, proteyine, amavuta meza, vitamine, hamwe n imyunyu ngugu.
learnSch_health_f0_kp2: Imyitozo ngororangingo isanzwe (150 min / icyumweru ubukana buringaniye) igabanya ibyago byindwara.
learnSch_health_f0_kp3: Hydrated: igamije litiro 2 z'amazi kumunsi bitewe nibikorwa nikirere.
learnSch_health_f0_kp4: Ubuvuzi bwo kwirinda: kwisuzumisha buri gihe, gukingirwa, no gusura amenyo.
learnSch_health_f1_desc: Ubuzima bwo mu mutwe ni ngombwa nkubuzima bwumubiri. Ihindura uko dutekereza, ibyiyumvo, ndetse nigikorwa. Gusobanukirwa guhangayika n'amarangamutima - n'aho ushobora kubona ubufasha - ni ubuhanga bwubuzima.
learnSch_health_f1_task: Andika inzira 3 nzima ukemura ibibazo. Sobanura impamvu buri ngamba zikora physiologique cyangwa psychologique.
learnSch_health_f1_kp0: Guhangayikishwa ni igisubizo gisanzwe kubibazo; guhangayika bidakira byangiza ubuzima.
learnSch_health_f1_kp1: Ubuhanga: guhumeka cyane, imyitozo ngororamubiri, kuvugana numuntu, gucunga igihe.
learnSch_health_f1_kp2: Guhangayika no kwiheba birasanzwe - ni ubuvuzi, ntabwo ari intege nke.
learnSch_health_f1_kp3: Gufasha inshuti: umva nta guca urubanza, ushishikarize inkunga yumwuga.
learnSch_health_f1_kp4: Gusinzira, gukora siporo, no guhuza imibereho biteza imbere ubuzima bwo mumutwe.
learnSch_arts_f0_desc: Ubuhanzi bugaragara bugaragaza ibitekerezo, amarangamutima, ninkuru ukoresheje amashusho nibintu. Gushushanya, gushushanya, gushushanya, no gushushanya byose bikoresha ibintu bimwe shingiro: umurongo, imiterere, ibara, imiterere, umwanya, nuburyo.
learnSch_arts_f0_task: Shushanya ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose ukoresheje imirongo ya kontour gusa (urucacagu gusa). Noneho igicucu ahantu hamwe kugirango werekane ubujyakuzimu.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp0: Uruziga rw'ibara: ibanze (umutuku, umuhondo, ubururu) → icya kabiri (orange, icyatsi, violet).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp1: Amabara yuzuye yicara ahateganye kuruziga (umutuku - icyatsi, ubururu - orange).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp2: Ibigize: uko ibintu bitunganijwe. Amategeko ya gatatu agabanya ikadiri mubice 9 bingana.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp3: Umurongo: urashobora kwerekana kugenda, amarangamutima, icyerekezo.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp4: Umwanya mubi: inyuma yibintu - nkibyingenzi ubwabyo.
learnSch_music_f0_desc: Igitekerezo cyumuziki ni ururimi rwumuziki. Irasobanura uburyo amajwi atunganijwe mumiririmbire, inanga, ninjyana. Gusoma imiziki inyandiko ni nko gusoma ikarita yijwi.
learnSch_music_f0_task: Koma injyana y'indirimbo uzi. Andika ukoresheje ibimenyetso birebire (-) n'ibimenyetso bigufi (·). Ni bangahe bakubita kuri buri kabari?
learnSch_music_f0_kp0: Ikibanza: uburebure cyangwa ubunebwe bwijwi. Bipimye muri Hz.
learnSch_music_f0_kp1: Inyandiko ku bakozi: Treble clef imirongo (EGBDF), umwanya (FACE).
learnSch_music_f0_kp2: Gukubita = impanuka ihamye. Umuvuduko = umuvuduko (BPM). Injyana = ishusho yijwi rirerire kandi rigufi.
learnSch_music_f0_kp3: Igipimo ni urukurikirane rw'inyandiko muburyo bwihariye (urugero: igipimo kinini: byose-igice-igice-cyose-cyuzuye-igice).
learnSch_music_f0_kp4: Inyuguti ni inoti 3+ zacuranzwe hamwe; inanga nini yumvikana neza, inyuguti nto zumvikana umwijima.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_desc: Imyitozo ngororangingo ifite ibice bine by'ingenzi: kwihanganira umutima n'umutima, imbaraga z'imitsi, guhinduka, hamwe n'ibigize umubiri. Guhugura buri gace buri gihe bitezimbere ubuzima nibikorwa.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_task: Tegura iminota 30 yo gukora imyitozo buri cyumweru ukoresheje ihame rya FITT. Shyiramo byibura ubwoko 2 bwimyitozo.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp0: Imyitozo yo mu kirere (kwiruka, koga) ikomeza umutima n'ibihaha.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp1: Imyitozo ya Anaerobic (guterura ibiremereye, gusiganwa) byubaka imbaraga z'imitsi.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp2: Kurenza urugero kurenza urugero: kongera buhoro buhoro imbaraga kugirango ukomeze gutera imbere.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp3: Kuruhuka no gukira ni mugihe imitsi ikura.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp4: Ihame RIKURIKIRA: Inshuro, Ubukomezi, Igihe, Ubwoko - inkingi za gahunda y'amahugurwa.
learnSch_german_language_f0_desc: Ikibonezamvugo cy'Ubudage cyubatswe ku manza enye (Nominativ, Akkusativ, Dativ, Genitiv) zigena imiterere n'imiterere. Gusobanukirwa imanza nurufunguzo rwo gukora interuro zukuri zidage.
learnSch_german_language_f0_task: Ongera wandike muburyo bukwiye: 'Der Hund (beißen) ___ Mann.' Shyiramo ingingo nziza ya Akkusativ ya 'Mann'.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp0: Nominativ = ingingo (Igikorwa ninde?). Akkusativ = ikintu kiziguye (Niki?). Dativ = ikintu kitaziguye (Kuri / kuri nde?). Genitiv = gutunga.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp1: Ingingo zisobanutse zihinduka kubibazo: der / gupfa / das (Nom.) → den / gupfa / das (Akk.) → dem / der / dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp2: Umwanya winshinga: mu ngingo nkuru, inshinga ihora ari iya kabiri. Mu ngingo ziyobowe, inshinga ijya ku ndunduro.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp3: Iherezo ryinyito rihinduka bitewe ningingo nurubanza (bikomeye, intege nke, kuvangavanga).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp4: Inshinga zisanzwe (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, mögen) burigihe ihuza na infinitive kumpera.
learnSch_german_language_f1_desc: Isesengura ry'inyandiko y'Ubudage rikwigisha kumenya ibikoresho byubuvanganzo, gusobanura ibisobanuro, no kwandika ingingo zubatswe. Ubu buhanga bukoreshwa mubisigo, inkuru ngufi, na prose ndende.
learnSch_german_language_f1_task: Shakisha imvugo ngereranyo imwe nimwe mu gisigo kigufi cy'Ubudage. Andika interuro imwe isobanura icyo buri wese asobanura.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp0: Gisesengura imiterere: intangiriro, umubiri nyamukuru, umwanzuro (Einleitung, Hauptteil, Schluss).
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp1: Ibikoresho byubuvanganzo: Metapher (metaphor), Vergleich (simile), Alliteration, Personifikation.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp2: Textsorte ifite akamaro: igisigo cyasesenguwe bitandukanye na raporo yamakuru.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp3: Inyandiko (Ibi) + ibimenyetso (Beleg) + ibisobanuro (Deutung) = imiterere yisesengura risanzwe.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp4: Imvugo itaziguye ikoresha Konjunktiv I: Er sagt, er könne helfen.
learnSch_german_language_f2_desc: Ikidage cyiza cyanditse kirasobanutse neza, cyubatswe neza, kandi gikoresha amagambo atandukanye hamwe nuburebure bwinteruro. Kwimenyereza ubwoko butandukanye bwinyandiko byubaka ikizere kubizamini no gutumanaho mubuzima.
learnSch_german_language_f2_task: Andika interuro 5 Erörterung kuri: 'Smartlphones ya Sollten muri der Schule verboten werden?' Koresha 'einerseits… andererseits'.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp0: Erörterung (inyandiko idahwitse) yerekana ibitekerezo bivuguruzanya hamwe numwanzuro bwite.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp1: Kommentar (ibisobanuro) impaka kumwanya umwe hamwe nibimenyetso nibibazo byamagambo.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp2: Zusammenfassung (incamake): mu magambo ahinnye, umuntu wa gatatu, ibihe byubu, nta bitekerezo.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp3: Intangiriro zinyuranye zitangira: koresha guhuza (weil, obwohl, damit, wenn) kubintu bigoye.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp4: Utumenyetso: utumenyetso mbere yingingo zose ziyobowe (Nebensätze).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_desc: Gusobanukirwa amadini akomeye ku isi bifasha guteza imbere kubahana, kubabarana, no gusoma no kwandika. Buri muco utanga ibisubizo byihariye kubibazo byubuzima, urupfu, ubutabera, nubusobanuro.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_task: Gereranya uburyo amadini abiri wize asubiza ikibazo: 'Bigenda bite nyuma y'urupfu?' Andika interuro 3 kuri buri.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp0: Ubukristo: kwizera Imana imwe, Yesu nk'umukiza; inyandiko yera = Bibiliya; ~ Abayoboke miliyari 2.4.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp1: Islamu: kwizera Allah, Muhamadi nk'umuhanuzi; inyandiko yera = Korowani; inkingi eshanu ziyobora ubuzima bwa buri munsi.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp2: Idini rya Kiyahudi: imana imwe; Torah (Bibiliya y'Igiheburayo); 613 amategeko (mitzvot); ~ Abakurikira miliyoni 15.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp3: Idini ry'Abahindu: imana nyinshi, ukuri kumwe (Brahman); imyumvire ya karma, dharma, kuvuka ubwa kabiri.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp4: Budisime: inyigisho za Buda; Ukuri Kane Cyiza, Inzira umunani; intego = Nirvana (kwibohora imibabaro).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_desc: Imyitwarire irabaza: icyiza n'ikibi, kandi kuki? Ibyingenzi byingenzi bitanga imyitwarire itanga uburyo butandukanye bwo gufata ibyemezo. Kubisobanukirwa bigufasha gutekereza kubijyanye nukuri kwisi.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_task: Imodoka yikorera wenyine igomba guhitamo: gukubita umuntu 1 cyangwa kunyeganyega no gukubita 5. Gusesengura iki kibazo uhereye kuri utilitarian NA deontologiya.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp0: Ingaruka (urugero: Utilitarianism): gucira urubanza ibikorwa byabo. Ibyiza cyane kumubare munini (Bentham, Urusyo).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp1: Deontologiya (Kant): ibikorwa bimwe nibyiza cyangwa bibi muri bo, tutitaye ku ngaruka. Icyiciro cya Imperator: kora gusa nkuko ubishoboye abantu bose bakora.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp2: Imyitwarire myiza (Aristote): kwibanda kumiterere, ntabwo amategeko. Umuntu wubupfura ahitamo ibisobanuro bya zahabu hagati yintagondwa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp3: Contractarianism (Rawls): ubutabera nicyo abantu bashyira mu gaciro bemeranya inyuma y 'umwenda wubujiji (kutamenya umwanya wabo muri societe).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp4: Imyitwarire ikoreshwa: uburyo izi nyigisho zitanga impaka nyazo - euthanasiya, uburenganzira bwinyamaswa, AI, ubutabera bwikirere.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_desc: Gusobanukirwa uburyo leta ikora ningirakamaro kubwenegihugu bukora. Sisitemu ya demokarasi irengera uburenganzira, ububasha butandukanye, kandi igaha abaturage ijambo binyuze mu matora.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_task: Sobanura amashami atatu yubutegetsi mugihugu cyawe. Tanga urugero rumwe rwimbaraga za buri shami.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp0: Demokarasi: ubutegetsi bushingiye ku baturage, bugaragazwa binyuze mu matora y’ubuntu n’uburenganzira burengera.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp1: Gutandukanya ububasha: amategeko (ashyiraho amategeko), nyobozi (ashyira mu bikorwa amategeko), ubutabera (asobanura amategeko).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp2: Sisitemu nkuru igabanya imbaraga hagati ya guverinoma yo hagati n’akarere (urugero: Ubudage, Amerika).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp3: Uburenganzira bwa muntu ni uburenganzira rusange, ntavogerwa (urugero: Itangazo ry’umuryango w’abibumbye ryita ku burenganzira bwa muntu, 1948).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp4: Sisitemu yinteko ishinga amategeko vs perezida: muri gahunda zinteko ishinga amategeko ubuyobozi buturuka mu nteko ishinga amategeko.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_desc: Sosiyete ikorwa n'umuco, ubukungu, ibigo, n'imbaraga z'amateka. Sociology nubushakashatsi bwumuco bidufasha kumva ubusumbane, indangamuntu, nimpinduka zabaturage.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_task: Tanga urugero rumwe rwukuntu globalisation yahinduye ubuzima bwa buri munsi mugihugu cyawe. Ingaruka ni nziza, mbi, cyangwa byombi? Sobanura.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp0: Gusabana: inzira abantu biga amahame, indangagaciro, ninshingano za societe yabo.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp1: Inzego z'imibereho: ubusumbane bwubatswe muri societe (urwego, igitsina, ubwoko).
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp2: Umuco: indangagaciro zisangiwe, imyizerere, imikorere, nibimenyetso bihuza itsinda hamwe.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp3: Kuba isi yihutishije guhanahana umuco no gufashanya mu bukungu.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp4: Kwandika itangazamakuru: gusuzuma inkomoko kubogama, kureba, nibimenyetso nubuhanga bukomeye bwo mu kinyejana cya 21.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_desc: Epistemology irabaza: dushobora kumenya iki, kandi twabimenya dute? Irasuzuma inkomoko nimbibi zubumenyi bwabantu - impamvu, uburambe, ubushishozi, nububasha.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_task: Birashoboka kumenya ikintu udashidikanya rwose? Andika igisubizo cyinteruro 4 uhereye kubitekerezo ushyira mu gaciro KANDI ubitekereza.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp0: Gushyira mu gaciro (Descartes, Kant): impamvu nisoko yambere yubumenyi. 'Cogito ergo sum' - Ndatekereza, kubwibyo ndi.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp1: Empiricism (Locke, Hume): ubumenyi buturuka kuburambe. Ubwenge butangira nk'urupapuro rwambaye ubusa (tabula rasa).
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp2: Gushidikanya: dukwiye gushidikanya kubisabwa byose kandi tukemera gusa ibishobora kwemezwa.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp3: Imyizerere Yukuri Yemewe (Platon): ubumenyi = ikintu nukuri, urabyizera, kandi ufite ishingiro.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp4: Ibibazo bya Gettier byerekana ko imyizerere yukuri idafite ishingiro idahagije kubumenyi.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_name: Filozofiya yo mu bwenge n'ubushake bwo kwihitiramo ibibanogeye
learnSch_philosophy_f1_desc: Ubwenge ni iki? Dufite umudendezo wo guhitamo nyabyo? Ibi bibazo bicaye ku masangano ya filozofiya, neuroscience, nubuzima bwa buri munsi.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_task: Ese koko abantu bafite umudendezo? Andika interuro 5 interuro haba kubufatanye cyangwa kugena ibintu bikomeye.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp0: Dualism (Descartes): ubwenge n'umubiri ni ibintu bitandukanye. Ikibazo: bakorana bate?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp2: Imikorere: imitekerereze isobanurwa ninshingano zabo, ntabwo ari ibintu bifatika.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp3: Ikibazo gikomeye cyimitekerereze: kuki gutunganya umubiri bitera uburambe bufatika?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp4: Compatibilism: uburenganzira bwo kwihitiramo no kugena ibintu birashobora kubana - umudendezo = gukora ukurikije impamvu zawe bwite, nubwo byatewe.
learnSch_technology_f0_desc: Igishushanyo mbonera ni uburyo bushingiye ku muntu bwo gukemura ibibazo mu buryo bwa gihanga kandi kuri gahunda. Ikoreshwa mugushushanya ibicuruzwa, ubwubatsi, UX, no guhanga udushya mu nganda zose.
learnSch_technology_f0_task: Tora ikibazo mu ishuri ryawe. Koresha ibyiciro 3 byambere byo gutekereza: gusobanura ikibazo, gusobanura uwagize ingaruka, no gutanga ibitekerezo 3.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp0: Ibyiciro 5: Kubabara → Sobanura → Igitekerezo → Prototype → Ikizamini.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp1: Kubabarana: gusobanukirwa nibyo abakoresha bakeneye binyuze mubushakashatsi no kwitegereza.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp2: Igitekerezo: kubyara ibitekerezo byinshi nta guca urubanza; ingano mbere yubuziranenge.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp3: Prototype: kubaka byihuse, bihendutse kugirango ugerageze ibitekerezo mbere yo gushora umutungo.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp4: Iteration: igishushanyo ni inzinguzingo; ibitekerezo bitezimbere verisiyo yose.
learnSch_technology_f1_desc: Kumenya gusoma no kwandika bisobanura gusobanukirwa uburyo ikoranabuhanga rikora, uko amakuru akoreshwa, nuburyo bwo kuyobora isi ya digitale neza kandi neza. AI irahindura buri gice.
learnSch_technology_f1_task: Andika ubwoko 3 bwamakuru yihariye terefone yawe ikusanya. Kuri buri, sobanura ingaruka imwe ninyungu imwe yo gukusanya amakuru.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp0: Algorithms ni intambwe ku ntambwe mudasobwa ikurikiza. Bashakisha imbaraga, ibyifuzo, na AI.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp1: Kwiga imashini: sisitemu zitezimbere zamakuru zitabanje gutegurwa neza.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp2: Amabanga yamakuru: sobanukirwa nibyo porogaramu ikusanya kuri wewe nuburyo ikoreshwa.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp3: Amakuru atari yo: kwibeshya, gushungura ibibyimba, hamwe na algorithmic amplification bituma isuzuma rikomeye ari ngombwa.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp4: Umutekano wibanze: koresha ijambo ryibanga rikomeye, ushoboze 2FA, menya kugerageza kuroba.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_desc: Icyarabu cyanditswe iburyo-ibumoso (RTL) ukoresheje inyuguti 28. Imiterere yinyuguti ihinduka bitewe numwanya mwijambo (intangiriro, hagati, iherezo, ryitaruye). Icyarabu gikoresha imibare yicyarabu-Indic imibare (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) - imibare yuburengerazuba 0–9 yakomotse mumateka.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_task: Andika imibare 1-10 muburasirazuba bw'icyarabu-Indic mibare (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Gereranya buri kimwe na mugenzi wacyo wiburengerazuba. Noneho andika ijambo ry'icyarabu rivuga "umubare" (رقم - raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp0: Icyarabu kirasomwa kandi cyanditswe uhereye iburyo ujya ibumoso (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp1: Inyuguti zifite inyuguti 28; inyinshi ni inyuguti nini. Inyajwi zikunze kugaragara nka diacritics (ḥarakāt).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp2: Buri baruwa ifite uburyo bugera kuri 4: bwitaruye (م), intangiriro (مـ), hagati (ـمـ), finale (ـم).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp3: Icyarabu gikoresha imibare y'Icyarabu-Indiki Imibare: ٠ ١ ٢ ٣ ٤ ٥ ٦ ٧ ٨ 0 (0–9). Imibare y'Iburengerazuba 0-9 yavuye muri ibyo ikoresheje imibare ya kisilamu yo mu kinyejana cya 5 - ijambo "imibare y'icyarabu" mu Burengerazuba ryerekeza kuri iyo nkomoko y'iburasirazuba.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp4: Icyarabu kigezweho (Fuṣḥā) gikoreshwa mu burezi n'itangazamakuru; Darija / Levantine / Imvugo y'Ikigobe iratandukanye bitewe n'akarere.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_desc: Ikibonezamvugo cy'icyarabu gishingiye ku mizi y'inyuguti eshatu (جذور) zitanga amagambo ajyanye. Amazina afite uburinganire bw'ikibonezamvugo (igitsina gabo / igitsina gore), umubare (ubuke / bubiri / bwinshi), n'urubanza. Inshinga zihujwe ku muntu, igitsina, n'umubare.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_task: Menya inyuguti zumuzi za: كَاتِب (umwanditsi), مَكْتُوب (yanditse), كِتَابَة (kwandika). Umuzi rusange ni uwuhe?
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp0: Sisitemu yimizi itatu: umuzi ك-ت-ب (k-t-b) itanga: كَتَبَ (kataba, yanditse), كِتَاب (kitāb, igitabo), مَكْتَبَة (maktaba, isomero).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp1: Amazina ni igitsina gabo cyangwa igitsina gore. Amazina y'abagore ubusanzwe arangirira muri ة (tā 'marbūṭa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp2: Dual ikorwa hongerwaho ان- (nominative) mwizina: كِتَابَان = ibitabo bibiri.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp3: Ubwinshi bwavunitse: ubwinshi bwicyarabu burahindura inyajwi zimbere, كِتَاب → كُتُب (ibitabo).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp4: Inshinga-ingingo-ikintu (VSO) nijambo risanzwe ryateganijwe mucyarabu gakondo; SVO isanzwe mubyarabu bigezweho.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_desc: Kubaka amagambo yicyarabu biroroshye iyo umaze gusobanukirwa na sisitemu yumuzi. Indamutso isanzwe, imibare, namagambo ya buri munsi biguha umusingi wo gutumanaho nyabyo.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_task: Sobanura mucyarabu: 'Asoma igitabo.' (هو يقرأ كتاباً). Noneho andika interuro ukoresheje inshinga-yambere (VSO) gahunda ya kera.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp0: Ndabaramukije: السلام عليكم (As-salāmu ʿalaykum) - Amahoro. Igisubizo: وعليكم السلام.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp1: Imibare: وَاحِد (1), اثْنَان (2), ثَلَاثَة (3), أَرْبَعَة (4), خَمْسَة (5), سِتَّة (6), سَبْعَة (7), ثَمَانِيَة (8), تِسْعَة (9), عَشَرَة (10).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp2: Iminsi: الأحد (Ku cyumweru), الاثنين (Ku wa mbere), الثلاثاء (Ku wa kabiri), الأربعاء (Ku wa gatatu), الخميس (Ku wa kane), الجمعة (Ku wa gatanu), السبت (Ku wa gatandatu).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp3: Inshinga zisanzwe: ذَهَبَ (dhahaba, kugenda), أَكَلَ (akala, kurya), قَرَأَ (qara'a, gusoma), كَتَبَ (kataba, kwandika).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp4: Byemewe vs bisanzwe: Icyarabu kigezweho gikoreshwa muburezi; imvugo mvugo iratandukanye mubihugu byabarabu.
learnSch_french_language_f0_desc: Imvugo y'Igifaransa irashobora kuba ingorabahizi ku bavuga Icyongereza kubera inyajwi zo mu mazuru, inyuguti zituje, hamwe n'abahuza. Kumenya amajwi hakiri kare bituma kuvuga no gusobanukirwa byoroshye.
learnSch_french_language_f0_task: Soma n'ijwi rirenga: 'Les enfants ont un ami anglais.' Shyira ahagaragara umuhuza ugomba gukora. Witoze inshuro 3.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp0: Inyajwi y'amazuru: en / em, muri / im / ain / ein, kuri / om, un - inyuguti ya nyuma ntabwo ivugwa: 'bon' = / bɔ̃ /.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp1: Inyuguti zituje: inyuguti zanyuma zisanzwe zicecekeye (urugero: 'vous' = / vu /), usibye mbere inyajwi (umuhuza).
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp2: Ihuza: ubusanzwe inyuguti ya nyuma yicecekeye ivugwa iyo ijambo rikurikira ritangiye nijwi: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp3: R mu gifaransa nijwi ryuzuye (uvular), bitandukanye nicyongereza r.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp4: Ibimenyetso byerekana: é (ifunze e), è (fungura e), ê (amateka), ç (yoroshye c = / s /), î, ô, û (cyane cyane amateka).
learnSch_french_language_f1_desc: Ikibonezamvugo cy'igifaransa gikoresha amazina yuburinganire, inshinga guhuza abantu 6, hamwe ninshuro zitandukanye. Ubuhanga bwingenzi cyane nukumenya ibyubu, ibyahise (passé compé), nibihe bidatunganye.
learnSch_french_language_f1_task: Huza 'parler' (kuvuga) mugihe cyubu kubantu 6 bose. Noneho andika interuro 2 ukoresheje passé compé.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp0: Amazina yose yigifaransa ni igitsina gabo cyangwa igitsina gore: le livre (m.), La table (f.). Ingingo zemeranya: un / une, le / la, les.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp1: Inshinga zemeranya muburinganire numubare: un grand livre / une grande maison.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp2: Passé compositioné = kwirinda / être + inshinga zashize: j'ai mangé (nariye), il est allé (yagiye).
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp3: Ntibisanzwe (imparfait) isobanura leta zashize: je mangeais (Nariye), il faisait chaud.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp4: Kwanga: ne ... pas ikikije inshinga: Je ne sais pas (Sinzi).
learnSch_french_language_f2_desc: Kwandika mu gifaransa bisaba kwitondera amategeko yamasezerano, utumenyetso (umwanya mbere!?; :), no kwiyandikisha byemewe. Imiterere isobanutse - intangiriro, iterambere, umwanzuro - nibyingenzi mubyanditswe byigifaransa.
learnSch_french_language_f2_task: Andika interuro 6 yinteruro igifaransa mugihe ukunda. Koresha byibuze 3 disikuru ihuza hamwe na subjunctive imwe.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp0: Utumenyetso two mu gifaransa twongera umwanya mbere :; ! ? n'imbere «guillemets» (ibimenyetso byavuzwe).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp1: Subjunctive (subjonctif) yerekana gushidikanya, amarangamutima, cyangwa ibikenewe: Il faut que tu viennes.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp2: Abahuza ibiganiro: d'abord (ubanza), ensuite / puis (hanyuma), enfin (amaherezo), cependant (nyamara), en effet (mubyukuri).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp3: Imiterere idahwitse irasanzwe: Il est ingenzi de + infinitive; Kuri peut dire que ...
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp4: Imiterere yinzandiko: Madame / Monsieur (gufungura kumugaragaro), Veuillez agréer l'expression de mes salutations diffées (gufunga kumugaragaro).
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_desc: Icyesipanyoli ni ururimi ruhuza imvugo - amagambo avugwa neza nkuko yanditse. Ibi bituma iba imwe mundimi zigerwaho kubatangiye. Kumenya amajwi na sisitemu yo kuvuga hakiri kare.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_task: Shyira akamenyetso muri: Universidad, hablar, árbol, joven. Koresha itegeko risanzwe hanyuma ugenzure ukeneye ikimenyetso cyerekana.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp0: Icyesipanyoli gifite inyajwi 5 zera: a, e, i, o, u - byose byavuzwe buri gihe.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp1: Inyuguti ñ isa na 'ny' (España, mañana). Kabiri ll yumvikana nka 'y' mu mvugo nyinshi.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp2: Stress: amagambo arangiriza inyajwi, n, cyangwa s ashimangirwa kumurongo wa kabiri-uheruka. Ibimenyetso byerekana (á, é) birenga ibi.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp3: Inyuguti h ihora icecekeye: hola = / ola /.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp4: Imvugo: Castiliyani (Espagne) ikoresha / θ / kuri c / z; Icyesipanyoli cyo muri Amerika y'Epfo gikoresha / s /.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_desc: Ikibonezamvugo cy'Icyesipanyoli ni gahunda kandi isanzwe. Kumenya izina ry'uburinganire, inshinga guhuza, hamwe n'ibihe bibiri byashize (preterite kandi bidatunganye) biguha ibikoresho byo kuvugana wizeye.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_task: Sobanura igihe cyo gukoresha ser na estar. Andika ingero 4 zinteruro: 2 hamwe na ser, 2 hamwe na estar.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp0: Amazina ni igitsina gabo cyangwa igitsina gore: el libro (m.), La mesa (f.). Inshinga zemeranya: un libro interesante / una mesa interesante.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp1: Ser na estar: byombi bisobanura 'kuba'. Ser = imico ihoraho; estar = leta yigihe gito: Soy médico / Estoy cansado.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp2: Preterite (indefinido) = yarangije kera: Ayer comí pizza. Ntibisanzwe (imperfecto) = ibihe byashize: Cuando era niño, jugaba ...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp3: Inshinga zoroheje: me lavo (Ndogeje), se llama (izina rye ni).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp4: Subjunctive kubyifuzo / gushidikanya: Quiero que vengas. Es posible que llueva.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_desc: Icyesipanyoli cyanditse gikurikiza amasezerano asobanutse. Inyandiko zamasomo zikoresha igitabo cyemewe, mugihe itumanaho rya buri munsi riba rishyushye kandi ritaziguye. Itegeko rikomeye ryabahuza hamwe na subjunctive bizamura inyandiko yawe.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_task: Andika imeri ngufi (interuro 6) mu cyesipanyoli utumira inshuti mu munsi mukuru w'amavuko. Koresha igitabo cyemewe kandi kidasanzwe - hanyuma ubigereranye.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp0: Icyesipanyoli gikoresha ikibazo kidahinduka ¿no gutangaza ¡ibimenyetso mugitangira interuro.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp1: Kwiyandikisha byemewe: usted (kumugaragaro), nta kwikuramo, kugoboka kubisaba ikinyabupfura.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp2: Abahuza: embargo yicyaha (icyakora), además (byongeye), por lo tanto (kubwibyo), aunque (nubwo), es decir (nibyo).
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp3: Gufungura inzandiko: Estimado / a Sr./Sra. Izina. Gufunga: Le saluda atentamente / Un cordial saludo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp4: Imiterere yinyandiko: introcción (tesis), desarrollo (argumentos con ejemplos), umwanzuro.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f0_: Ikibonezamvugo cy'icyongereza kiroroshye mu miterere ariko gifite uburyo bwinshi budasanzwe. Gusobanukirwa ibihe, ingingo, ninshinga modal nurufunguzo rwo gutumanaho neza.
Andika iyi nteruro ikora mu ijwi ryoroheje: (1) 'Umwarimu yasobanuye isomo.' (2) 'Abahanga bavumbuye ubwoko bushya.'
Icyongereza gifite inshinga 12. Ibisanzwe cyane: byoroshye byubu (ndakora), ubungubu bikomeza (ndimo gukora), ibyahise byoroshye (nakoze), ubungubu (nakoze).
Ingingo: 'a / an' ku mazina adasanzwe (igitabo); 'the' ku mazina yihariye (igitabo twaganiriyeho).
Inshinga zisanzwe (zishobora, zishobora, zigomba, zigomba, ubushake, zishaka, zishobora, imbaraga) kwerekana ubushobozi, uruhushya, inshingano, cyangwa ibishoboka.
Ibisabwa: Niba + byoroheje byashize → byari + infinitive (2-condition: Niba mfite umwanya, nagenda).
Ijwi ryitondewe: Ikintu gihinduka ingingo: 'Urupapuro rwanditswe numunyeshuri.'
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f1_: Gusoma cyane gusobanukirwa bisobanura kumva ibisobanuro bisobanutse, gufata umwanzuro, no gusuzuma intego nubuhanga bwumwanditsi. Nibyingenzi kugirango batsinde amasomo mumasomo ayo ari yo yose.
Soma ingingo iyo ari yo yose igika. Andika: (1) igitekerezo nyamukuru, (2) ikimenyetso kimwe cyatanzwe, (3) intego yumwanditsi.
Skimming: soma vuba kugirango ubone igitekerezo nyamukuru. Gusikana: reba amakuru arambuye.
Umwanzuro: gusoma 'hagati y'imirongo' - bivuze iki ariko bitavuzwe neza?
Intego yumwanditsi: kumenyesha, kwemeza, gushimisha, cyangwa gusobanura.
Amagambo mu magambo: koresha amagambo akikije kugirango ukore ibisobanuro byamagambo atazwi.
Gusoma cyane: kumenya ibirego, gusuzuma ibimenyetso, nibitekerezo byibibazo.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f2_: Kwandika Icyongereza Kwandika bikurikiza amasezerano asobanutse: kwiyandikisha byemewe, amagambo asobanutse, nuburyo bwumvikana. Kumenya aya masezerano bifasha mubizamini, gusaba kaminuza, nubuzima bwumwuga.
Andika intangiriro yinteruro 5 kugirango wandike kuri: 'Ingaruka zimbuga nkoranyambaga ku buzima bwo mu mutwe bwingimbi.' Shyiramo itangazo.
Imiterere yinyandiko: Intangiriro (hook + context + thesis), Umubiri (ingingo, ibimenyetso, ibisobanuro kuri paragarafu), Umwanzuro (subiza theisis + akamaro kanini).
Amagambo ya Theisis: interuro imwe isobanutse ivuga ingingo nyamukuru yinyandiko.
Ururimi rukingira mu myigire: 'Turashobora kuvuga ko…', 'Ibimenyetso byerekana…', 'Ibi birashobora kwerekana…'
Irinde imvugo idasanzwe: ntukoreshe kwikuramo (ntukore → ntukore), gusebanya, cyangwa kuvuga umuntu-muntu keretse ubisabye.
Reba: vuga inkomoko neza (APA, Umudepite, Harvard) kugirango wirinde gukopera.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_desc: Kubara ni imibare yo guhinduka. Ibarura ritandukanye risanga ibipimo byimpinduka (inkomoko); ibara ryibanze risanga umubare wuzuye (integral). Ishimangira ibya fiziki, ubwubatsi, ubukungu, na siyanse yuzuye.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_task: Shakisha inkomoko ya f (x) = 3x³ - 2x² + 5x - 7. Erekana buri ntambwe ukoresheje itegeko ryimbaraga.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp0: Imipaka isobanura agaciro imikorere yegera nkuko x yegera ingingo.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp1: Inkomoko: f ′ (x) = igipimo cyimpinduka. Kuri f (x) = xⁿ, f ′ (x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (itegeko ryimbaraga).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp2: Amategeko y'urunigi: d / dx [f (g (x))] = f ′ (g (x)) · g ′ (x).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp3: Integral = agace munsi yumurongo. ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹ / (n + 1) + C.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp4: Inyigisho yibanze ya calculus: gutandukanya no kwishyira hamwe nibikorwa bihinduka.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_desc: Imirongo ya algebra ni imibare ya vectors, matrices, hamwe no guhindura umurongo. Nibyingenzi mukwiga imashini, ibishushanyo bya mudasobwa, ubwubatsi, na siyanse yubumenyi.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_task: Kugwiza matrix A = [[1,2], [3,4]] na matrix B = [[5,6], [7,8]]. Erekana imibare yose.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp0: Inzitizi ifite ubunini n'icyerekezo. Imirongo irashobora kongerwamo no gupimwa.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp1: Matrix igereranya guhinduka kumurongo cyangwa sisitemu yo kugereranya.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp2: Kugwiza Matrix ntabwo bigenda: AB ≠ BA muri rusange.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp3: Icyemezo: scalar ivuga niba matrix idahinduka. det (A) = 0 → ntibishobora guhinduka.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp4: Indangagaciro na eigenvectors: Av = λv. Ikoreshwa muri PCA, physics, na Page ya Google.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_desc: Ibarurishamibare rya kaminuza riva mubisobanuro bijya mubisobanuro - ukoresheje amakuru yintangarugero kugirango ufate imyanzuro kubantu. Ibitekerezo bishoboka bitanga urufatiro rukomeye.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_task: Icyitegererezo cyabanyeshuri 30 gifite uburebure bwa cm 170, SD 8 cm. Kubara 95% intera yicyizere.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp0: Impinduka zisanzwe: impinduka agaciro kayo kugenwa nibyabaye bidasanzwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp1: Isaranganya risanzwe: gutondeka inzogera, bivuze = median = uburyo; 68-95-99.7.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp2: Kwipimisha Hypothesis: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (ubundi). p-agaciro <0.05 → kwanga H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp3: Intera yicyizere: intera aho ibipimo nyabyo biri hamwe nibishoboka byavuzwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp4: Coefficient de r: −1 = ibibi byuzuye, 0 = nta sano ifitanye isano, +1 = nziza nziza.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_desc: Ingano itandukanye isobanura uburyo ingano ihinduka kubijyanye nibindi byinshi. Nururimi rwa fiziki, ubwubatsi, ibinyabuzima, nubukungu - byerekana ibintu byose kuva ubwiyongere bwabaturage kugeza kuri orbite.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_task: Gukemura dy / dx = 2xy hamwe na y (0) = 1. Gutandukanya impinduka, guhuza, shyira mubikorwa byambere.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp0: ODE (ikigereranyo gisanzwe gitandukanya) ikubiyemo ibikomoka kubijyanye nimpinduka imwe: dy / dx = f (x, y).
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp1: Gutandukana ODE: dy / dx = g (x) · h (y) vari impinduka zitandukanye kandi zihuza impande zombi.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp2: Itondekanya ryambere umurongo ODE: dy / dx + P (x) y = Q (x), byakemuwe nibintu bihuza μ = e ^ ∫P (x) dx.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp3: Icyiciro cya kabiri umurongo ODE hamwe na coefficient zihoraho: ay ″ + na ′ + cy = 0. Gukemura ukoresheje ikigereranyo kiranga ar² + br + c = 0.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp4: Ibibazo byambere byagaciro (IVP): koresha ibintu byatanzwe kugirango ubone igisubizo cyihariye C.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_desc: Imibare igoye yongerera imibare nyayo mugutangiza i = √ (−1). Nibyingenzi mubuhanga bwamashanyarazi, gutunganya ibimenyetso, ubukanishi bwa kwant, no gusesengura bigoye.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_task: Erekana z = 1 + i muburyo bwa polar. Shakisha modulus, impaka, hanyuma wandike nka re ^ (iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp0: Umubare utoroshye: z = a + bi, aho a ni igice nyacyo na b igice cyibitekerezo.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp1: Modulus: | z | = √ (a² + b²). Impaka: θ = arctan (b / a).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp2: Imiterere ya polar: z = r (cosθ + i · sinθ) = re ^ (iθ) (formula ya Euler).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp3: Indangamuntu ya Euler: e ^ (iπ) + 1 = 0 - bakunze kwita ikigereranyo cyiza cyane mu mibare.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp4: De Moivre's theorem: (cosθ + i · sinθ) ⁿ = cos (nθ) + i · icyaha (nθ).
learnUni_physics_f0_desc: Abakanishi ba kera basobanura icyerekezo cyibintu bya macroscopique ukoresheje amategeko ya Newton. Abakanishi ba Lagrangian na Hamilton ni imbaraga zikomeye zo kuvugurura zikoreshwa muri fiziki yateye imbere.
learnUni_physics_f0_task: Uburemere bwa kg 3 buranyerera bugabanutse kuri 30 °. Kubara kwihuta kwayo ukoresheje itegeko rya 2 rya Newton.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp0: Itegeko rya 2 rya Newton muburyo bwa vector: ΣF = ma.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp1: Kubungabunga imbaraga: imbaraga zose za sisitemu ifunze burigihe.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp2: Kubungabunga ingufu: muri sisitemu ifunze, ingufu za mashini zose zihoraho.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp3: Umuvuduko w'inguni L = Iω (umwanya wa inertia × umuvuduko w'inguni).
learnUni_physics_f0_kp4: Abakanishi ba Lagrangian: L = T - V (kinetic ukuyemo imbaraga zishobora kubaho). Ingano ya Euler-Lagrange ikuramo icyerekezo.
learnUni_physics_f1_desc: Electromagnetism ihuza amashanyarazi, magnetisme, numucyo. Ingano enye za Maxwell zisobanura neza ibintu bya electromagnetic no guhanura imiraba ya electroniki.
learnUni_physics_f1_task: Amategeko ya Leta ya Faraday kandi utange ikintu kimwe gifatika kwisi (urugero: amashanyarazi cyangwa transformateur).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp0: Amategeko ya Coulomb: F = kq₁q₂ / r² (imbaraga hagati y'ibirego).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp1: Amategeko ya Gauss: amashanyarazi atembera hejuru yugara charge kwishyuza.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp2: Amategeko ya Faraday: guhindura magnetiki flux itera EMF.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp3: Ikigereranyo cya Maxwell gihanura ko imiyoboro ya electromagnetique igenda ku muvuduko w'urumuri.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp4: Umucyo ni umuyagankuba wa elegitoroniki: E na B imirima iranyeganyega kuri perpendicular kuri mugenzi we no ku cyerekezo cyurugendo.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_desc: Imiterere yamakuru ategura amakuru neza; algorithms itunganya. Guhitamo amakuru yukuri hamwe na algorithm bigena niba porogaramu ikora muri milisegonda cyangwa amasaha kuri datasets nini.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_task: Kurikirana ukoresheje binary gushakisha kumurongo watoranijwe [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23] ushakisha 12. Intambwe zingahe?
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp0: Array: ingano-nini, O (1) kwinjira. Urutonde ruhujwe: ingano yingirakamaro, O (n) kwinjira.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp1: Ikibaho (LIFO) n'umurongo (FIFO): bikoreshwa mugusiba sisitemu, BFS / DFS kunyuramo.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp2: Imbonerahamwe ya Hash: O (1) ugereranije ushakisha ukoresheje imikorere ya hash.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp3: Gushakisha Binary: O (log n) - bisaba amakuru yatoranijwe. Gushakisha umurongo: O (n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp4: Inyandiko-nini yerekana uburyo igihe gikura hamwe nubunini bwinjiza: O (1) <O (log n) <O (n) <O (n²).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_desc: Ububikoshingiro bubika kandi butegure amakuru kugirango agarure neza kandi akoreshwe. Ububikoshingiro bifitanye isano ukoresha imbonerahamwe na SQL; Ububiko bwa NoSQL bukora amakuru atubatswe cyangwa yatanzwe.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_task: Andika ikibazo cya SQL kugirango ubone abanyeshuri bose bafite amanota ari hejuru ya 80 uhereye kumeza yitwa "abanyeshuri" bafite inkingi (id, izina, amanota).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp0: Ububikoshingiro bwububiko bubika amakuru mumeza (umurongo = inyandiko, inkingi = ibiranga).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp1: SQL GUHITAMO Ikibazo: HITAMO inkingi Uhereye kumeza AHO imiterere ITEGEKO RIKURIKIRA.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp2: Urufunguzo rwibanze: ikiranga kidasanzwe kuri buri murongo. Urufunguzo rwamahanga: guhuza umurongo kumeza.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp3: JOIN ikomatanya imirongo kuva kumeza menshi: INNER JOIN isubiza umurongo uhuye.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp4: Imiterere ya ACID: Atomicity, Guhoraho, Kwigunga, Kuramba - kwemeza ibikorwa byizewe.
learnUni_economics_f0_desc: Ubukungu bwiga ubukungu muri rusange: GDP, ifaranga, ubushomeri, politiki y’ifaranga n’imari. Banki nkuru na guverinoma zikoresha ibyo bikoresho mu kuzamura iterambere rihamye.
learnUni_economics_f0_task: Niba banki nkuru yazamuye igipimo cyinyungu, bigenda bite kuguza, gushora imari, no guta agaciro? Sobanura urunigi rw'ingaruka.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp0: GDP = C + I + G + (X - M): gukoresha + ishoramari + amafaranga leta ikoresha + byohereza hanze.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp1: Inflation: izamuka rusange ryibiciro. Deflation: kugabanuka kw'ibiciro. Byombi birashobora kwangiza niba bikabije.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp2: Ubushomeri: guterana amagambo (hagati y'akazi), imiterere (ubuhanga budahuye), cycle (recession).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp3: Banki nkuru zizamura igipimo cy’inyungu mu kurwanya ifaranga; kumanura kugirango bashishikarize gukura.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp4: Ubukungu bwa Keynesian: leta zigomba kongera amafaranga mugihe cyubukungu.
learnUni_biology_f0_desc: Ibinyabuzima bya molekuline byiga uburyo bwimikorere yubuzima - kwigana ADN, kwandukura, guhindura, no kugenzura gene. Ni ishingiro ryibinyabuzima, ubuvuzi, na genetika.
learnUni_biology_f0_task: Urebye uko ADN ikurikirana ATG-GCC-TAA, mRNA ikurikirana ni iyihe? (Simbuza T na U, na A↔T, C↔G)
learnUni_biology_f0_kp0: ADN → RNA → Poroteyine: inyigisho nkuru y’ibinyabuzima bya molekile.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp1: Inyandiko: ADN yandukuwe muri messenger RNA (mRNA) muri nucleus.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp2: Ubuhinduzi: ribosomes soma mRNA hanyuma ikusanyirize aside amine muri proteine.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp3: Codon ni 3-nucleotide ikurikirana irimo aside amine imwe.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: igikoresho cyo guhindura gene gishobora guca neza no guhindura urutonde rwa ADN.
learnUni_biology_f1_desc: Irondakoko risobanura uburyo imico yarazwe. Ubwihindurize busobanura uburyo ibinyabuzima bihinduka mugihe binyuze muburyo bwo guhitamo no gutandukana. Hamwe hamwe basobanura ubuzima butandukanye.
learnUni_biology_f1_task: Koresha kare ya Punnett kugirango werekane umusaraba Aa × Aa. Ni ubuhe bwoko bwa genotype na phenotype?
learnUni_biology_f1_kp0: Amategeko ya Mendel: amategeko yo gutandukanya (alleles itandukanye mugihe cyo gushinga imikino); amategeko yigenga.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp1: Dominant alleles mask recessive alleles muri heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp2: Hardy-Weinberg iringaniza: allele yumurongo uhoraho mugihe hatabayeho ubwihindurize.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp3: Guhitamo bisanzwe: abantu bafite imico ijyanye nibidukikije barokoka kandi bakororoka byinshi.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp4: Guhinduka ni isoko nyamukuru yo gutandukana kwa geneti; benshi ntibabogamye.
learnSch_physics_f3_desc: Thermodynamic yiga ubushyuhe, ubushyuhe, no guhindura ingufu mubikorwa. Amategeko atatu yingenzi agenga moteri yubushyuhe, firigo, hamwe nubushakashatsi bwimiti kwisi. Gusobanukirwa na termodinamike bisobanura impamvu moteri idashobora gukora neza 100% n'impamvu urubura rushonga iyo rukoraho.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp0: Ubushyuhe bupima impuzandengo ya kinetic yingirakamaro; bipimirwa muri Kelvin (K) cyangwa selisiyusi (° C).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp1: Itegeko rya 1 rya Thermodynamic: ingufu zirazigamwa - ubushyuhe bwongewe kuri sisitemu bingana nimpinduka zingufu zimbere wongeyeho akazi kakozwe (ΔU = Q - W).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp2: Itegeko rya 2: ubushyuhe butemba buva mubushyuhe bukonje, ntibisubira inyuma. Entropy (disorder) burigihe yiyongera muri sisitemu yitaruye.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp3: Ubushyuhe bwihariye (c): Q = mcΔT - imbaraga zikenewe kugirango uzamure kg 1 yibintu kuri 1 ° C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp4: Imikorere ya moteri yubushyuhe: η = W / Q_hot = 1 - T_cold / T_hot (Imikorere ya Carnot - ntarengwa ya theoretical).
learnSch_physics_f3_task: 200 g icyuma (c = 0.45 J / g · ° C) gishyuha kuva kuri 20 ° C kugeza 100 ° C. Harakenewe ingufu zingahe? Noneho ubare Carnot ikora neza ya moteri ikora hagati ya 500 K na 300 K.
learnSch_physics_f4_desc: Fizika ya kirimbuzi ishakisha imiterere ya nuclei ya atome n'imbaraga zibafatira hamwe. Nuclei idahindagurika irekura ingufu nkimirasire kugirango igere kumurongo uhamye. Imyuka ya kirimbuzi iha imbaraga izuba, ibimera bya kirimbuzi, ikanasobanura inkomoko yibintu mu nyenyeri.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp0: Nucleus irimo proton (positif) na neutron (itabogamye), ifatanywe hamwe nimbaraga zikomeye za kirimbuzi - zikomeye cyane kuruta kwanga amashanyarazi.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp1: Kubora kwa Alpha (α) gusohora helium nucleus (proton 2 + neutron 2). Kubora Beta (β) gusohora electron cyangwa positron. Kubora kwa gamma (γ) gusohora imirasire yingufu za electromagnetic.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp2: Igice cya kabiri cyubuzima: igihe cyakabiri cyicyitegererezo cya radio ikora. Nyuma ya kimwe cya kabiri cyubuzima, igice gisigaye ni (½) ⁿ.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp3: Uburinganire bwimbaraga - E = mc² - agace gato gahindura imbaraga nini (c = 3 × 10⁸ m / s).
learnSch_physics_f4_kp4: Igice kigabanya nucleus iremereye (urugero: ²³⁵U) irekura ingufu; fusion ihuza nuclei yoroheje (urugero: ²H + ³H → eYe) irekura imbaraga nyinshi kuri misa imwe.
learnSch_physics_f4_task: Iradiyo ikora isotope ifite igice cyubuzima bwimyaka 5. Niba utangiranye na 80 g, hasigaye angahe nyuma yimyaka 15? Andika buri ntambwe. Noneho koresha E = mc² kugirango ushakishe ingufu zasohotse niba 1 g ya misa ihinduwe rwose imbaraga.
learnSch_physics_f5_desc: Quantum physics isobanura imyitwarire yibintu ningufu kurwego rwa atome na subatomic. Kuri uru rwego, ibice bitwara nkumuraba, ingufu ziza mubipaki byihariye (quanta), kandi igikorwa cyo gupima kigira ingaruka kubigaragara. Quantum physics ishingiye kuri laseri, semiconductor, na scaneri ya MRI.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp0: Isano ya Planck: ingufu za fotone ni E = hf, aho h = 6.63 × 10⁻³⁴ J · s (ihoraho rya Planck) na f ni inshuro.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp1: Ingaruka y'amashanyarazi: urumuri rusohora electroni hejuru yicyuma - byerekana ko urumuri rwitwara nkibice (fotone). Einstein yatsindiye igihembo cyitiriwe Nobel kubera ibi bisobanuro.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp2: Umuhengeri - ibice bibiri: electron (hamwe nuduce twose) bitwara nkimiraba yombi; de Broglie uburebure bwa λ = h / (mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp3: Heisenberg ihame ridashidikanywaho: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ / 2 - ntushobora kumenya imyanya nimbaraga byingingo zingana icyarimwe.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp4: Electron ifite ingufu zidasanzwe muri atome; iyo electron igabanutse kurwego rwo hasi, isohora fotone ifite ingufu zingana nikinyuranyo.
learnSch_physics_f5_task: Fotone ifite inshuro 6.0 × 10¹⁴ Hz. Kubara imbaraga zayo (h = 6.63 × 10⁻³⁴ J · s). Noneho shakisha uburebure bwa electron igenda kuri 2.0 × 10⁶ m / s (mass = 9.11 × 10⁻³¹ kg).
learnSch_physics_f6_desc: Umwihariko wa Einstein (1905) wahinduye fiziki yerekana ko umwanya nigihe bidashoboka - birambura kandi bigabanuka bitewe n'umuvuduko ugereranije. Ku muvuduko wegereye umuvuduko wurumuri, igihe kiratinda, ibintu bigufi, kandi ubwinshi bwiyongera. Izi ngaruka, zemejwe na satelite ya GPS hamwe nihuta ryihuta, bihindura uko twumva isanzure.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp0: Icya 1 cyerekana: amategeko ya fiziki arasa murwego rwose rudasanzwe (rutihuta).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp1: Icyiciro cya 2: umuvuduko wumucyo c = 3 × 10⁸ m / s uhoraho kubarebera bose, utitaye kumikorere yinkomoko cyangwa indorerezi.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp2: Kwagura umwanya: isaha igenda ikora gahoro. Δt '= Δt / √ (1 - v² / c²). Kwihuta kwimuka, igihe gitinda kirakunyura.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp3: Kugabanya uburebure: ikintu cyimuka ni kigufi mu cyerekezo cyerekezo. L '= L₀ √ (1 - v² / c²).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp4: Ubwinshi-imbaraga zingana E = mc²: misa yo kuruhuka nuburyo bubitswe bwingufu. Niyo mpamvu reaction ya kirimbuzi irekura ingufu nyinshi.
learnSch_physics_f6_task: Roketi ifite uburebure bwa m 100 kuruhuka kandi igenda kuri 0.8c. Ni ubuhe burebure bwabwo bupimwe n'indorerezi ku Isi? Koresha L '= L₀√ (1 - v² / c²). Kandi, kumasegonda angahe umunota 1 kuri roketi utandukanye numunota 1 kwisi?
learnSch_chemistry_f3_desc: Ubuhanga bwa chimie bwiga karubone. Ubushobozi budasanzwe bwa Carbone bwo gukora imiyoboro ine ya covalent ikora molekile zitandukanye zitagira umupaka - ibyubaka ubuzima, imiti, ibicanwa, na plastiki. Kumenya amatsinda yimikorere nubwoko bwibisubizo bifungura ibinyabuzima, farumasi, nibikoresho bya siyansi.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp0: Molekile zose kama zirimo karubone, mubisanzwe ihujwe na hydrogen (C - H) kandi akenshi na O, N, S, cyangwa halogene.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp1: Hydrocarbone: alkane (C - C umugozi umwe, wuzuye), alukene (C = C inshuro ebyiri, idahaze), alkine (C≡C inshuro eshatu).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp2: Amatsinda akora agena imiterere yimiti: –OH (inzoga), –COOH (acide karubike), –NH₂ (amine), –CHO (aldehyde), –C = O (ketone).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp3: Imiterere ya isomers ifite formulaire imwe ariko ihuza itandukanye; stereoisomers ifite ihuza rimwe ariko gahunda itandukanye.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp4: Polymers ni molekile nini zubatswe zisubiramo ibice bya monomer: wongeyeho polymerisation (ethene → polyethene) hamwe na polymerisation ya kanseri (amino acide → proteyine).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_task: Shushanya formulaire yuzuye ya aside ya Ethanoic (CH₃COOH). Menya itsinda rikora. Andika ikigereranyo cyibisubizo byacyo hamwe na sodium hydroxide (NaOH) hanyuma uvuge ibicuruzwa.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_desc: Amashanyarazi yerekana isano iri hagati yimiti ningufu zamashanyarazi. Batteri ihindura ingufu za shimi mumashanyarazi; electrolysis ikora ibinyuranye. Redox reaction - ihererekanyabubasha rya elegitoronike hagati yubwoko - riri mu mutima wa buri mashanyarazi, kuva ibyuma byangiza kugeza kuri terefone yawe.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp0: Oxidation = gutakaza electron (AMavuta); Kugabanuka = ​​inyungu za electron (RIG). Buri redox reaction ifite inzira zombi icyarimwe.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp1: Muri selile ya galvanic (voltaic), reaction ya redox itunguranye itwara amashanyarazi. Anode ni mbi (okiside); cathode ni nziza (kugabanya).
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp2: Electrolysis ikoresha ingufu z'amashanyarazi zo hanze kugirango itware ibintu bidahita - bikoreshwa mu gusasa ibyuma, kubyara aluminium, no kugabanya amazi muri H₂ na O₂.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp3: Ubushobozi bwa electrode isanzwe (E °): hejuru ya E ° bisobanura imbaraga za okiside ikomeye. Umuvuduko w'akagari = E ° cathode - E ° anode.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp4: Amategeko ya Faraday: ubwinshi bwibintu byashyizwe muri electrolysis bihwanye n'amafaranga yatanzwe (Q = It) hamwe na misa.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_task: Muri electrolysis ya acide sulfurike, andika kimwe cya kabiri kuri buri electrode. Menya ibicuruzwa bya anode na cathode. Niba umuyoboro wa 2 A utemba kuri 500 s, ni zingahe za electroni zihererekanwa? (F = 96 500 C / mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f5_desc: Imiti iringaniza iboneka muri sisitemu ifunze iyo reaction yimbere ninyuma igenda ku gipimo kingana, bityo kwibumbira hamwe nibicuruzwa bikomeza guhoraho. Gusobanukirwa kuringaniza ni ngombwa muri chimie yinganda (inzira ya Haber) na sisitemu yibinyabuzima (maraso pH, ibikorwa bya enzyme).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp0: Kuringaniza, igipimo cyibisubizo byimbere bingana nigipimo cyibisubizo - kwibanda birahoraho ariko ntabwo byanze bikunze bingana.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp1: Kuringaniza guhoraho K = [ibicuruzwa] ^ n / [reaction] ^ m. K >> 1: ibicuruzwa bitoneshwa. K << 1: reaction yatoneshejwe.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp2: Ihame rya Le Chatelier: niba sisitemu iringaniye ihungabanye, ihinduka kugirango irwanye impinduka kandi igarure uburinganire.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp3: Kongera kwibanda kuri reaction ihinduka ihinduranya ibicuruzwa. Kuraho ibicuruzwa bikora kimwe.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp4: Kuri gaze: kongera umuvuduko uhindura uburinganire ugana kuruhande hamwe na gaze nkeya. Ubushyuhe bwiyongera butera icyerekezo cya endothermic.
