learnSch_chemistry_f5_task: N₂ (g) + 3H₂ (g) ⇌ 2NH₃ (g) ΔH = −92 kJ / mol. Vuga ihinduka muburinganire iyo: (a) umuvuduko wiyongereye, (b) ubushyuhe buzamutse, (c) byinshi N₂ byongeweho. Sobanura buri wese ukoresheje ihame rya Le Chatelier.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_desc: Chimie y’ibidukikije ikora ubushakashatsi ku buryo ibintu bya shimi bikorana n’umwuka, amazi, nubutaka - nuburyo ibikorwa byabantu bihindura sisitemu. Irasobanura imihindagurikire y’ikirere, kugabanuka kwa ozone, kwanduza amazi, na chimie inyuma y’ibisubizo birambye nka chimie yicyatsi n’ibikoresho byangiza ibidukikije.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp0: Imyuka ya parike (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, imyuka ya H₂O) ikurura kandi ikongera gusohora imirasire ya infragre, igashyushya isi - ingaruka za parike.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp1: Imvura ya acide: SO₂ na NOₓ (biva mu gutwika amavuta ya fosile) bishonga mumazi yimvura ikora H₂SO₃ na HNO₃, bikagabanya pH bikangiza ibidukikije.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp2: Kugabanuka kwa Ozone: CFCs irekura Cl · radicals muri stratosferasi, isenya O₃: Cl · + O₃ → ClO · + O₂ (reaction reaction).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp3: Eutrophasique: nitrate na fosifate birangira biva mu ifumbire bitera uburabyo bwa algal butakaza ogisijeni yashonze kandi byica ubuzima bwo mu mazi.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp4: Amahame ya chimie yicyatsi: igishushanyo mbonera kigabanya imyanda, ikoresha ibiryo byongerewe imbaraga, wirinde ibishobora guteza akaga, kandi ubukungu bwa atome bukiyongera.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_task: Sobanura urunigi rwuzuye uburyo molekile imwe ya CFC ishobora gusenya ibihumbi bya molekile ya ozone. Andika intambwe ebyiri zingenzi. Noneho ubare ubukungu bwa atom bwa reaction 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp1: Imvura ya acide hamwe na ozone
learnSch_biology_f3_desc: Irondakoko ni siyanse yo kuragwa - uburyo imico iva kubabyeyi ikabyara binyuze muri gen na chromosomes. Ishimangira ubuvuzi (indwara zishingiye ku ngirabuzima fatizo, ubuvuzi bwihariye), ubuhinzi (ubworozi bw'ibihingwa), na siyanse y'ubucamanza (profil ya ADN). Gusobanukirwa genetiki bisobanura kumva impamvu abantu batandukanye nuburyo indwara zarazwe zivuka.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp0: Imirasire ni ibice bya ADN kode ya poroteyine. Buri gene ifata ahantu runaka (locus) kuri chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp1: Abantu bafite ibice bibiri bya chromosomes (46 byose); imwe imwe kuri buri mubyeyi. Imibonano mpuzabitsina chromosomes: XX = igitsina gore, XY = umugabo.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp2: Dominant allele (B) masike resessive allele (b) muri heterozygote (Bb). Imico yakira igaragara gusa iyo abaryamana bahuje igitsina (bb).
learnSch_biology_f3_kp3: Umwanya wa Punnett uteganya amahirwe yo kubyara genotypes. Umusaraba wa monohybrid Bb × Bb utanga igipimo cya 3: 1.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp4: Ibiranga guhuza ibitsina (urugero: guhuma amabara, haemophilia) bitwarwa kuri X chromosome; abagabo (XY) bakunze kwibasirwa.
learnSch_biology_f3_task: Ababyeyi babiri bafite amaso yijimye (Bb × Bb) bafite abana. Shushanya umurongo wa Punnett. Nibihe bishoboka ko umwana afite amaso yubururu (bb)? Ni ubuhe bwoko bwa genotype na phenotype?
learnSch_biology_f4_desc: Ubwihindurize ni ihinduka ryimiterere iranga abaturage uko ibisekuruza byagiye bisimburana. Guhitamo kwa Darwin nuburyo bukuru: abantu bafite imico myiza barokoka kandi bakororoka byinshi. Ubwihindurize busobanura ubudasa butandukanye bwubuzima kwisi hamwe nibintu bisangiwe mubinyabuzima bitandukanye.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp0: Guhitamo bisanzwe: abantu bafite imico ijyanye nibidukikije barokoka kandi bakororoka byinshi, bagatanga imico myiza kubana.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp1: Ibimenyetso byabayeho biturutse ku bwihindurize: inyandiko y’ibinyabuzima, kugereranya anatomiya (imiterere ya homologique), guhuza ADN, biogeografiya, byagaragaye.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp2: Guhinduka muri ADN nisoko ntangarugero yo gutandukana gushya. Abenshi ntibabogamye; bimwe ni bibi; bake batanga akarusho.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp3: Ibisobanuro: iyo abaturage batandukanijwe (geografiya, imyororokere) igihe kirekire bihagije, bihinduka mubwoko butandukanye butagishobora kuvangwa.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp4: Kurwanya Antibiyotike ni ubwihindurize mu bikorwa: bagiteri zifite genes zo kurwanya zirarokoka kandi zikororoka, bigatuma ubwoko bwihanganira bwiganje.
learnSch_biology_f4_task: Sobanura mu ntambwe 4 uburyo kurwanya antibiyotike bitera imbere mubantu ba bagiteri ukoresheje guhitamo bisanzwe. Noneho sobanura ubwoko bubiri bwibimenyetso byerekana ubwihindurize hanyuma usobanure icyo buriwerekana.
learnSch_biology_f5_desc: Ibimera nibyo byambere bitanga umusaruro mubinyabuzima hafi ya byose - bifata ingufu zizuba kandi bikabihindura mubintu kama binyuze muri fotosintezeza. Gusobanukirwa ibinyabuzima bikomoka ku bimera bikubiyemo imiterere (imizi, ibiti, amababi, indabyo), fotosintezeza, imyororokere, n’uruhare rukomeye ibimera bigira mu kugenzura ikirere cy’isi no kugaburira ubuzima.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp0: Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + ingufu zoroheje → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Biboneka muri chloroplasts irimo chlorophyll.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp1: Amababi yahujwe na fotosintezeza: ubuso bunini, ubunini, epidermis ibonerana, stomata yo kwinjira muri CO₂, hamwe numuyoboro ukungahaye w'amaraso.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp2: Xylem itwara amazi namabuye y'agaciro kuva mumizi kugera kumababi. Phloem itwara isukari iva mumababi ikagera kubindi bimera.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp3: Transpiration: amazi azenguruka binyuze muri stomata, akurura amazi hejuru ya xylem (umugezi wa transpiration).
learnSch_biology_f5_kp4: Imyororokere y'ibihingwa: ibimera byindabyo bikoresha kwanduza (kwimura amabyi) no gufumbira kugirango bitange imbuto; imbuto zikwirakwira ahantu hashya.
learnSch_biology_f5_task: Tegura igerageza kugirango umenye niba ubukana bwurumuri bugira ingaruka ku gipimo cya fotosintezeza muri pisine. Vuga ibyigenga, biterwa, kandi bigenzurwa nibihinduka. Vuga kandi usobanure ibisubizo.
learnSch_biology_f6_desc: Microbiology ni ubushakashatsi bwibinyabuzima bya microscopique - bagiteri, virusi, ibihumyo, naba protiste. Utwo tuntu duto tugize ubuzima bwabantu, ubuhinzi, umusaruro wibiribwa, hamwe nizuba rya karubone kwisi. Gusobanukirwa mikorobe ni ngombwa mu buvuzi (antibiotike, inkingo), ibinyabuzima, no gusobanukirwa n'indwara.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp0: Indwara ya bagiteri ni prokaryotes (nta nucleus). Byinshi ntacyo bitwaye cyangwa bifite akamaro; bimwe ni indwara zitera indwara nk'igituntu na kolera.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp1: Virusi ntabwo ari selile - ni imirongo ya ADN / RNA mu ikote rya poroteyine. Barigana gusa mugushimuta imashini yakira.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp2: Antibiyotike yica cyangwa ikabuza bagiteri ariko ntacyo imaze kurwanya virusi (ubukonje busanzwe, ibicurane). Kurenza urugero bitera antibiyotike.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp3: Sisitemu yubudahangarwa: kwirwanaho bidasanzwe (uruhu, fagocytes) hamwe nubwirinzi bwihariye (lymphocytes zitanga antibodies). Inkingo zitoza ubudahangarwa bw'umubiri nta gutera indwara.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp4: Mikorobe zifite akamaro: bagiteri zo mu nda zifasha igogorwa; ibihumyo bitanga antibiotike (penisiline yo muri Penicilium); umusemburo ferment isukari kumugati na byeri.
learnSch_biology_f6_task: Gereranya imiterere ya bagiteri na virusi. Sobanura impamvu antibiyotike ikora kuri imwe ariko idakora indi. Noneho sobanura uburyo bubiri umubiri wirinda kwandura bagiteri.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_desc: Imiterere yamakuru ni uburyo bwo kubika no kubona amakuru; algorithms ni intambwe ku yindi inzira yo gukemura ibibazo. Guhitamo amakuru yukuri hamwe na algorithm bigena niba gahunda ikora muri milisegonda cyangwa amasaha. Iyi ngingo niyo nkingi yiterambere rya software neza.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp0: Gutondekanya ububiko bwibintu muburyo bukurikiranye; kugera kubipimo ni O (1). Urutonde rwemerera ingano yingirakamaro ariko irashobora kubona buhoro.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp1: Ibice (LIFO - iheruka muri, ubanza hanze) n'umurongo (FIFO - ubanza muri, ubanza hanze) ucunga ibyegeranyo byateganijwe kubibazo byakoreshejwe.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp2: Gushakisha kumurongo kugenzura buri kintu (O (n)); gushakisha binary bisaba amakuru yatondekanye kandi igabanya umwanya wishakisha buri ntambwe (O (log n)).
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp3: Ubwoko bwa bubble bugereranya ibintu byegeranye no kubihindura (O (n²)). Guhuriza hamwe gutandukanya no guhuza inshuro nyinshi (O (n log n)) - byihuse cyane kumakuru manini.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp4: Big-O inyandiko isobanura imikorere ya algorithm: O (1) ihoraho, O (n) ni umurongo, O (n²) ni quadratic - hepfo ibyiza nibyiza byinjira.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_task: Kurikirana ibintu byinshi kurutonde [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]. Erekana buri gice. Kubara igereranya ryose hamwe na swaps. Noneho andika pseudocode yo gushakisha binary kurutonde rwatoranijwe.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_desc: Ububikoshingiro ni ikusanyamakuru ryateguwe ryamakuru. Ububikoshingiro bwububiko bubika amakuru mumeza ahujwe nurufunguzo. SQL igufasha gukora, kubaza, kuvugurura, no gusiba inyandiko. Ububikoshingiro imbaraga imbaraga zose zikoreshwa kuva sisitemu yubuyobozi bwishuri kugeza kurubuga rusange.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp0: Ububikoshingiro bwububiko bubika amakuru mumeza (umurongo = inyandiko, inkingi = imirima). Imbonerahamwe ihujwe nurufunguzo rwibanze n’amahanga.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp1: Urufunguzo rwibanze: ikiranga kidasanzwe kuri buri nyandiko mumeza. Urufunguzo rwamahanga: ihuza imbonerahamwe imwe nurufunguzo rwibanze rwurundi.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp2: SQL GUHITAMO Ikibazo: HITAMO inkingi Uhereye kumeza AHO imiterere ITEGEKO RIKURIKIRA. Urugero: HITAMO izina MU Banyeshuri AHO amanota = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp3: Ubusanzwe bigabanya kwigana amakuru mugabanye imbonerahamwe kuburyo buri gice cyamakuru kibikwa rimwe gusa.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp4: Ibikorwa bya CRUD: Kurema (INSERT), Soma (GUHITAMO), Kuvugurura (AMAKURU), Gusiba (DELETE) - ibikorwa bine byibanze byububiko.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_task: Tegura ububiko bworoshye bwibitabo byishuri (ibitabo, abanyeshuri, inguzanyo). Sobanura byibuze imbonerahamwe 3, imirima yabo, nubusabane. Noneho andika ikibazo cya SQL kugirango ubone ibitabo byose kuri ubu kuguriza indangamuntu y'abanyeshuri 42.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_desc: Umuyoboro uhuza mudasobwa kugirango dusangire amakuru nibikoresho. Interineti numuyoboro munini kwisi - umuyoboro. Kumva uburyo amakuru agenda (protocole, aderesi ya IP, DNS) nuburyo irinzwe (encryption, firewalls) ni ngombwa mugihe cya digitale.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp0: LAN (Umuyoboro waho): ihuza ibikoresho mukarere gato. WAN (Umuyoboro mugari): ihuza LAN intera ndende - interineti ni WAN.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp1: Aderesi ya IP: ikirango cyihariye cyumubare kuri buri gikoresho kuri neti (urugero: 192.168.1.1 kuri IPv4). DNS isobanura amazina ya domaine (google.com) kuri aderesi ya IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp2: TCP / IP protocole suite: Porotokole yo kugenzura ihererekanyabubasha yemeza ko paki zamakuru zigera neza; Interineti Porotokole ibayobora.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp3: HTTP (HyperText Transfer Protocol) yohereza paji y'urubuga. HTTPS yongeraho ibanga rya TLS - igishushanyo cya paji yerekana isano yawe ihishe.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp4: Guhindura paki: amakuru agabanyijemo udupaki, buriwese ugenda wigenga kurusobe, hanyuma ugahurira aho ujya.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_task: Kurikirana uko bigenda iyo wanditse 'www.urugero.com' muri mushakisha hanyuma ukande Enter - kuva DNS kureba kugeza wakiriye urubuga. Vuga buri protocole n'intambwe irimo.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_desc: Imvugo nubuhanga bwo gutumanaho kwemeza - gukoresha imvugo neza kugirango umenyeshe, ujijure, cyangwa ushishikarize abumva. Impaka zirakwigisha kubaka ibitekerezo byumvikana, bishingiye ku bimenyetso no kumenya no kurwanya ibitekerezo bidakomeye. Ubu buhanga ni ngombwa mu mpaka, inyandiko, imiburanishirize y'imanza, n'ubuzima bw'abaturage.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp0: Uburyo butatu bwa Aristote bwo kwemeza: Ethos (kwizerwa kubavuga), Pathos (kwiyambaza amarangamutima), Logos (ibitekerezo byumvikana nibimenyetso).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp1: Impaka zikomeye zifite: ikirego gisobanutse (theisis), gishyigikira impamvu, ibimenyetso, nigisubizo kubivuguruza.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp2: Ibinyoma byumvikana bitesha agaciro impaka: ad hominem (kwibasira umuntu), umuntu wibyatsi (kuvuga nabi ibitekerezo bivuguruzanya), gutandukanya ibinyoma (amahitamo abiri gusa yatanzwe).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp3: Ibitekerezo bikuraho biva mumahame rusange bigera kumyanzuro yihariye (abantu bose barapfa; Socrate numuntu; niyo mpamvu Socrate ipfa).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp4: Gutekereza gushishoza gukura imyanzuro rusange mubitekerezo byihariye - birakomeye ariko birashobora kwibeshya niba ingero zidahagarariwe.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_task: Soma igitekerezo cyikinyamakuru. Menya ikirego nyamukuru, ibice bitatu byibimenyetso bifatika, ababigenewe, hamwe no kwibeshya (niba bihari). Noneho andika ijambo-200-contre-argument ukoresheje uburyo butatu bwa Aristote.
learnSch_history_f2_desc: Ibihe bigezweho byahinduye isi binyuze mubushakashatsi, impinduramatwara, ninganda. Kwaguka kw’ibihugu by’i Burayi byahuzaga imigabane, Ukumurikirwa kwamaganaga imigenzo n’impamvu, impinduramatwara ishingiye kuri demokarasi yahinduye guverinoma, kandi Impinduramatwara mu nganda yahinduye uko abantu babayeho n’imirimo - bashiraho urufatiro rw’isi ya none.
learnSch_history_f2_kp0: Imyaka y'Ubushakashatsi (1400s - 1600s): Ibihugu by'i Burayi (Porutugali, Espagne, Ubwongereza, Ubuholandi) byerekeje muri Amerika, Afurika, na Aziya, bishyiraho imiyoboro y'ubucuruzi ku isi n'ubwami bwa gikoloni.
learnSch_history_f2_kp1: Impinduramatwara ya siyansi no kumurikirwa (1600 - 1700s): abatekereza nka Galileo, Newton, Locke, na Voltaire bakoresheje ibitekerezo no kwitegereza kugira ngo bahangane n'ubuyobozi bw'itorero n'imbaraga gakondo.
learnSch_history_f2_kp2: Impinduramatwara y'Abanyamerika (1776) na Revolution y'Abafaransa (1789): ihumekewe n'ibitekerezo byo kumurikirwa, abakoloni n'abaturage bahiritse ingoma ya cyami kugira ngo bashyireho uburenganzira, itegeko nshinga, n'ubusugire rusange.
learnSch_history_f2_kp3: Impinduramatwara mu nganda (1760s - 1850s): yatangiriye mu Bwongereza - amakara, moteri y’amashanyarazi, inganda, na gari ya moshi byahinduye imiryango ishingiye ku buhinzi mu bukungu bw’imijyi.
learnSch_history_f2_kp4: Ubukoloni: Ibihugu by’i Burayi byakolonije Afurika, Aziya, na Amerika - gukuramo umutungo, kwimura abaturage, no gusiga ingaruka za politiki n’umuco ndende.
learnSch_history_f2_task: Hitamo ibyabaye kuva 1500–1900 (urugero: Revolution y'Abafaransa). Sobanura: (a) impamvu eshatu, (b) ibintu bibiri by'ingenzi, (c) ingaruka ebyiri z'igihe kirekire. Koresha amatariki yihariye n'abantu.
learnSch_history_f3_desc: Ikinyejana cya 20 cyazanye intambara z'isi, igitugu, ubukoloni, n'intambara y'ubutita - bivugurura ibihugu byose byo ku isi. Byari kandi ikinyejana cyiterambere ritangaje: gutsindwa kwa fashisme, kuzamuka kwuburenganzira bwa muntu, kugwa ukwezi, hamwe na revolution ya digitale. Gusobanukirwa ni ngombwa gusobanukirwa isi yiki gihe.
learnSch_history_f3_kp0: Intambara ya Mbere y'Isi Yose (1914–1918): yatewe n'iyicwa rya Archduke Franz Ferdinand; biterwa no gukunda igihugu, imperialism, militarism, hamwe na sisitemu yubufatanye. ~ Miliyoni 17 zapfuye.
learnSch_history_f3_kp1: Intambara ya Kabiri y'Isi Yose (1939–1945): Ubudage bw'Abanazi, Ubutaliyani bw'Abafashisite, n'Ubuyapani bw'Ingoma kurwanya Abayoboke. Itsembabwoko ryishe Abayahudi miliyoni 6. Byarangiye na bombe atomike kuri Hiroshima na Nagasaki.
learnSch_history_f3_kp2: Intambara y'ubutita (1947–1991): guhatanira ingengabitekerezo na geopolitike hagati ya USA (capitalism, demokarasi) na SSSR (communism). Intambara za porokisi, Isiganwa ry’ikirere, isiganwa ry’intwaro za kirimbuzi, n’urukuta rwa Berlin byagabanije isi.
learnSch_history_f3_kp3: Decolonisation (1945–1975): ibikorwa byubwigenge muri Afrika, Aziya, no muburasirazuba bwo hagati byarangije ubwami bwabakoloni bwi Burayi. Akenshi biherekejwe namakimbirane no guhungabana.
learnSch_history_f3_kp4: Umuryango w’abibumbye washinze 1945 kubungabunga amahoro; Itangazo mpuzamahanga ry’uburenganzira bwa muntu ryemejwe 1948 - byombi ibisubizo bitaziguye ku mahano ya WWII.
learnSch_history_f3_task: Gereranya ibitera n'ingaruka za WWI na WWII. Kora imbonerahamwe hamwe: Impamvu nyamukuru, Ingingo nyamukuru ihinduka, Umubare wabantu bapfuye, Ingaruka zikomeye. Noneho sobanura uburyo WWII yayoboye mu buryo butaziguye Intambara y'ubutita.
learnSch_history_f4_desc: Amateka ntabwo ari amatariki nibyabaye gusa - ni ugusobanura ibimenyetso. Abahanga mu by'amateka basesengura inkomoko y'ibanze (inyandiko z'umwimerere, ibihangano) n'amasoko ya kabiri (ibitabo, biografiya) kugira ngo bongere kubaka ibyahise. Kwiga gusuzuma neza inkomoko bikugira umushakashatsi mwiza, utekereza, numuturage.
learnSch_history_f4_kp0: Inkomoko yibanze: yaremye mugihe cyibirori (ikarita, ifoto, amasezerano, ikinyamakuru). Inkomoko yinyongera: yaremye nyuma, isobanura inkomoko yibanze (biografiya, documentaire, igitabo).
learnSch_history_f4_kp1: Isesengura rya SOAPS: Inkomoko, Ibihe, Abumva, Intego, Ingingo - urwego rwo gusobanukirwa inyandiko zose zamateka.
learnSch_history_f4_kp2: Kwizerwa ningirakamaro: isoko ibogamye irashobora kuba ingirakamaro nkibimenyetso byibyo umwanditsi yizeraga cyangwa ibyo kwamamaza byariho icyo gihe.
learnSch_history_f4_kp3: Impamvu nisano: gusa kuberako ibintu bibiri bibera hamwe ntabwo bivuze ko kimwe cyateye ikindi. Abahanga mu by'amateka bashakisha ibimenyetso bifatika.
learnSch_history_f4_kp4: Amateka ni ubushakashatsi bwukuntu amateka yanditse kandi agasobanurwa. Ibintu bimwe (urugero: Revolution y'Abafaransa) birashobora kubonwa muburyo butandukanye nabanyamateka batandukanye.
learnSch_history_f4_task: Shakisha imvugo cyangwa ibaruwa kuva mugihe icyo aricyo cyose. Koresha isesengura rya SOAPS. Suzuma ubwizerwe bwayo (suzuma umwanya wumwanditsi nintego) ningirakamaro (ni ibihe bibazo byamateka bifasha gusubiza?).
learnSch_geography_f2_desc: Ikarita nibikoresho bikomeye byerekana amakuru yumwanya. Igishushanyo ni siyanse nubuhanzi bwo gukora amakarita. Kuva ku bisate by'ibumba bya kera kugeza amashusho ya GPS, amakarita yayoboye ubushakashatsi, akora politiki, kandi yumvikanisha isi yacu. Gusoma no gukora amakarita nubuhanga bwibanze bwa geografiya.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp0: Igipimo: ikigereranyo kiri hagati yikarita nintera nyayo-yisi. Ikarita yerekana igipimo cya 1: 50.000 bisobanura cm 1 = 500 m.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp1: Imirongo ya grid: imirongo yuburinganire (itambitse, ipima amajyaruguru / amajyepfo) nuburebure (vertical, gupima iburasirazuba / iburengerazuba) neza neza ahantu hose ku isi.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp2: Imirongo ikubiyemo ihuza ingingo zingana; intera yegeranye cyane = ahantu hahanamye; umwanya munini = ahantu horoheje.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp3: Ikarita yerekana ikarita igoreka isi igoramye ku ikarita iringaniye. Mercator projection ibika imiterere ariko igoreka ubunini; Peters projection ibika agace ariko igoreka imiterere.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp4: GIS (Sisitemu yamakuru ya geografiya) ishyiraho amakuru menshi (abaturage, imikoreshereze yubutaka, ikirere) ku ikarita ya sisitemu yo gusesengura no gufata ibyemezo.
learnSch_geography_f2_task: Ukoresheje ikarita ya topografiya (cyangwa ushushanya ibyawe), menya: (a) ahantu hahanamye, (b) ikibaya, (c) umusozi. Andika imibare 6 ya grid yerekanwe kumurongo. Kubara intera nyayo yinzira ya cm 4 kurikarita 1: 50.000.
learnSch_geography_f3_desc: Ikirere nikigihe gito cyikirere; ikirere ni ikigereranyo kirekire. Ibihe by'ikirere by'isi - kuva mu turere dushyuha kugera kuri polar - bigizwe n'uburinganire, imigezi y'inyanja, ubutumburuke, n'umuyaga wiganje. Gusobanukirwa gahunda y’ikirere ni ingenzi mu buhinzi, gutegura ibiza, no guhangana n’imihindagurikire y’ikirere.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp0: Ibintu bigira ingaruka ku kirere: uburebure (inguni yizuba), ubutumburuke (ubushyuhe bugabanuka ~ 6.5 ° C kuri m 1000), intera iri hagati yinyanja, imigezi yinyanja, umuyaga wiganje.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp1: Ikirere gishyuha: umwaka ushushe kandi utose, hafi ya ekwateri. Mediterane: icyi cyumye gishyushye, ubukonje bworoheje. Inkingi: imbeho ihoraho, imvura nkeya.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp2: Imvura yimbere: imbaga yubushyuhe nubukonje ihura; umwuka ushyushye uzamuka hejuru yubukonje, ubukonje, hamwe na kondegene. Bikunze kugaragara hagati (UK, Ubudage).
learnSch_geography_f3_kp3: Inzinguzingu y'amazi: guhumeka → kwegeranya (gushiraho ibicu) → imvura → hejuru yubutaka / gucengera → gusubira kumuka.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp4: Imihindagurikire y’ibihe: kuzamuka kwa CO₂ gukaza ingufu za parike, bigatera ubushyuhe bw’isi, ibihe by’ikirere bikabije, kuzamuka kw’inyanja, hamwe n’imihindagurikire y’ikirere.
learnSch_geography_f3_task: Gereranya ikirere cyaho gashyuha gashyuha gashyuha nubutayu. Kuri buri: leta isobanura ubushyuhe bwumwaka, imvura yumwaka, ibitera, hamwe n’imihindagurikire ibiri y’ibinyabuzima biba.
learnSch_economics_f2_desc: Ubucuruzi mpuzamahanga butuma ibihugu byihariye mubyo bitanga umusaruro neza no gucuruza mubindi byose. Kuba isi ihinduka - kwiyongera kw’ubukungu, imico, n’abantu - byakuye miliyoni amagana mu bukene ariko binateza ubusumbane n’ibibazo by’ibidukikije.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp0: Inyungu igereranya: igihugu kigomba kuba inzobere mugukora ibicuruzwa aho amahirwe yacyo ari make, hanyuma ubucuruzi - nubwo byaba byiza muri byose.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp1: Ibyoherezwa mu mahanga: ibicuruzwa na serivisi bigurishwa mu mahanga (amafaranga yinjira mu gihugu). Ibitumizwa mu mahanga: ibicuruzwa na serivisi byaguzwe mu mahanga (gukoresha).
learnSch_economics_f2_kp2: Inzitizi z’ubucuruzi: amahoro (imisoro ku bicuruzwa bitumizwa mu mahanga), ibipimo (imipaka itumizwa mu mahanga), embargo (kubuza byose) - kurinda inganda zo mu gihugu ariko kuzamura ibiciro ku baguzi.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp3: Amasezerano yubucuruzi ku buntu (urugero: Umuryango w’ubumwe bw’ibihugu by’Uburayi, NAFTA) ugabanya inzitizi hagati y’ibihugu bigize uyu muryango, kuzamura ubucuruzi n’iterambere ry’ubukungu.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp4: Impirimbanyi z'ubucuruzi: ibyoherezwa mu mahanga - ibitumizwa mu mahanga. Amafaranga arenga ku bucuruzi asobanura byinshi byoherezwa mu mahanga; icyuho cy'ubucuruzi bivuze ko byinshi bitumizwa mu mahanga.
learnSch_economics_f2_task: Igihugu A gishobora gutanga mudasobwa 100 CYANGWA toni 200 z'ingano ku mwaka. Igihugu B gishobora gutanga mudasobwa 60 CYANGWA toni 180 z'ingano. Erekana igihugu gifite inyungu zigereranya muri buri gicuruzwa hanyuma usobanure impamvu byombi byunguka ubuhanga nubucuruzi.
learnSch_economics_f3_desc: Imari yumuntu ku giti cye ikubiyemo imicungire ifatika yamafaranga: kwinjiza, kuzigama, gukoresha bije, kuguza, no gushora imari. Kumenya gukoresha amafaranga bigufasha kwirinda imitego yimyenda, kubaka ubutunzi, no gufata ibyemezo byuzuye mubuzima bwawe - kuva kumurimo wawe wambere kugeza ikiruhuko cyiza. Ubu buhanga ntibukunze kwigishwa ariko bukenewe hose.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp0: Bije igenera amafaranga yawe kubyo ukeneye (ubukode, ibiryo), ushaka (imyidagaduro), no kuzigama. Amategeko ya 50/30/20: 50% akeneye, 30% arashaka, kuzigama 20%.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp1: Inyungu zuzuye: inyungu zibonerwa inyungu nyamukuru hamwe ninyungu zegeranijwe. € 1.000 kuri 5% inyungu zingana zingana ziba € 1,629 nyuma yimyaka 10.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp2: Umwenda mwiza (inguzanyo, inguzanyo yabanyeshuri) urashobora kubaka ubutunzi cyangwa ubumenyi. Umwenda mubi (ikarita yinguzanyo yinyungu nyinshi, inguzanyo yo kwishyura) iragutezimbere mugihe cyo kwishyura.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp3: Ifaranga ryangiza imbaraga zo kugura: niba ifaranga ari 3% kandi amafaranga wizigamiye yinjiza 1%, amafaranga yawe atakaza agaciro nyako buri mwaka.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp4: Gutandukana: gukwirakwiza ishoramari mumitungo itandukanye (ububiko, ingwate, umutungo) bigabanya ingaruka - 'ntugashyire amagi yawe yose mugiseke kimwe'.
learnSch_economics_f3_task: Kora bije ya buri kwezi kubanyeshuri binjiza € 800 / ukwezi. Tanga amafaranga ukoresheje itegeko rya 50/30/20. Noneho ubare umubare € 500 ukura kugeza mumyaka 5 ku nyungu zingana na 4% yumwaka: A = P (1 + r) ^ n.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_desc: Inyanja ifite 71% by'ubuso bw'isi kandi ikagenga ikirere, ikabyara ogisijeni, kandi igashyigikira ibinyabuzima bidasanzwe. Ukuzenguruka kwamazi guhora kwimura amazi hagati yinyanja, ikirere, nubutaka, bigatuma isi umubumbe umwe rukumbi ufite amazi meza hejuru yacyo - ibintu byingenzi mubuzima.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp0: Inzinguzingo y'amazi: guhumeka (amazi ya gaze, atwarwa ningufu zizuba) → kondegene (gaze kumatonyanga, gukora ibicu) → imvura (imvura, shelegi) → gutemba no kwinjira → gusubira mubyuka.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp1: Inyanja ibika ubushyuhe nikirere giciriritse: bikurura CO₂ nubushyuhe buturuka ku zuba, bikarekura buhoro kandi bikabije ubushyuhe bukabije.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp2: Imigezi yo mu nyanja (urugero: Ikigobe cya Stream) ihererekanya ubushyuhe kwisi yose, gushyuha cyangwa gukonjesha uturere two ku nkombe kure ya ekwateri.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp3: Acide acide yo mu nyanja: nkuko CO₂ ishonga mumazi yinyanja ikora aside ya karubone (H₂CO₃), igabanya pH ikanabangamira amabuye ya korali na shellfish.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp4: Amazi yo mu butaka: amazi abitswe mu mazi yo munsi. Gukuramo birenze urugero bigabanya amazi yihuta kuruta uko yishyuza - ikibazo cy’umutekano w’amazi ugenda wiyongera ku isi.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_task: Shushanya kandi wandike byuzuye uruziga rw'amazi. Kuri buri cyiciro, vuga inzira yumubiri irimo (guhumeka, kondegene, nibindi) nisoko yingufu zibitwara. Noneho sobanura ibikorwa bibiri byabantu bihungabanya uruziga rwamazi.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_desc: Ibyago kamere - umutingito, ibirunga, tsunami, ibihuhusi - bituruka ku mbaraga zo mu isi no mu kirere. Gusobanukirwa n'impamvu zabo, gukwirakwiza, n'ingaruka zituma societe zitegura, kugabanya ibyangiritse, no kurokora ubuzima. Ibyago ku baturage babiterwa ahanini nimpamvu zubukungu nubukungu nkuko biterwa numubiri ubwayo.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp0: Umutingito ubera ku mbibi za tectonic (konservateur, zangiza, zubaka). Ubunini bwa Richter / umwanya bipima kurekura ingufu; buri gice = × inshuro 32 imbaraga nyinshi.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp1: Ibirunga bibera muri subduction zone (ibisasu biturika, lava viscous lava) no ahantu hashyushye / imbibi zubaka (effusive, runva lava, urugero nka Islande, Hawaii).
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp2: Tsunami ni inyanja nini yo mu nyanja iterwa na nyamugigima yo mu nyanja cyangwa iruka ry’ibirunga. Tsunami yo mu nyanja y'Abahinde 2004 yahitanye abantu ~ 230.000.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp3: Ubushyuhe bwo mu turere dushyuha (serwakira / tifuni) hejuru y'amazi ashyushye yo mu nyanja (≥26 ° C). Bazana umuyaga ukabije, inkubi y'umuyaga, n'umwuzure.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp4: Intege nke z’ibiza biterwa nubukene, kubaka ireme, sisitemu zo kuburira, n’imiyoborere - ibihugu bikennye birababara cyane.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_task: Gereranya ibitera n'ingaruka z'umutingito ukomeye (urugero: Haiti 2010) n'iruka rikomeye ry'ibirunga (urugero: Umusozi wa Pinatubo 1991). Koresha imbonerahamwe: Impamvu, Ubunini, Ingaruka Zibanze, Ingaruka Yisumbuye, Igisubizo cyabantu.
learnSch_health_f2_desc: Imfashanyo yambere nubufasha bwihuse buhabwa umuntu wakomeretse cyangwa urwaye mbere yubuvuzi bwumwuga butaragera. Kumenya ubufasha bwambere burokora ubuzima - harimo n '' urunigi rwo kubaho 'mu gufata umutima. Ubumenyi bwumutekano ku giti cyawe bufasha gukumira impanuka, kumenya akaga, no gufata ibyemezo byiza mugihe cyihutirwa.
learnSch_health_f2_kp0: Ubushakashatsi bwibanze (ABCDE): Umuhanda, Guhumeka, Kuzenguruka, Ubumuga (urwego rwimitekerereze), Guhura (ibikomere bigaragara).
learnSch_health_f2_kp1: CPR (Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation): kwikuramo igituza 30 kuri cm 5-6 z'uburebure na ~ 100-120 kumunota, hanyuma guhumeka 2. Subiramo kugeza igihe ubufasha bugereye.
learnSch_health_f2_kp2: Umwanya wo gukira: kumuntu utazi ubwenge ariko uhumeka - birinda kuniga kuruka kandi bigakomeza guhumeka.
learnSch_health_f2_kp3: Kubitwikwa: bikonje munsi y'amazi akonje muminota 10. Ntukoreshe urubura, amavuta, cyangwa amenyo. Gupfukirana imyenda isukuye idafite isuku.
learnSch_health_f2_kp4: Hamagara serivisi zubutabazi: vuga aho uherereye, imiterere yihutirwa, numubare wabantu bahuye nacyo. Guma kumurongo kandi ukurikize amabwiriza.
learnSch_health_f2_task: Andika intambwe ku ntambwe yo kuyobora kugirango usubize umuntu waguye kandi utitabira. Shyiramo: kugenzura umutekano, gusuzuma ubwenge, guhamagarira ubufasha, intambwe za CPR, nigihe cyo guhagarara. Shyiramo imibare igereranijwe (igipimo cyo kwikuramo, ubujyakuzimu).
learnSch_arts_f1_desc: Abahanzi bahitamo muburyo butandukanye bwubuhanga nibikoresho - gushushanya, gushushanya, gucapa, gushushanya, ibihangano bya digitale - buri kimwe gifite imico nikoreshwa. Gusobanukirwa ibitangazamakuru bitandukanye byubuhanzi bigufasha guhitamo igikoresho cyiza kubushake bwawe bwubuhanzi, kandi ukubaka amagambo yo kuganira no gusuzuma ibihangano neza.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp0: Gushushanya itangazamakuru: ikaramu (grafite), amakara, wino - buri kimwe gitanga umurongo utandukanye, imiterere, nimiterere. Uburyo bwo gutanga igicucu: guswera, gutambuka, guhuza, kuvanga.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp1: Ibitangazamakuru byo gusiga amarangi: ibara ryamazi (mucyo, ahantu hakeye hasigaye irangi), acrike (ishingiye kumazi, gukama vuba, guhuza byinshi), amavuta (gukama buhoro-buhoro, ibara ryiza, tekinike gakondo yo gusiga).
learnSch_arts_f1_kp2: Gucapa: icapiro ryubutabazi (linocut - guca kure kugirango ushireho igishushanyo), icapiro rya ecran, etching - ibyapa byinshi bisa kuva matrike imwe.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp3: Igishusho: inyongera (kwerekana ibumba, guteranya), gukuramo (kubaza ibuye cyangwa ibiti), guta (umuringa, resin). Ubuhanzi bwo kwishyiriraho bukoresha umwanya ubwawo nkigikoresho.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp4: Ibikoresho byubuhanzi bwa digitale (Procreate, Photoshop, Blender) bigana kandi bikagura tekinike gakondo - ibice, guswera, hamwe no kwerekana imiterere ya 3D - ariko bisaba ubumenyi bwamahame amwe.
learnSch_arts_f1_task: Hitamo ibihangano bimwe hamwe nubuhanzi bumwe utigeze ukoresha mbere. Kora ubushakashatsi ku miterere yacyo, hanyuma ukore ubushakashatsi ukoresheje ubwo buryo. Andika amagambo 150 asuzuma icyakoze, icyari kigoye, nuburyo uburyo bwagize ingaruka kubisubizo.
learnSch_arts_f2_desc: Ibara nikintu gikomeye cyane kigaragara - gikangura amarangamutima, kigakora ubujyakuzimu, kandi kiyobora ijisho ryabareba. Ibara ryamabara asobanura isano iri hagati yamabara nuburyo bwo kuyikoresha nkana. Kuva kumuziga wamabara kugeza optique ivanze, kumenya ibara bihindura ingaruka zubuhanzi ubwo aribwo bwose.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp0: Amabara y'ibanze (RYB yo gusiga irangi: umutuku, umuhondo, ubururu) ntashobora gukorwa mukuvanga. Amabara yisumbuye (orange, icyatsi, umutuku) bikozwe muri primaire ebyiri.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp1: Amabara yuzuye yicara ahateganye kuruziga rwamabara (urugero: umutuku - icyatsi, ubururu - orange). Bishyizwe hamwe kuruhande bongera ingufu; kuvanga barabogama kumururu / umukara.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp2: Ubushyuhe bwamabara: amabara ashyushye (umutuku, amacunga, umuhondo) yumva afite imbaraga kandi atera imbere muburyo bugaragara. Amabara akonje (ubururu, icyatsi, ibara ry'umuyugubwe) yumva atuje kandi asubira inyuma.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp3: Ibara = ibara + ryera (ryoroshye). Igicucu = ibara + umukara (umwijima). Ijwi = ibara + imvi. Ibi birema urwego rwagaciro mubikorwa byubuhanzi.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp4: Ibishushanyo bisa byamabara (amabara yegeranye) arema ubwuzuzanye. Gahunda ya Triadic (amabara atatu aringaniye) arema itandukaniro rikomeye. Monochromatic ikoresha hue imwe mumico itandukanye.
learnSch_arts_f2_task: Kora uruziga rw'ibara rwerekana amabara 12 yose (3 primaire, 3 yisumbuye, 6 ya kaminuza). Noneho shushanya cyangwa ushushanye ibice bibiri bito kuruhande ukoresheje ikuzuzanya hanyuma usobanure ingaruka ziboneka. Andika hamwe na: ibara, igicucu, nijwi ryibara rimwe.
learnSch_music_f1_desc: Ibikoresho bya muzika kwisi bishyizwe mumiryango nukuntu bitanga amajwi. Injyana ya muzika - kuva kera kugeza jazz kugeza hip-hop - yerekana umuco, amateka, n'imibereho. Kumenya ibikoresho nubwoko biguha amagambo yingirakamaro hamwe no gushima byimazeyo umuziki nkubuhanzi buzima, bugenda butera imbere.
learnSch_music_f1_kp0: Imiryango y'ibikoresho: imirya (gucuranga, gucuranga, gucuranga - gucuranga inanga), inkwi (umwironge, Clarinet - kunyeganyeza ikirere), umuringa (impanda, trombone - iminwa ivuza induru), gucuranga (ingoma, xylofone - gukubita), clavier (piyano, urugingo - uburyo bwinshi).
learnSch_music_f1_kp1: Ibice bya Orchestre: imirya, inkwi, imiringa, percussion. Umuyobozi uhuza ibice byose akoresheje ibimenyetso na batoni.
learnSch_music_f1_kp2: Umuziki wa kera (1750–1820): imiterere yubatswe (sonata, simfoni, igitaramo), abahimbyi nka Mozart, Haydn, Beethoven. Umuziki w'urukundo (1820–1900): imvugo irangwa n'amarangamutima, orchestre nini, Brahms, Tchaikovsky, Wagner.
learnSch_music_f1_kp3: Jazz (1900s, inkomoko nyafurika-Amerika): impvisisation, syncopation, injyana ya swing. Sub-genres: bebop, jazz nziza, fusion. Ubururu: guhamagara-no-kwitaba, ifishi ya 12-bar.
learnSch_music_f1_kp4: Pop na rock (1950s–): gitari y'amashanyarazi, bass, ingoma, amajwi. Hip-hop (1970, Bronx NY): DJ, gutoranya, kuririmba, gucamo ibice - umuco wuzuye.
learnSch_music_f1_task: Umva igice kimwe muri buri bwoko bubiri butandukanye (urugero: Symphony ya Beethoven n'indirimbo ya blues). Kuri buri: menya ibikoresho byakoreshejwe, umuvuduko, imbaraga, imiterere, hamwe numuziki umwe wihariye kuri iyo njyana. Gereranya no kumeza.
learnSch_music_f2_desc: Amateka yumuziki akurikirana uburyo imiterere yumuziki, ibikoresho, nibitekerezo byahindutse mugihe cyibinyejana n'imico. Kuva mu ndirimbo ya Geregori kugeza kuri Beethoven kugeza kuri muzika yo kubyina hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga, buri gihe kigaragaza indangagaciro z'umuryango wacyo, ikoranabuhanga, ndetse n'isi. Gusobanukirwa amateka yumuziki byongera gushimira no gushyira umuziki wubu murwego.
learnSch_music_f2_kp0: Hagati (500–1400): Indirimbo ya Geregori (monophonic, umuziki w'ijwi utajyanye n'itorero). Renaissance (1400–1600): polyphony (ibice byinshi byigenga byijwi); umuziki w'isi uragaragara.
learnSch_music_f2_kp1: Baroque (1600–1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. Ornate point point, basso continuo, form: fugue, suite, oratorio. Opera yahimbwe muri Florence (~ 1600).
learnSch_music_f2_kp2: Igihe cyakera (1750–1820): kuringaniza, gusobanuka, iterambere rya simfoni, imiterere ya sonata, umugozi wa kane. Mozart, Haydn, Beethoven kare.
learnSch_music_f2_kp3: Ibihe by'abakundana (1820–1900): ubukana bw'amarangamutima, umuziki wa porogaramu (uvuga inkuru), gukunda igihugu (Grieg, Sibelius, Dvořák), orchestre yagutse cyane.
learnSch_music_f2_kp4: Ikinyejana cya 20: Modernism (Stravinsky, sisitemu ya tone 12 ya Schoenberg), Jazz Age, Revolution & Roll revolution (1950s), minimalism (Philip Glass), na revolution ya digitale ikora umuziki wa elegitoroniki na mudasobwa.
learnSch_music_f2_task: Kora ingengabihe yumuziki wiburengerazuba kuva 500 GC kugeza ubu. Kuri buri gihe: andika izina, amatariki, abahimbyi / abahanzi babiri, ikintu kimwe cyingenzi cyumuziki, nigikoresho kimwe kiranga cyangwa imiterere. Shushanya cyangwa utondeke igice kimwe cyumuziki muri buri gihe.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_desc: Imikino yamakipe itezimbere ubuhanga bwumubiri, gutekereza kubitekerezo, itumanaho, nubuyobozi. Yaba umupira, basketball, volley ball, cyangwa umupira wamaguru - buriwese arasaba gusobanukirwa amategeko, imyanya, ningamba zamakipe. Kwiga gusoma umukino no gufata ibyemezo byihuse ningirakamaro nkubushobozi bwumubiri.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp0: Itumanaho: guhamagarira umupira, gutegura izamu, no gutera inkunga bagenzi bacu nibyingenzi nkubuhanga bwa tekinike mumikino yamakipe.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp1: Amayeri mumupira wamaguru: gushiraho (4-4-2, 4-3-3) byerekana uko abakinnyi bahagaze. Kanda hejuru yikibuga na defence yimbitse bitandukanye nuburyo bufatika.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp2: Gufata ibyemezo: abakinnyi beza bahora basikana ibidukikije, bateganya igikurikira, bagahitamo inzira ifasha ikipe aho kwerekana ubuhanga bwa buri muntu.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp3: Amategeko abaho kuburinganire n'umutekano. Gusobanukirwa amategeko ya offside (umupira wamaguru), ecran zitemewe (basketball), cyangwa amakosa yo kuzunguruka (volley ball) birinda amakosa nibihano.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp4: Ubuyobozi no gukora siporo: abakapiteni bashishikarizwa kandi baganira; abakinnyi bose bubaha abo bahanganye, abasifuzi, nibisubizo - indangagaciro zingenzi za siporo.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_task: Hitamo siporo yikipe ukina cyangwa ureba. Tegura imyitozo yo kunoza ubuhanga bumwe bwihariye (urugero: gutsindira ukuri mumupira wamaguru). Leta: ubuhanga bugenewe, ibikoresho bikenewe, amabwiriza yimyitozo, uburyo byakomera, nuburyo bwo gusuzuma iterambere.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_desc: Ubuzima bwiza burenze imyitozo ngororamubiri - ikubiyemo ubuzima bwo mu mutwe, ibitotsi, imirire, imibanire myiza, hamwe no gucunga ibibazo. Imibereho myiza ishingiye kubikorwa bisanzwe, kurya neza, gusinzira bihagije, nubusabane bwiza birinda indwara zidakira kandi bifasha ubuzima bwiza mubuzima bwose.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp0: OMS irasaba iminota 150-300 y'ibikorwa byo mu kirere giciriritse buri cyumweru kubantu bakuru (urugero kugenda byihuse, gusiganwa ku magare) cyangwa iminota 75 y'ibikorwa bikomeye.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp1: Gusinzira: ingimbi zikenera amasaha 8-10 nijoro. Gusinzira bidahagije bibuza guhuza kwibuka, kumererwa neza, imikorere yumubiri, nigihe cyo kubyitwaramo.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp2: Uburyo bwo gucunga ibibazo: imyitozo ngororamubiri, gutekereza, guhumeka cyane, gucunga igihe, no kuvugana numuntu wizewe byose ni inzira zishingiye kubimenyetso.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp3: Igihe cyo kwerekana: gukoresha cyane (cyane cyane imbuga nkoranyambaga nijoro) bihagarika ibitotsi kandi bifitanye isano no guhangayika no kwiyubaha gake mubyangavu. Imipaka ya digitale nimbibi bifasha.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp4: Kumenya ibiyobyabwenge: inzoga n'itabi biremewe ariko byangiza - inzoga zangiza umwijima n'ubwonko; kunywa itabi bitera kanseri y'ibihaha n'indwara z'umutima. Byombi byangiza cyane umubiri ukura.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_task: Shiraho gahunda yo kwinezeza ya buri cyumweru. Shyiramo: Imyitozo 5 yimyitozo ngororamubiri (ubwoko, igihe bimara, ubukana), gahunda yo gusinzira, tekinike 3 yo gucunga ibibazo, n'intego 2 zimirire. Tekereza ku gace gakeneye gutera imbere nimpamvu.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_tp2: Ubuzima bwa digitale no kumenya ibintu
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_desc: Imyitwarire ya filozofiya irabaza: dukwiye gukora dute? Niki gituma igikorwa cyiza cyangwa kibi? Uburyo butatu bwingenzi bwimyitwarire - ingaruka, deontologiya, hamwe nimyitwarire myiza - bitanga ibisubizo bitandukanye. Gushyira mu bikorwa ibyo bibazo mubibazo byisi (euthanasiya, ubutabera bwikirere, AI) biteza imbere ibitekerezo byumvikana, byubatswe.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp0: Ingaruka (Utilitarianism - Mill, Bentham): igikorwa nukuri niba gitanga umunezero mwinshi kubantu benshi. Ingaruka zerekana imyitwarire.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp1: Deontologiya (Kant): ibikorwa bimwe nibyiza imbere cyangwa bibi, tutitaye ku ngaruka. Icyiciro cya Imperator: kora gusa amategeko ushobora kuba amategeko rusange.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp2: Imyitwarire myiza (Aristote): wibande ku mico kuruta amategeko cyangwa ibisubizo. Umuntu ufite imico myiza yatsimbataje ingeso zubutwari, kuba inyangamugayo, ubutabera, no kwitonda.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp3: Imyitwarire iboneye: imyitwarire iratandukanye hagati yimico nabantu - ntamahame rusange. Imyitwarire idahwitse: ibikorwa bimwe burigihe nibyiza cyangwa bibi utitaye kumuco.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp4: Imyitwarire ikoreshwa isuzuma impaka zihariye: imyitwarire yubuvuzi (euthanasiya, gukuramo inda), imyitwarire y’ibidukikije (inshingano kuri kamere muntu), n’imyitwarire ya AI (intwaro zigenga, ubuzima bwite).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_task: Koresha buri kimwe mu bintu bitatu by'ingenzi (utilitarianism, deontologiya, imyitwarire myiza) kuri iki kibazo: 'Ese ni ukubeshya kubeshya kugirango urinde ibyiyumvo by'umuntu?' Kuri buri wese, vuga ihame shingiro ryibanze nigisubizo cyacyo.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_desc: Uburenganzira bwa muntu ni uburenganzira rusange buri muntu afite, hatitawe ku bwenegihugu, igitsina, ubwoko, cyangwa idini. Itangazo mpuzamahanga ry’uburenganzira bwa muntu (1948) ribashyira mu mategeko mpuzamahanga. Ubwenegihugu bw'isi bisobanura kumva uburenganzira bwawe n'inshingano zawe mu isi ifitanye isano no gufata ingamba z'ejo hazaza heza, harambye.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp0: Itangazo mpuzamahanga ry’uburenganzira bwa muntu (UDHR, 1948) rifite ingingo 30 zikubiyemo uburenganzira bw’abaturage, politiki, ubukungu, imibereho myiza n’umuco - ishingiro ry’amategeko mpuzamahanga arengera uburenganzira bwa muntu.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp1: Uburenganzira bwo mu gisekuru cya mbere: mbonezamubano na politiki (ijambo ryigenga, uburenganzira bwo kuburanishwa mu buryo buboneye, uburenganzira bwo gutora). Igisekuru cya kabiri: ubukungu n'imibereho myiza (uburenganzira bwo kwiga, ubuvuzi, akazi).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp2: Inzego z’uburenganzira bwa muntu: Akanama k’umuryango w’abibumbye gashinzwe uburenganzira bwa muntu, Urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha (rukurikirana ibyaha by’intambara n’ibyaha byibasiye inyokomuntu), Urukiko rw’Uburayi rw’Uburenganzira bwa Muntu.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp3: Uburenganzira bw'umwana: Amasezerano y’umuryango w’abibumbye y’uburenganzira bw’umwana (1989) yemeza uburenganzira bw’abana ku burezi, kurengera, kwivuza, no kubigiramo uruhare. Byemejwe n'ibihugu 196.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp4: Ubwenegihugu bw'isi: gufata ibyemezo ku isi (imihindagurikire y’ikirere, ubusumbane, amakimbirane) no gukorera mu karere ndetse no ku isi yose. Imiryango itegamiye kuri Leta (Amnesty International, Médecins Sans Frontières) ikubiyemo iri hame.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_task: Hitamo ingingo eshatu zo mu Itangazo Mpuzamahanga ry’Uburenganzira bwa Muntu. Kuri buri: vuga uburenganzira, tanga urugero-nyarwo aho ubu burenganzira bwahohotewe uyumunsi, kandi utange igitekerezo kimwe umuntu cyangwa leta yakora.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_desc: Imyitwarire nishami rya filozofiya itubaza uko tugomba kubaho no gukora. Filozofiya yimyitwarire isuzuma ishingiro ryindangagaciro zacu: icyiza, igikwiye, kandi dukwiye gufata dute abandi? Ibi bibazo ntabwo bisobanutse - bishimangira amategeko, ibyemezo byubuvuzi, iterambere rya AI, hamwe nuguhitamo kwa buri munsi.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp0: Imyifatire mbonezamubano: ukuri kwukuri kugenga kubaho kubaho utitaye kubyo umuntu atekereza. Imyitwarire irwanya realism: imyitwarire yubatswe nabantu, societe, cyangwa ni kwerekana amarangamutima gusa.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp1: Ikibazo cya trolley (Judith Jarvis Thomson / Philippa Ikirenge): wayobora trolley yahunze kugirango wice umuntu ukize batanu? Inzira zitandukanye zitanga ibisubizo bitandukanye.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp2: Ubutabera (Rawls): shushanya societe uhereye inyuma y '' umwenda wubujiji '- utazi umwanya wawe, uhitamo amategeko akwiye buri wese yakwemera.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp3: Iterambere ryimyitwarire: societe ihindura imyumvire yimyitwarire mugihe - ubucakara bwahoze bwemewe kandi bwemewe; iyicarubozo ryigeze gukoreshwa mu nkiko. Ibi bizamura: imyitwarire igereranije nigihe?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp4: Imyitwarire y’inyamaswa: Peter Singer's utilitarian argument ivuga ko kubabazwa ninyamaswa bifite agaciro kangana nububabare bwabantu. Ese? Niki gikurikira kuburyo turya n'ubushakashatsi?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_task: Gisesengura ikibazo cya trolley ukoresheje uburyo bubiri butandukanye. Ni ubuhe buryo buri rwego rwatanga inama? Noneho shushanya ibibazo byawe bwite kandi ubisesengure. Muganire niba hari igisubizo 'gikwiye' cyangwa ibisubizo byiza gusa.
learnSch_technology_f2_desc: Imashini za robo zihuza imashini yubukanishi, ibikoresho bya elegitoroniki, na progaramu yo gukora imashini zikora imirimo yigenga cyangwa igice cyigenga. Automation - gusimbuza imirimo yabantu nimashini - ihindura inganda, ubuvuzi, nubuzima bwa buri munsi. Gusobanukirwa na robo iragutegurira isi aho abantu n'imashini bigenda bikorana.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp0: Imashini zifite ibice bitatu byingenzi: sensor (kumenya ibidukikije), gukora (kwimuka no gukora), hamwe nu mugenzuzi (utunganya amakuru ya sensor kandi uhitamo ibikorwa - 'ubwonko').
learnSch_technology_f2_kp1: Impamyabumenyi y'ubwisanzure (DoF): umubare winzira zigenga robot ishobora kugenda. Ukuboko kwa robo ifite 6 DoF irashobora kugera kumwanya uwariwo wose hamwe nicyerekezo mumwanya wa 3D.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp2: Imashini zikoresha inganda: gusudira, gushushanya, guteranya mu nganda zimodoka. Imashini ikora (cobots) ikora neza hamwe nabantu. Imashini zo kubaga (Da Vinci) zemerera gukora neza.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp3: Ubwenge bwa artificiel (AI) butezimbere robot ifite icyerekezo (kumenya ibintu), gutunganya ururimi karemano (amategeko yijwi), no kwiga imashini (kunoza ubunararibonye).
learnSch_technology_f2_kp4: Automation nubukungu: robot yongera umusaruro ariko ikuraho imirimo imwe n'imwe. Imirimo mishya yashizweho mugutunganya robot, gutunganya, no gushushanya. Ingaruka nziza ziraganirwaho.
learnSch_technology_f2_task: Shushanya robot yoroshye kugirango ikore umurimo umwe wihariye (urugero: gutondekanya ibintu bisubirwamo). Sobanura: sensor ikenewe, actuator isabwa, kugenzura logique (flowchart cyangwa pseudocode), hamwe nuburyo bwo gutsindwa. Noneho muganire ku myitwarire imwe yerekeye gutangiza iki gikorwa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_desc: Sisitemu ya leta igena uko societe itunganijwe nuburyo imbaraga zitangwa. Demokarasi - gutegekwa n’abaturage - ifata uburyo bwinshi: butaziguye, uhagarariye, perezida, n’inteko ishinga amategeko. Kugereranya sisitemu bidufasha kumva impamvu ibihugu bimwe bihamye kandi byigenga mugihe ibindi bifite ubutware cyangwa bidahindagurika.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp0: Demokarasi: abaturage batora abahagarariye bashiraho amategeko mu izina ryabo. Amahame y'ingenzi: kugendera ku mategeko, gutandukanya ububasha, ubwisanzure mu gutanga ibitekerezo, ubucamanza bwigenga.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp1: Sisitemu ya Perezida (USA): umuyobozi (perezida) atorwa mu buryo butaziguye kandi atandukanye n'inteko ishinga amategeko. Gahunda yinteko ishinga amategeko (UK, Ubudage): umuyobozi akomoka kandi abazwa inteko.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp2: Gutandukanya ububasha: amategeko (ashyiraho amategeko), nyobozi (ashyira mu bikorwa amategeko), ubutabera (asobanura amategeko). Kugenzura no kuringaniza birinda ishami iryo ariryo ryose gukomera.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp3: Ubutegetsi bw'igitugu: ubutegetsi bwibanze mu muyobozi umwe cyangwa mu ishyaka ridafite inshingano za demokarasi nyayo (urugero: Koreya y'Amajyaruguru, Biyelorusiya). Ubutegetsi bwa Hybrid: amatora yabaye ariko ntabwo ari ubuntu cyangwa kurenganura.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp4: Leta: ifasi ifite abaturage bahoraho, guverinoma ikora neza, kandi yigenga. Amahanga arashobora kuba arimo amoko menshi; ibihugu-bihuza amoko nimbibi za politiki.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_task: Gereranya na politiki ya USA (perezida) n'Ubudage (inteko ishinga amategeko). Kuri buri wese: sobanura uburyo abayobozi batoranijwe, uko amategeko ashyirwaho, nibigenda bite iyo leta itakaje inkunga rusange. Utekereza ko ninde ufite inshingano zikomeye za demokarasi? Gutsindishiriza.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_desc: Amategeko mpuzamahanga agenga umubano hagati y’ibihugu kandi arengera uburenganzira bw’ibanze bw’abantu. Icyemezo cya nyuma y’Intambara ya Kabiri y'Isi Yose cyashyizeho Loni, Urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha, n'amasezerano ahuza ibihugu kubahiriza uburenganzira bwa muntu. Gusobanukirwa nizi nzego bigufasha gusuzuma uburyo isi yakira amakimbirane, akarengane, n’ibibazo by’ubutabazi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp0: Umuryango w’abibumbye (washinzwe 1945, ibihugu 193 bigize uyu muryango): ubungabunga amahoro n’umutekano mpuzamahanga, uteza imbere iterambere n’uburenganzira bwa muntu binyuze mu bigo 15 byihariye.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp1: Amategeko mpuzamahanga arengera ikiremwamuntu (Amasezerano y'i Jeneve): arengera abasivili, abasirikare bakomeretse, n’imfungwa z’intambara mu gihe cy’intambara. Kubirengaho ni icyaha cyintambara.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp2: Urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha (ICC, La Haye): rukurikirana abantu ku cyaha cya jenoside, ibyaha byibasiye inyokomuntu, n'ibyaha by'intambara igihe inkiko z'igihugu zananiwe kugira icyo zikora.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp3: Ubusugire nugutabara: ibihugu byigenga (nta kwivanga hanze mubibazo byimbere mu gihugu), ariko inyigisho ya 'Responsibility to Protect' (R2P) yemerera gutabara mugihe leta ikora amarorerwa rusange.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp4: Amategeko y’impunzi: Amasezerano y’impunzi yo mu 1951 asobanura ko impunzi ari umuntu uhunga ibitotezo bishingiye ku bwoko, idini, ubwenegihugu, ibitekerezo bya politiki, cyangwa itsinda ry’imibereho. Ibihugu ntibigomba kubasubiza mu kaga (kutongera).
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_task: Kora ubushakashatsi ku kibazo mpuzamahanga cyangwa vuba aha (urugero: amakimbirane cyangwa ubutabazi bwihutirwa). Menya: (a) amategeko mpuzamahanga akurikizwa, (b) ibikorwa Loni cyangwa ICC yakoze, (c) ingingo imwe n'imwe yo kwivanga mu gisirikare.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_desc: Uruhare rwa demokarasi ntirurenga gutora - bikubiyemo kwiyamamaza, gusaba, kwigaragambya, no kwiyamamariza umwanya. Sisitemu y’amatora igena uburyo amajwi ahinduka mu myanya no guhindura ibyavuye muri politiki. Gusobanukirwa uruhare bigufasha gukoresha uburenganzira bwawe no kumenya itandukaniro riri hagati ya demokarasi nzima no guhashya abatora.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp0: Sisitemu yo gutora: Ubwa mbere-Kera-The-Post (UK, USA) - umukandida ufite amajwi menshi yatsinze, akunda gutanga amashyaka abiri. Guhagararirwa (Ubudage, Ubuholandi) - amashyaka yatsindiye imyanya akurikije amajwi, ashishikariza amashyaka menshi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp1: Amashyaka ya politiki ategura abantu bafite ibitekerezo bisa byo guhatanira amatora no gushyiraho guverinoma. Ibumoso: uburinganire bukomeye, gutabara kwa leta. Iburyo: ubwisanzure bwa buri muntu, amasoko yubuntu. Hagati: imyanya iringaniye.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp2: Abitabiriye amatora baratandukanye: uruhare runini rwabaturage rushimangira demokarasi. Inzitizi zirimo: kwiyandikisha bigoye, ibisabwa indangamuntu y'itora, ibiro by'itora bitagerwaho, no gutenguha.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp3: Kwitabira kutitabira amatora: gusaba, imyigaragambyo, kutumvira kw'abaturage (kurenga ku mategeko y'amahoro agaragaza akarengane - gakoreshwa na Gandhi, Martin Luther King), guharanira imbuga nkoranyambaga.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp4: Itangazamakuru na demokarasi: itangazamakuru ryigenga ribazwa leta (umutungo wa 4). Akayunguruzo namakuru atariyo abangamira gutora amakuru - gusoma no kwandika ni ubuhanga bwabaturage.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_task: Gereranya na FPTP no guhagararirwa ugereranije ukoresheje ibi bipimo: uburinganire bwo guhagararirwa, umutekano wa guverinoma, guhitamo abatora, hamwe n’ubufatanye. Noneho tegura ubukangurambaga bwamatora yinama yishuri - andika manifeste, umenye abatora, kandi utegure ibikorwa bitatu byo kwiyamamaza.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_desc: Psychologiya nubushakashatsi bwa siyanse bwubwenge, ubwonko, nimyitwarire. Irashaka kumva impamvu abantu batekereza, bumva, kandi bakora nkuko bakora - kuva ibitotsi no kwibuka kugeza urukundo no kwibasirwa. Uburyo bwa psychologiya ni siyansi: ubushakashatsi bugenzurwa, kwitegereza, no gusesengura imibare. Yahinduye ubuvuzi, uburezi, n'ubuzima bwa buri munsi.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp0: Ibitekerezo byingenzi bya psychologiya: ibinyabuzima (ubwonko, ingirabuzimafatizo), ubwenge (inzira yibitekerezo), imyitwarire (imyitwarire igaragara, imiterere), psycodynamic (drives idasobanutse), hamwe nubumuntu (kwishyira ukizana).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp1: Uburyo bwa siyansi muri psychologiya: hypothesis → igeragezwa collection gukusanya amakuru → gusesengura → umwanzuro. Urungano rusubiramo rwemeza ko ibyagenzuwe mbere yo gutangazwa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp2: Ibyingenzi byingenzi byubwonko: cortex ibanza (gufata ibyemezo, imiterere), amygdala (amarangamutima, igisubizo cyubwoba), imvubu (kwibukwa), cerebellum (guhuza).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp3: Kamere na kurera impaka: ni kangahe genetika (kamere) n'ibidukikije hamwe n'uburambe (kurera) bigira imiterere, ubwenge, n'ubuzima bwo mumutwe? Ubwumvikane buriho: byombi birasabana.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp4: Imyitwarire muri psychologiya: abahugurwa bagomba gutanga uruhushya rubimenyeshejwe, barashobora gukuramo umwanya uwariwo wose, amakuru ni ibanga, kandi ubushakashatsi ntibugomba guteza ingaruka zirambye. Ubushakashatsi bwa Milgram (1960) bwazamuye ibibazo bikomeye byimyitwarire.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_task: Tegura ubushakashatsi bwitondewe kugirango ukore niba abanyeshuri barangaye cyane iyo bigana numuziki cyangwa bucece. Leta: ikibazo cyubushakashatsi, uburyo, impinduka, ibishobora kuvangavanga, nuburyo wasesengura amakuru.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_desc: Kumenya bivuga inzira zose zo mumutwe: imyumvire, kwitondera, kwibuka, gutekereza, ururimi, no gukemura ibibazo. Gusobanukirwa kwibuka - uko byakozwe, bibitswe, kandi byagaruwe - bifitanye isano no kwiga. Ubushakashatsi bwerekana ko kwibuka cyane hamwe no gusubiramo umwanya urenze cyane pasive yongeye gusoma kugirango igumane igihe kirekire.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp0: Moderi yububiko bwinshi (Atkinson & Shiffrin): kwibuka ibyumviro (agace k'isegonda) memory kwibuka igihe gito (ibintu 7 ± 2, ~ 20 amasegonda) memory kwibuka igihe kirekire (ubushobozi butagira imipaka, bushobora guhoraho).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp1: Encoding: guhindura uburambe muburyo bwo kwibuka. Ibisobanuro birambuye (guhuza amakuru mashya nubumenyi buriho) ni byiza cyane kuruta gusubiramo rote.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp2: Ingaruka yumwanya: kwiga ibintu bimwe mumasomo menshi mugihe (gusubiramo umwanya) biganisha kumurongo mwiza wo kwibuka igihe kirekire kuruta 'guterana'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp3: Imyitozo yo kugarura: kwibuka cyane amakuru (kwipimisha, flashcards) ishimangira ibimenyetso byo kwibuka cyane kuruta kongera gusoma. Ngiyo 'ingaruka zo kugerageza'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp4: Kwibuka birubaka, ntabwo byororoka: burigihe iyo twibutse kwibuka, turabihindura muburyo bwihishe. Ubuhamya bwababyiboneye rero ntabwo bwizewe - bwerekanwe kenshi mubushakashatsi bwurukiko.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_task: Gerageza ingaruka zumwanya: wige amagambo 20 mashya yamagambo ukoresheje imyitozo rusange (byose icyarimwe uyumunsi). Isuzume nyuma yumunsi 1. Noneho wige amagambo 20 mashya muminsi 5 (4 kumunsi). Ikizamini nyuma yiminsi 7. Gereranya amanota yawe hanyuma wandike ibyo wabonye.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_tp2: Ingamba zo kwiga kuva muri psychologiya
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_desc: Imitekerereze mbonezamubano yiga uburyo abantu batekereza, bumva, kandi bitwara imbere yabandi - nyabyo cyangwa batekereje. Irerekana uburyo imiterere yacu iduhindura cyane: duhuza amatsinda, twumvira ubutware, kandi dutezimbere kubogama - akenshi tutabishaka. Gusobanukirwa ingaruka zimibereho bidufasha gufata ibyemezo byigenga, byimyitwarire.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp0: Guhuza (Asch igeragezwa, 1951): abitabiriye amahugurwa batanze ibisubizo bitari byo iyo babonye abandi babaha - kwerekana amahame (ashaka guhuza) hamwe namakuru (kwizera ko abandi ari ukuri) uruhare rwimibereho.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp1: Kumvira (Milgram, 1963): abitabiriye amahugurwa bagize amashanyarazi bigaragara ko ari akaga kubera ko umuyobozi wababwiye - 65% bagiye hejuru. Erekana uburyo ubutware burenga umutimanama wawe.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp2: Ingaruka ya Bystander: uko abantu benshi bahari mugihe cyihutirwa, ntibishoboka ko umuntu umwe afasha (gukwirakwiza inshingano). Urubanza rwa Kitty Genovese, 1964.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp3: Inshingano ya Attribution: dusobanura imyitwarire tuyitirira imbere (imiterere, ubushobozi) cyangwa hanze (ibintu, amahirwe) ibitera. Ikosa ryibanze ryibanze: kurenza urugero kubitera imbere imyitwarire mibi yabandi.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp4: Mu matsinda no mu matsinda kubogama: dushyigikiye abantu tumenyana nabo ('twe') kandi dushobora kuvangura abandi ('bo'). Ubujura bwubujura bwerekanye uburyo amarushanwa yitsinda atera urwango.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_task: Urabona ko ntamuntu numwe mubantu benshi bafasha umuntu wataye ibitabo kandi bigaragara mububabare. Ukoresheje imitekerereze mbonezamubano, sobanura: (a) impamvu ibi bishobora kubaho, (b) ni ibihe bintu byihariye byongera cyangwa bigabanya amahirwe yo gufasha, (c) ibyo wowe ubwawe wakora kugirango utsinde ingaruka zibareba.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_desc: Imirasire y'izuba yashizweho hashize imyaka miriyari 4,6 uhereye ku gicu cya gaze n'umukungugu. Irimo inyenyeri imwe (izuba), imibumbe umunani, ukwezi kwinshi, hamwe numubiri muto utabarika - asteroide, inyenyeri, n'imibumbe ya dwarf. Gusobanukirwa imiterere nimbaraga ziyobora bihuza physics, chimie, nu mwanya dufite muri cosmos.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp0: Izuba ririmo 99.86% by'izuba ryinshi. Itanga ingufu zoguhuza ingufu za kirimbuzi: hydrogen nuclei fuse kugirango ikore helium, irekura urumuri nubushyuhe bwinshi.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp1: Imibumbe yimbere yimbere: Merkuri, Venusi, Isi, Mars - ntoya, yuzuye, yegereye izuba. Gazi yo hanze / ibihangange: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune - binini cyane, kure yizuba.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp2: Amategeko ya Kepler: imibumbe izenguruka izuba muri ellips (ntabwo ari umuzingi); kwimuka vuba iyo wegereye izuba; na kare yigihe cya orbital iringaniza na cube ya radiyo ya orbital.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp3: Umukandara wa asteroide uri hagati ya Mars na Jupiter; umukandara wa Kuiper urenze Neptune urimo Pluto nindi mibumbe ya dwarf. Inyenyeri zikomoka kuri Oort Cloud.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp4: Imbaraga rukuruzi zifata ibintu byose muri orbit. Guhunga umuvuduko: umuvuduko ukenewe kugirango ucike kuburemere bwumubiri - Isi ni ~ 11.2 km / s; ukwezi ni ~ 2,4 km / s.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_task: Kora igishushanyo mbonera cya sisitemu yizuba. Kuri buri mubumbe: vuga ubunini bwacyo ugereranije nisi, ibihe bya orbital, ikintu kimwe kidasanzwe, kandi niba gishobora gushyigikira ubuzima. Shyira umukandara wa asteroide n'umukandara wa Kuiper. Sobanura amategeko ya 2 ya Kepler ukoresheje igishushanyo cyawe.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_desc: Inyenyeri ntabwo zihoraho - ziravuka, zikabaho, kandi zirapfa, akenshi mubiturika bidasanzwe. Iherezo ryinyenyeri riterwa ahanini nubwinshi bwayo. Izuba amaherezo rizaguka riba igihangange gitukura hanyuma risenyuke kugeza ku mwijima wera, mugihe inyenyeri nini nini zirangira ari inyenyeri ndengakamere na neutron cyangwa umwobo wirabura. Ibintu byose biremereye kuruta hydrogen byahimbwe inyenyeri.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp0: Inyenyeri ziba muri nebulae (ibicu binini bya gaze n'umukungugu) mugihe uburemere butera ibice gusenyuka no gushyuha kugeza igihe ingufu za kirimbuzi zishiriye - kuvuka kwa protostar, hanyuma inyenyeri nyamukuru ikurikirana.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp1: Urukurikirane nyamukuru: inyenyeri zimara ubuzima bwazo zose zihuza hydrogen na helium muburyo butajegajega. Izuba rimaze imyaka ~ 4,6 ikurikiranye kandi hasigaye miliyari 5.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp2: Igishushanyo cya Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) gishushanya inyenyeri ukoresheje urumuri n'ubushyuhe. Urukurikirane nyamukuru rukora cyane; ibihangange bitukura (hejuru iburyo) na dwarf yera (hepfo ibumoso) biri kumurongo.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp3: Inyenyeri ntoya (nkizuba): urukurikirane nyamukuru → igihangange gitukura → umubumbe wa nebula → umwijima wera → (amaherezo) umwijima wirabura.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp4: Inyenyeri nini cyane: urutonde nyamukuru → umutuku supergiant → guturika kwa supernova (kurema ibintu biremereye kuruta icyuma, ubisasa mu kirere) star inyenyeri ya neutron cyangwa umwobo wirabura.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_task: Shushanya inzira ebyiri zubwihindurize ku gishushanyo cya HR: imwe ku nyenyeri nk'izuba, imwe ku nyenyeri inshuro 20 nini cyane. Kuri buri cyiciro: vuga izina, ibihe, hamwe nibikorwa nyamukuru bya kirimbuzi bibaho. Sobanura icyo supernova ari cyo n'impamvu bifite akamaro ku nkomoko y'ibintu ku isi.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_desc: Hanze y'izuba ryacu hari miliyari z'inyenyeri zishyize hamwe muri galaktike, kandi hakurya ya galaktike hari isanzure igaragara - hafi miliyari 93 z'umucyo mu myaka na miliyari 13.8. Cosmology - siyanse yinkomoko yisi nubwihindurize - yerekanye ishusho itangaje: Big Bang, kwagura umwanya, ibintu byijimye, nimbaraga zijimye.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp0: Inzira y'Amata ni galaxy yabujijwe irimo inyenyeri ~ miliyari 250. Izuba ryacu riherereye ~ 27,000-yumucyo uvuye hagati ya galaktike. Bifata izuba ~ miliyoni 225 kugirango bazenguruke galaxy.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp1: Ubwoko bwa Galaxy: kuzenguruka (nka Nzira Nyamata na Andromeda), elliptique (inyenyeri zishaje, gaze nto), bidasanzwe (nta shusho isobanutse, akenshi biterwa no kugongana kwa galaktike).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp2: Igitekerezo cya Big Bang: ~ miliyari 13.8 ishize, isanzure ryatangiye ari ahantu hashyushye cyane, huzuye kandi ryagutse kuva icyo gihe. Ibimenyamenya: imirasire ya cosmic microwave imirasire, amategeko ya Hubble (galaxy isubira inyuma vuba kure).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp3: Ikintu cyijimye: ibintu bitagaragara bidatanga urumuri ariko ingaruka za rukuruzi zifata galaxy hamwe. Igizwe ~ 27% byingufu-nini zose. Kamere yacyo ntiramenyekana.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp4: Ingufu zijimye: imbaraga zidasanzwe zituma kwaguka kwisi kwihuta. Igizwe ~ 68% by'isi n'ijuru. Ibintu bisanzwe (inyenyeri, imibumbe, gaze) ni ~ 5% gusa.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_task: Kora 'adresse' kwisi: umubumbe, sisitemu yinyenyeri, galaxy, itsinda rya galaxy, supercluster, isanzure igaragara. Tanga intera / ingano kuri buri rwego. Noneho sobanura ibimenyetso bibiri byerekana inyigisho ya Big Bang, harimo icyo imirasire ya microwave yibibaho.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_desc: Ikilatini ni ururimi rwuzuye - iherezo ryijambo (ntabwo riteganya ijambo) ryerekana imikorere yikibonezamvugo. Kumenya gutandukanya amazina no guhuza inshinga bifungura ibisobanuro by'inyandiko iyo ari yo yose y'Ikilatini, uhereye kuri raporo y'intambara ya Sezari kugeza ku bisigo bya Virgil. Ikibonezamvugo cy'ikilatini kandi gitezimbere gusobanukirwa Icyongereza, Igifaransa, Icyesipanyoli, Igitaliyani, n'Igiporutugali.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp0: Ikilatini gifite amazina atanu. Buri kugabanuka bifite imanza esheshatu: nominative (ingingo), gushinja (ikintu), kubyara (gutunga), gutandukanya (ikintu kitaziguye), gukuraho (bitandukanye), kuvuga (aderesi).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp1: Urugero rwa 1 kugabanuka: puella (umukobwa) - puella (nom.), Puellam (acc.), Puellae (gen.), Puellae (dat.), Puella (abl.), Puella (ijwi.) Ubwinshi: puellae, puellas, puellarum, puellis, puellis, puellae.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp2: Inshinga zahujwe numuntu (1/2/3/3), umubare (umwe / mubwinshi), igihe (ubungubu, kidatunganye, cyuzuye, ejo hazaza), ijwi (rikora / rikora), hamwe nikirere (byerekana, kugoboka, gutegekwa).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp3: Kugeza ubu amare (gukunda): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant - Ndagukunda, urakunda, aragukunda, turagukunda, wowe (pl.) Urukundo, baragukunda.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp4: Itondekanya ryijambo mu kilatini riroroshye kuko iherezo ryerekana imikorere: 'Puella aquam portat' na 'Aquam puella portat' byombi bisobanura ngo 'Umukobwa atwara amazi.' Shimangira guhinduka ariko bisobanura kuguma.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_task: Kugabanya izina 'dominus' (shobuja, ubugabo bwa 2 bwo kugabanuka) muburyo butandatu, bumwe kandi bwinshi. Noneho conjugate 'videre' (kubona) mubihe byubu, abantu bose. Sobanura: 'Dominus puellas amat' na 'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_desc: Gusoma inyandiko yikilatini yukuri - Sezari, Cicero, Virgil, Ovid - iguhuza nimyaka 2000 yibitekerezo byiburengerazuba, amategeko, ubuvanganzo, na siyanse. Ubuhanga bwo guhindura bwubaka isesengura ryuzuye, kwihangana, nubushobozi bwo gukorana ninteruro zigoye. Ndetse inyandiko zoroshye zigaragaza indangagaciro z'Abaroma, amateka, n'imvugo.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp0: Ingamba zo guhindura: menya inshinga mbere (ikubwira ibikorwa nigihe), hanyuma ingingo (nominative), hanyuma ikintu (gushinja), hanyuma ibindi bintu.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp1: 'De Bello Gallico' ya Sezari yanditse mu kilatini isanzwe, igisirikare - cyiza kubatangiye. Amagambo ya Cicero akoresha imvugo igoye. Virgil 'Aeneid' ni imivugo ifite metero nururimi rwikigereranyo.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp2: Ingingo ziyobowe: gushinja + infinitive (imvugo itaziguye), ingingo zuzuye (iyo / kuva), ingingo zijyanye (qui, quae, quod - ninde, ninde), ibisubizo (ut + subjunctive).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp3: Igihe cyuzuye: ibikorwa byashize byarangiye. Impera zisanzwe zisanzwe: -i, -isti, -it, -imus, -istis, -erunt. Urugero: amavi = Nakunze / Nakunze.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp4: Ingamba zo gusoma: ibimenyetso bifatika bifasha mugihe ikibonezamvugo kidasobanutse. Koresha ubumenyi bwamagambo yumuzi - amagambo menshi yicyongereza ninkomoko yikilatini (urugero: icyambu 'kuva portare = gutwara).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_task: Sobanura iki gice cya Sezari: 'Milites Romani castrum magnum aedificaverunt. Galli kuri silvas fugerunt et muri montibus se celaverunt. ' Gisesengura: menya ingingo, inshinga, ikintu, ninteruro iyo ari yo yose. Inshinga zihe? Ibi bitubwira iki kubyabaye?
learnSch_latin_language_f2_desc: Ikilatini nticyari ururimi gusa - cyari imodoka yimico yose yashizeho amategeko, imyubakire, idini, nibitekerezo bya politiki muburayi ndetse nisi yose. Ibitekerezo by'Abaroma byanditswe mu kilatini - res publica, imperium, senatus, ius - byaduhaye mu buryo butaziguye 'repubulika', 'ingoma', 'sena', n'ubutabera. Gusobanukirwa uyu murage ntaho bitandukaniye no gusobanukirwa amateka yuburengerazuba.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp0: Umurage w'ikilatini: ~ 60% by'amagambo y'Icyongereza akomoka mu Gifaransa cyangwa Ikilatini cyatewe n'Ikilatini. Amazina ya siyansi, amagambo yemewe, nubuvuzi bwubuvuzi yiganjemo ikilatini.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp1: Ibitekerezo byemewe n’Abaroma biracyakoreshwa: habeas corpus (ugomba kubyara umubiri - uburenganzira bwo kudafungwa nta byaha), ubutabera bwimbitse (munsi yumucamanza), adahari, pro bono, ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp2: Umusanzu w’amadini n’umuco w’Abaroma: ikirangaminsi (amezi yitiriwe imana n’abami b'Abaroma: Mutarama / Janus, Werurwe / Mars, Nyakanga / Julius Sezari), amabwiriza yubatswe (Doric, Ionic, Korinti).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp3: Mottos y'Ikilatini iracyakoreshwa: carpe diem (fata umunsi), cogito ergo sum (Ndatekereza, niyo mpamvu ndi), veni vidi vici (Naje, Nabonye, ​​Natsinze - Julius Caesar), e pluribus unum (muri benshi, umwe - intego ya USA).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp4: Ubuvanganzo bw'Abaroma: 'Aeneid' ya Virgil (umugani w'ifatizo wa Roma), Ovid ya 'Metamorphose' (imigani y'impinduka), disikuru ya Cicero, ibisobanuro bya gisirikare bya Kayisari - byose biracyasomwa kandi biga muri iki gihe.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_task: Shakisha amagambo 10 y'Icyongereza akomoka mu mizi y'Ikilatini mu gika kimwe cy'igitabo icyo ari cyo cyose. Kuri buri: andika imizi y'Ikilatini, ibisobanuro byayo, n'ijambo ry'icyongereza. Noneho sobanura igitekerezo kimwe cyemewe nabaroma hanyuma werekane uburyo gikoreshwa muburyo bugezweho bwamategeko.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp0: Imizi y'Ikilatini mu Cyongereza na siyansi
learnSch_media_studies_f0_desc: Kumenya itangazamakuru nubushobozi bwo kugera, gusesengura, gusuzuma, no gukora itangazamakuru. Mw'isi yuzuyemo amakuru - amakuru, imbuga nkoranyambaga, kwamamaza, imyidagaduro - ubushobozi bwo gusuzuma neza inkomoko, kumenya kubogama, no kumenya gukoresha manipuline ni ubuhanga bwibanze bwa demokarasi. Abanyamakuru bazi gusoma no kwandika biragoye kubeshya.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp0: Ubutumwa bwitangazamakuru bwose bwubatswe: bukozwe numuntu, kubwintego, kubateze amatwi, ukoresheje tekinoroji yihariye, hamwe n'ingaruka zishobora kubaho. URUPAPURO RWA CAGE: Ubwubatsi, Abumva, Ubwoko, Ingaruka.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp1: Kubogama mumakuru: guhitamo kubogama (inkuru zirimo), gushiraho kubogama (uko bitangwa), no kubogama kwinkomoko (amajwi yabo yumvikana). Ibitangazamakuru byose bifite aho bibogamiye - ikibazo ni bangahe kandi nicyerekezo.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp2: Amakuru atari yo: amakuru y'ibinyoma akwirakwira atagamije kubeshya. Disinformation: nkana amakuru yibinyoma yabigenewe kugirango ayobye. Urubuga rugenzura ukuri (Snopes, Ukuri kwuzuye, Politifike) rufasha kugenzura ibirego.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp3: Ubuhanga bwo kwamamaza: kwiyambaza amarangamutima, kwemeza ibyamamare, guhuza ('buriwese arabikoresha'), ubuke ('gutanga bike'), gusubiramo. Kwamamaza bikorana ubushishozi - niyo twaba tuzi amayeri.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp4: Ibibazo bya nyirubwite: umubare muto wibigo bifite itangazamakuru ryinshi kwisi (News Corp, Disney, Google, Meta). Kwishyira hamwe birashobora kugabanya itandukaniro ryibitekerezo.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_task: Hitamo inkuru imwe yamakuru ikubiye mubitangazamakuru bitatu bitandukanye (urugero: ingingo ya BBC, imbonerahamwe, hamwe nimbuga nkoranyambaga). Gereranya: umutwe, ijwi, ibimenyetso byakoreshejwe, amagambo yavuzwe arimo, nibisigaye. Gereranya buriwese kugirango wizere. Kurangiza kwizerwa cyane nimpamvu.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_desc: Filime nimwe mubitangazamakuru bikomeye byo kuvuga inkuru byavumbuwe. Ihuza ishusho, amajwi, kugenda, no guhindura kugirango habeho ibisobanuro. Kwiga 'gusoma' firime nkumwandiko - gusesengura impande za kamera, kumurika, gushushanya amajwi, hamwe nuburyo bwo kuvuga - byugurura uburambe bukomeye bwa sinema kandi biguha ibikoresho byo gukora inkuru zawe bwite.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp0: Kamera ya kamera: gukabya gukabije (amarangamutima, ibisobanuro), gufunga (reaction yimiterere), kurasa hagati (imiterere + imiterere), kurasa kure (gushiraho), kurasa kure cyane (kwigunga, ahantu nyaburanga). Buri kimwe gitanga ingaruka zitandukanye mumarangamutima.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp1: Inguni ya Kamera: inguni nto (ituma ingingo isa nimbaraga), inguni ndende (ituma ingingo isa nkiyoroheje / yoroheje), urwego rwamaso (rutabogamye), Ubuholandi buhengamye (guhagarika umutima / guhagarika umutima). Ingingo yo kureba ishusho yibiza abayireba muburyo bw'imiterere.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp2: Guhindura: gukata (inzibacyuho ako kanya), gushira (buhoro buhoro kugeza umukara - byerekana igihe cyashize), gushonga (guhuzagurika - byerekana guhuza). Guhindura Montage bitanga ibisobanuro binyuze murukurikirane (Eisenstein).
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp3: Ijwi: amajwi ya diegetike (abaho mwisi ya firime - ibiganiro, intambwe), itari diegetike (amajwi yumvwa nabayumva gusa). Umuziki utera umwuka; guceceka bitera impagarara.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp4: Mise-en-scène: ibintu byose byashyizwe mumurongo - shiraho igishushanyo, imyambarire, itara, umwanya wabakinnyi. Buri kintu kivuga ibisobanuro nkana.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_task: Hitamo iminota 2 muri firime. Gisesengura: (a) ubwoko butatu bwo kurasa bwakoreshejwe ningaruka zabyo, (b) kumurika (urufunguzo rwo hejuru = urumuri / rwishimye cyangwa ruto-urufunguzo = umwijima / amayobera?), (C) ijwi (sobanura diegetike na non-diegetike), (d) uburyo guhindura bitera umuvuduko. Kurangiza uko umwuka urema nuburyo.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_desc: Imbuga nkoranyambaga zahinduye uburyo abantu bavugana, bakoresha amakuru, kandi bakora indangamuntu. Bashyizeho kandi ingaruka nshya: gukoresha algorithmic manipulation, gukoresha interineti, isuri y’ibanga, hamwe na polarisiyasi. Kumva uburyo urubuga rukora nuburyo bwo kuzikoresha neza kandi neza ni ubwenegihugu bwa digitale.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp0: Algorithms yihariye ibirimo ukurikije imyitwarire yawe - ibyo ukanze, nka, kandi ugabana. Ibi birema akayunguruzo aho ubona gusa kwemeza ibitekerezo, byongera polarisiyasi.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp1: Icyitegererezo cyubucuruzi: imbuga nkoranyambaga nyinshi ni ubuntu kuko amakuru yabakoresha no kwitondera nibicuruzwa bigurishwa kubamamaza. 'Niba utishyuye, uri ibicuruzwa.'
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp2: Ikirenge cya digitale: ibyo wanditse byose, nka, cyangwa gushakisha bisiga amateka ahoraho. Abakoresha ejo hazaza, kaminuza, n'abashinzwe kubahiriza amategeko barashobora kugera kubintu rusange kandi rimwe na rimwe bikubiyemo ibintu byihariye.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp3: Kwibeshya kuri interineti: gutotezwa kumurongo bishobora kutamenyekana, kugera kubantu bahohotewe aho ariho hose, no gusiga inyandiko zihoraho. Ingaruka ku buzima bwo mu mutwe zirakomeye; nicyaha cyemewe mubihugu byinshi.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp4: Ibinini byimbitse nibitangazamakuru byogukora: AI irashobora gukora amashusho yimpimbano yemeza abantu nyabo. Ibi bituma ibimenyetso bigaragara bigenda byizerwa - 'kubona' ntibikiri 'kwizera'.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_task: Kugenzura imbuga nkoranyambaga zawe: niyihe shusho yawe inyandiko rusange yawe ikora? Algorithm yawe ikwereka iki? Ukurikiza konti hamwe n'ibitekerezo bivuguruzanya? Noneho shushanya icyerekezo cyumunyeshuri wumwaka wa 7 kumikoreshereze yimbuga nkoranyambaga - shyiramo inama 5 zihariye, zifatika.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_desc: Igishinwa cya Mandarin gifite abavuga ururimi barenga miliyari 1 ku isi kandi ni rwo rurimi ruvugwa cyane n'abavuga ururimi kavukire. Bitandukanye nindimi zinyuguti, Ikimandariya ikoresha amajwi - impinduka mukibanza gihindura ibisobanuro - hamwe na sisitemu yo kwandika. Kumenya sisitemu ya Pinyin romanisation na tone enye nintambwe yambere yingenzi.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp0: Pinyin: sisitemu yemewe ya romanisation ya Mandarin. Ikoresha inyuguti z'ikilatini zifite ibimenyetso byerekana amajwi. Ibyingenzi mukwiga inyuguti no gukoresha uburyo bwo kwinjiza imibare.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp1: Imvugo enye: icya 1 (urwego rwo hejuru, ā) - 'mā' bisobanura nyina. Icya 2 (kuzamuka, á) - 'má' bisobanura ikivuguto. Icya gatatu (kwibiza, ǎ) - 'mǎ' bisobanura ifarashi. Icya 4 (kugwa, à) - 'mà' bisobanura gutukana. Ongeraho ijwi ridafite aho ribogamiye (nta kimenyetso).
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp2: Intangiriro (inyuguti): b, p, m, f, d, t, n, l, g, k, h, j, q, x, zh, ch, sh, r, z, c, s. Irangiza (inyajwi nimpera): a, o, e, i, u, ü, ai, ei, ao, ou, an, en, ang, eng, ong, nibindi
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp3: Indamutso y'ingenzi: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) - muraho; 谢谢 (xièxiè) - urakoze; 不客气 (bù kèqì) - urahawe ikaze; (Duìbuqǐ) - birababaje; 再见 (zàijiàn) - muraho.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp4: Ikibonezamvugo cya Mandarin cyoroshye kurusha indimi zi Burayi mu buryo bumwe: nta nshinga guhuza, nta gitsina kibonezamvugo, nta ndunduro nyinshi. Itondekanya ryijambo (Subject-Inshinga-Ikintu) ritwara ibisobanuro.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_task: Umva amajwi ane yose ya 'ma' hanyuma usubiremo kugeza igihe ushobora kubyara buri kimwe. Andika 'Ndi umunyeshuri' mu gishinwa ukoresheje Pinyin: 'Wǒ shì xuéshēng.' Noneho andika: 'Ndashaka kurya umuceri' - 'Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn.' Sobanura itandukaniro mubisobanuro biterwa no guhindura amajwi muri 'mā / mǎ'.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_desc: Inyuguti z'igishinwa (汉字, Hànzì) ni imwe muri sisitemu za kera zo kwandika ku isi, zifite inyuguti zirenga 50.000 - nubwo gusoma no kwandika bisaba kumenya hafi 2000-3000. Inyuguti ntabwo ari ibishushanyo bidasanzwe - byubatswe mubice bifatika byitwa radicals, bitanga ibimenyetso kubisobanuro ndetse rimwe na rimwe bivuzwe.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp0: Inyuguti zanditswe kuri kare ya gride kandi igizwe na stroke muburyo bwihariye. Amategeko yo gutondeka inkoni yemeza ko adahwema hamwe nubufasha bwo kwibuka: muri rusange hejuru kugeza hasi, ibumoso ugana iburyo, utambitse mbere ya vertical.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp1: Ibitekerezo: inyuguti zose zirimo radical semantique yerekana ibisobanuro. 水 (amazi radical 氵) agaragara muri 海 (inyanja), 河 (uruzi), 泳 (koga). Kumenya ~ 200 radicals ifungura imiterere mubihumbi.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp2: Byoroheje na Gakondo: Inyuguti zoroheje (zikoreshwa mugihugu cyUbushinwa, Singapore) zifite inkoni nke. Inyuguti gakondo (Tayiwani, Hong Kong, imiryango yo hanze) ibika amateka. Urugero: urukundo - 爱 (yoroshye) na 愛 (gakondo).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp3: HSK (Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi): ikizamini gisanzwe cyubushinwa. HSK 1 = amagambo 150, HSK 2 = 300, kugeza HSK 6 = 5.000. Ibipimo byingenzi kubiga abashinwa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp4: Inyuguti zisanzwe zo kwiga mbere: 一二三四五六七八九十 (1-10), 人 (umuntu), 大 (kinini), 小 (nto), 中 (hagati / Ubushinwa), 日 (izuba / umunsi), 月 (ukwezi / ukwezi), 山 (umusozi), 水 (amazi), 火 (umuriro).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_task: Wige kandi wandike (hamwe nuburyo bukwiye bwa stroke) imibare 1-10 mumyandikire yubushinwa. Noneho wige izindi nyuguti eshanu ukoresheje radicals nkibikoresho bifasha kwibuka - sobanura isano kuri buri. Hanyuma, andika izina ryawe muri Pinyin hanyuma uhitemo inyuguti zikwiye kubushinwa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_desc: Kwiga Ikiganiro cya Mandarin gifungura imiryango kuri miliyari 1.4 zishobora kuganirwaho kandi umwe mu mico ikomeye ku isi. Ingingo z'ingenzi - intangiriro, igihe, guhaha, ibiryo, icyerekezo - bitanga amagambo afatika yo gutumanaho kwa buri munsi. Ikibonezamvugo cy'Igishinwa gisanzwe gituma ibiganiro bigerwaho mugihe amajwi n'amagambo y'ibanze amaze gutozwa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp0: Imiterere yinteruro: Ingingo + Igihe + Ahantu + Inshinga + Ikintu. Urugero: 我 (I) 明天 (ejo) 在图书馆 (mu isomero) 学习 (kwiga) 中文 (Igishinwa) = 我明天在图书馆学习中文.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp1: Kubaza ibibazo: ongeraho 吗 (ma) kumagambo yego / ntakibazo. 你是学生 (uri umunyeshuri) → 你是学生吗? (Uri umunyeshuri?). Cyangwa ukoreshe amagambo yibibazo: 什么 (shénme, iki), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, aho), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, igihe).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp2: Imibare n'ibiciro: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). Mu maduka: 这个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) - Ibi bingana iki? (Tài guì le) - Birahenze cyane! (Piányí yīdiǎn) - Birahendutse gato nyamuneka.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp3: Ibiryo no gutumiza: 我要一碗米饭 (Wǒ yào yī wǎn mǐfàn) - Ndashaka igikombe cy'umuceri. (Wǒ bù chī ròu) - Ntabwo ndya inyama. 好吃! (Hǎochī!) - Biraryoshe!
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp4: Imiterere yumuco: guhana amakarita yubucuruzi n'amaboko abiri; kubwira abasaza kumugaragaro; akamaro ka 面子 (miànzi, 'isura' - izina, icyubahiro); ikinyabupfura cyo gutanga impano. Ururimi n'umuco ntibishobora gutandukana.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_task: Uruhare-gukina (andika cyangwa wandike) ikiganiro muri resitora y'Ubushinwa. Shyiramo: gusuhuza umusereri, kubaza icyiza, gutumiza ibyokurya bibiri n'ikinyobwa (ukoresheje amagambo apima neza), kubaza igiciro, no gusezera. Intego byibuze yo guhanahana 10. Andika hamwe na Pinyin hamwe nubusobanuro bwicyongereza.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_tp2: Ibiryo, umuco, nubuzima bwa buri munsi
