learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_desc: Imihindagurikire y’ibihe nicyo gisobanura ibihe byacu. Ibyuka bihumanya ikirere byangiza ikirere ku isi ku buryo butigeze bubaho, guhungabanya imiterere y’ikirere, gushonga urubura, no kubangamira urusobe rw’ibinyabuzima n’abaturage. Gusobanukirwa siyanse - inzinguzingu ya karubone, ingingo zitangwa, hamwe nibitekerezo - ni ngombwa kubaturage bose babimenyeshejwe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp0: Inzira ya karubone: CO₂ igenda hagati yikirere, inyanja, ubutaka (ibimera binyuze kuri fotosintezeza), hamwe n’ibinyabuzima (binyuze mu guhumeka). Gutwika ibicanwa biva mu kirere birekura karubone yabitswe mu myaka miriyoni, bigahungabanya ukwezi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp1: Ingaruka ya Greenhouse: imirasire y'izuba ishyushya Isi; Isi isohora imirasire ya infragre; imyuka ya parike (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, imyuka ya H₂O) irayikuramo kandi ikongera ikanatanga ubushyuhe, igashyushya hejuru. Bitabaye ibyo, Isi yaba −18 ° C; hamwe nayo (karemano), 15 ° C; byongerewe = ubushyuhe buteye akaga.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp2: Imiterere y'ubu (2024): ikirere CO₂ kirenga 420 ppm (mbere yinganda: 280 ppm). Ikigereranyo cy'ubushyuhe ku isi cyazamutse ~ 1,2 ° C hejuru y'urwego rwabanjirije inganda. Amasezerano y'i Paris agamije kugabanya ubushyuhe kugera kuri 1.5 ° C.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp3: Ingingo zerekana ikirere: inzitizi zirenze izo impinduka ziba zishimangira imbaraga. Gushonga permafrost irekura CH₄; gushonga urubura rwa Arctique rugaragaza inyanja yijimye, ikurura ubushyuhe bwinshi; Gutema amashyamba ya Amazone bishobora guhindura ishyamba ryimvura muri savanna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp4: Ubutabera bw’ikirere: ibihugu biri mu nzira y'amajyambere bigira uruhare runini mu byuka bihumanya ikirere ariko bikababazwa cyane n’ingaruka z’ikirere (izamuka ry’inyanja, ubushyuhe bukabije, kunanirwa kw'ibihingwa). Ibipimo by'imyitwarire na politiki y'ibikorwa by'ikirere ntibishobora gutandukana na siyansi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_task: Shushanya kandi usobanure uruziga rwa karubone, rwerekana urujya n'uruza rw'abantu. Kubara: niba igihugu gisohoye 500 Mt CO₂ kumwaka kandi kigatera ibiti bikurikirana 50 Mt / mwaka mugihe uhinduye ibishobora kuvugururwa bizigama 100 Mt / mwaka, imyaka ingahe yo kugera kuri net zeru (ukeka ko nta ngamba nshya)? Suzuma ibikorwa bitatu by'inyongera igihugu gishobora gukora.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp0: Inzira ya karubone n'ingaruka za parike
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_desc: Ibinyabuzima bitandukanye - ubuzima butandukanye ku isi - ni umusingi w’ibinyabuzima bizima biduha ibiryo, amazi meza, imiti, n’ikirere gihamye. Muri iki gihe turimo kuzimangana kwa gatandatu, biterwa no gusenya aho gutura, umwanda, amoko atera, n’imihindagurikire y’ikirere. Gusobanukirwa urusobe rw'ibinyabuzima byerekana impamvu buri bwoko bwatakaye bufite akamaro.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp0: Serivise y’ibidukikije: inyungu kamere itanga ku buntu - kwanduza (ingenzi kuri 75% by’ibihingwa byibiribwa), kweza amazi, kurwanya imyuzure, kubika karubone, gushinga ubutaka, no kurinda inkombe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp1: Ubwinshi bwa gatandatu buzimangana: amoko agenda azimangana inshuro 100-1000 kurenza igipimo cyimiterere karemano. ~ Ubwoko bwa miriyoni 1 kuri ubu bugarijwe. Impamvu zambere: ihinduka ryimikoreshereze yubutaka (gutakaza aho gutura), gukoresha cyane, umwanda, amoko atera, imihindagurikire y’ikirere.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp2: Ubwoko bwibanze: ubwoko bugira uruhare runini cyane mubidukikije. Kubikuraho bitera urusobe rwibinyabuzima - impyisi muri Yellowstone yagenzuraga umubare wimpongo, zemerera ibimera gukira, bigira ingaruka kumigezi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp3: Ibinyabuzima: imiryango nini y’ibidukikije isobanurwa n’ikirere n’ibimera - amashyamba y’imvura yo mu turere dushyuha (ibinyabuzima byinshi), ishyamba ridashyuha, ibyatsi / savanna, ubutayu (ibihe bikabije), tundra (permafrost), inyanja (biome nini).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp4: Ingamba zo kubungabunga: uduce dukingiwe (parike y’igihugu, ibigega byo mu nyanja), gusubiranamo (kugarura amoko y’ibinyabuzima n’ibikorwa), kubungabunga ibidukikije (pariki, amabanki y’imbuto), amasezerano ya CITES (agenzura ubucuruzi bw’ibinyabuzima bigenda byangirika).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_task: Ubushakashatsi bumwe bwibinyabuzima byangirika (urugero: amabuye ya korali, amashyamba yimvura ya Amazone, ibiti byimbuto). Kubidukikije wahisemo: (a) gusobanura ibinyabuzima bitandukanye, (b) gusobanura iterabwoba bitatu, (c) kugereranya agaciro k'ubukungu bwa serivisi y’ibidukikije, (d) gusuzuma ingamba eshatu zo kubungabunga no gukora neza.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_desc: Kuramba bisobanura guhaza ibikenewe muri iki gihe utabangamiye ubushobozi bw'igihe kizaza cyo guhura n'ibyabo (Brundtland ibisobanuro, 1987). Kwimukira mu isi irambye bisaba impinduka mu mbaraga, ibiribwa, ubwikorezi, no gukoresha - kandi bireba buri wese kuva muri guverinoma, ibigo kugeza ku muntu ku giti cye.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp0: Intego z'iterambere rirambye (SDGs): Intego 17 zemejwe n’ibihugu byose bigize Umuryango w’abibumbye muri 2015, bigamije ubukene, ubuzima, uburezi, ingufu zisukuye, ibikorwa by’ikirere, ndetse n’ibinyabuzima bitarenze 2030.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp1: Ingufu zishobora kuvugururwa: izuba, umuyaga, hydro, geothermal, hamwe n’umuyaga mwinshi bitanga amashanyarazi hamwe n’ibyuka bihumanya ikirere. Ibiciro by'izuba n'umuyaga byagabanutseho 90% + kuva mu 2010 - ubu ni isoko ihendutse cyane yubatswe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp2: Ubukungu bwizunguruka: aho gufata - gukora-guta, ibikoresho byongeye gukoreshwa, gusanwa, no gukoreshwa muburyo bufunze. Kugabanya imyanda, kuzigama umutungo, no guhanga imirimo.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp3: Sisitemu y'ibiribwa: ubuhinzi bufite ~ 25% byuka bihumanya ikirere ku isi. Kugabanya kurya inyama (cyane cyane inyama zinka), kugabanya imyanda y'ibiribwa, no kwimukira mu buhinzi burambye (organic, agroforestry) ningirakamaro.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp4: Ibikorwa byumuntu kugiti cye: ibirenge bya karubone biratandukanye cyane. Kuguruka, kurya inyama, no gutwara amamodoka ya lisansi nibyo bigira ingaruka nyinshi kubantu bahitamo. Ariko impinduka zifatika - politiki ya leta, imikorere yibigo, ibikorwa remezo - bifite ingaruka nyinshi cyane.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_task: Kubara ukwezi kwa karubone ikirenge ukoresheje calculatrice kumurongo. Menya ibikorwa byawe bitatu byingenzi. Ubushakashatsi kandi utange impinduka imwe yumuntu ku giti cye nimpinduka imwe itunganijwe (politiki ya leta cyangwa ibigo) byagabanya ikirenge cyawe. Kugeza ubu: ikirenge cyubu, intego yikirenge, nigihe ntarengwa.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp2: Sisitemu y'ibiryo hamwe nibikorwa bya buri muntu
learnUni_mathematics_f5_desc: Isesengura ryukuri nurufatiro rukomeye rwo kubara, kwerekana ibisubizo kubyerekeye imipaka, gukomeza, gutandukanya, no kwishyira hamwe ukoresheje ibisobanuro nyabyo ε-δ. Isimbuza ibitekerezo byimbitse hamwe n'amazi yumvikana yumvikana - ihinduka ryibanze mumibare ikenewe kurwego rwa kaminuza.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp0: ε-δ imipaka: lim_ {x → a} f (x) = L bisobanura kuri buri ε> 0 hariho δ> 0 kuburyo 0 <| x - a | <δ bisobanura | f (x) −L | <ε. Ibi bivanaho kudasobanuka mubitekerezo byo 'kwegera'.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp1: Bolzano-Weierstrass theorem: buri cyiciro gikurikiranye muri ℝⁿ gifite icyerekezo gikurikira. Heine-Borel: agace ka ℝⁿ ni compact niba ifunze kandi ikagabanywa.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp2: Hagati y'Agaciro Agaciro: niba f ikomeje kuri [a, b] na f (a) na f (b) bifite ibimenyetso bitandukanye, hariho c ∈ (a, b) hamwe na f (c) = 0. Byerekanwe neza uhereye byuzuye ℝ.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp3: Gukomeza kimwe: imwe δ ikora kuri x icyarimwe - ikomeye kuruta gukomeza. Igikorwa cyose gikomeza kumurongo wuzuye kirahoraho.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp4: Riemann na Lebesgue integral: integuza ya Lebesgue yagura iya Riemann mugupima ibice (igipimo cyo gupima) kandi ikora imirimo myinshi cyane, harimo imipaka ikurikirana.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_task: Ukoresheje ibisobanuro ε-δ, garagaza ko lim_ {x → 3} (2x - 1) = 5. Noneho koresha IVT werekane ko x⁵ - x - 1 = 0 ifite nibura igisubizo nyacyo. Garagaza ko f (x) = 1 / x idahoraho kuri (0,1) ahubwo iri kuri [0.5, 2].
learnUni_mathematics_f6_desc: Gukuramo algebra rusange mubikorwa byimibare kubikorwa bidafatika: amatsinda (igikorwa kimwe), impeta (ibikorwa bibiri), nimirima (ibikorwa bibiri hamwe na inverses). Ibi bihuza imibare itandukanye kandi bishimangira kode ya kijyambere (imirongo ya elliptike hejuru yimirima itagira ingano) hamwe na fiziki (amatsinda ahuza ibice bya fiziki).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp0: Itsinda axioms: gufunga (a ★ b ∈ G), gufatanya ((a ★ b) ★ c = a ★ (b ★ c)), indangamuntu (e ★ a = a), ibinyuranye (a ★ a⁻¹ = e). Ingero: (ℤ, +), (ℚ \ {0}, ×), itsinda rya dihedral Dₙ (ibigereranyo bya n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp1: Igitekerezo cya Lagrange: niba H ari itsinda ryitsinda ryanyuma G, hanyuma | H | kugabana | G |. Umwanzuro: gahunda yibintu byose bigabanya | G |. Amatsinda asanzwe yemerera kwubaka amatsinda G / N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp2: Impeta y'impeta: (R, +, ×) aho (R, +) ari itsinda rya abelian, × rihuza kandi rikwirakwiza. Indangarugero zuzuye (nta zeru zigabanya). Ibitekerezo bihuza amatsinda mato kumpeta. Ibyingenzi byingenzi (PIDs): buri gitekerezo cyakozwe nikintu kimwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp3: Imirima: buri kintu kitari zero gifite kugwiza inverse. Ingero: ℚ, ℝ, ℂ, nimirima itagira ingano 𝔽_p = ℤ / pℤ (p prime). Imirima yanyuma ishigikira ibanga rya AES hamwe na kode ikosora amakosa.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp4: Igitekerezo cya Galois: gihuza imizi ya polinomial hamwe nitsinda ryitsinda. Itsinda rya Galois rya polinomial rifata imiterere yumuzi waryo. Polinomial irashobora gukemurwa naba radicals niba itsinda ryayo rya Galois ari itsinda ryakemuka - risobanura kudashobora gukurwaho impamyabumenyi≥5 rusange.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_task: Garagaza ko ℤ₆ munsi yinyongera ari itsinda. Shakisha amatsinda yose hanyuma urebe theorem ya Lagrange. Garagaza ℤ₂ × ℤ₃ ≅ ℤ₆ mugaragaza isomorphism itomoye. Noneho werekane ℤ₂ × ℤ₂ ≇ ℤ₄ ushakisha umutungo ubatandukanya.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_desc: Isesengura rinini ryagura kubara kumikorere yibintu bigoye. Imikorere ya Holomorphic (complexe-itandukanijwe) imikorere iratandukanye cyane kandi ikora amakuru yisi yose mumibare yaho. Cauchy yibanze ya theorem, kubara ibisigisigi, no gushushanya bihuza imbaraga bigira imbaraga muri fiziki, ubwubatsi, hamwe nimibare.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp0: Itandukaniro rigoye: f '(z) = lim_ {h → 0} [f (z + h) −f (z)] / h (h ∈ ℂ). Ingano ya Cauchy-Riemann: niba f = u + iv ari holomorphic noneho ∂u / ∂x = ∂v / ∂y na ∂u / ∂y = −∂v / ∂x.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp1: Cauchy yibanze yibanze: kuri holomorphic f imbere no kumurongo woroheje C, ∮_C f (z) dz = 0. Inzira ya Cauchy: f (z₀) = (1 / 2πi) ∮_C f (z) / (z - z₀) dz.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp2: Urutonde rwa Taylor na Laurent: imikorere ya holomorphic yaguka nkurukurikirane rwimbaraga. Urukurikirane rwa Laurent rutanga imbaraga zitari nziza - ingenzi hafi yubumwe (inkingi, ubuke bwa ngombwa).
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp3: Ibisigisigi bya theorem: ∮_C f (z) dz = 2πi × Σ Res (f, zₖ) kuri pole zose zₖ imbere muri C. Ibisigara kuri pole yoroshye z₀: Res = lim_ {z → z₀} (z - z₀) f (z). Byakoreshejwe mugusuzuma ibyuzuye muburyo bwo guhitamo neza.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp4: Ikarita ihuriweho: imikorere ya holomorphic hamwe na zeru zikomoka kuri zeru zibika inguni zaho. Guhindura Möbius ikarita izenguruka / imirongo kumuzingi / imirongo. Ikoreshwa mumazi ya fluid, electrostatics, hamwe namashusho.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_task: Kugenzura f (z) = z² ni holomorphic ukoresheje ingero ya Cauchy-Riemann. Kubara ∮_ {| z | = 2} dz / (z² - 1) ukoresheje theorem isigaye: shakisha inkingi, genzura ikiri imbere | z | = 2, kubara ibisigisigi, hanyuma ukoreshe theorem. Kugenzura ukoresheje ibice.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_tp0: Imikorere ya Holomorphic hamwe na C-R ingana
learnUni_physics_f2_desc: Ingano ya Maxwell ihuza amashanyarazi, magnetisme, na optique muburyo bumwe bwiza. Barahanura imiraba ya electromagnetiki igenda kuri c, bagasobanura imirasire, kandi bagize ishingiro ryubwubatsi bwose bwamashanyarazi. Kubisobanukirwa kurwego rwa vector calculus ni ikiranga uburezi bwa fiziki.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp0: Ingano ya Maxwell: ∇ · E = ρ / ε₀, ∇ · B = 0, ∇ × E = −∂B / ∂t, ∇ × B = μ₀ (J + ε₀∂E / ∂t). Hamwe na hamwe bahuza ibintu byose bya elegitoroniki ya electronique.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp1: Umuhengeri wa elegitoroniki: mumwanya wubusa, E na B uhaza ∇²E = μ₀ε₀∂²E / ∂t², utanga umuvuduko c = 1 / √ (μ₀ε₀) ≈ 3 × 10⁸ m / s. Umucyo numuyoboro wa electroniki.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp2: Poynting vector S = (1 / μ₀) E × B: icyerekezo nigipimo cyingufu za electronique. Umuvuduko wimirasire: EM imiraba itwara imbaraga p = U / c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp3: Imipaka imipaka kubintu bifatika: tangensi E na B isanzwe irakomeza. Kugena gutekereza no kugabanuka (Ingano ya Fresnel itanga amplitude; amategeko ya Snell atanga inguni).
learnUni_physics_f2_kp4: Kwaguka kwinshi: kure yikwirakwizwa ryamafaranga, imirima yiganjemo amagambo ayoboye - monopole (1 / r²), dipole (1 / r³), quadrupole (1 / r⁴). Oscillating dipole irasa EM waves - ishingiro rya antene.
learnUni_physics_f2_task: Uhereye ku buringanire bwa Maxwell muri vacuum (ρ = 0, J = 0), ikuramo ikigereranyo cya electromagnetic wave ya E. Erekana c = 1 / √ (μ₀ε₀). Noneho andika imirima yindege ikwirakwiza muri z-cyerekezo hanyuma werekane ko E, B, na k ari perpendicular kandi ko | E | / | B | = c.
learnUni_physics_f3_desc: Ubukanishi bwibarurishamibare bukura macroscopique ya termodinamike ituruka kumyitwarire yimibare yibigize microscopique. Ikwirakwizwa rya Boltzmann, imikorere yo kugabana, hamwe na entropiya nkibiti bya microstate bihuza fiziki ya atome nibintu bya buri munsi byubushyuhe - kuva imirasire yumubiri wumukara kugeza guhinduka.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp0: Ikwirakwizwa rya Boltzmann: amahirwe ya microstate n'imbaraga E ni P ∝ e ^ {- E / k_BT}. Ubushyuhe bwo hejuru butuma akazi gakomeye cyane. Iri gereranya rimwe rishingiye kuri chimie, astrofizike, na biologiya.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp1: Imikorere y'ibice Z = Σᵢ e ^ {- βEᵢ} (β = 1 / k_BT). Ingufu z'ubuntu F = −k_BT ln Z. Ingano zose za termodinamike zikurikira: ⟨E⟩ = −∂ln Z / ∂β, entropy S = −∂F / ∂T, igitutu P = −∂F / ∂V.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp2: Boltzmann entropy: S = k_B ln Ω (Ω = umubare wa microstate). Amategeko ya kabiri: Ω yiyongera ubwayo → S burigihe yiyongera muri sisitemu yihariye. Umwambi wigihe uva mumibare.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp3: Imibare ya Quantum: amabere yumvira ikwirakwizwa rya Bose-Einstein (ibice byinshi kuri leta → birenze urugero, laseri, kanseri ya Bose-Einstein). Fermion yumvira Fermi-Dirac (imwe kuri leta structure imiterere ya electron yibyuma, umwijima wera, inyenyeri za neutron).
learnUni_physics_f3_kp4: Icyiciro cyinzibacyuho: ku bushyuhe bukomeye Tc, gutondekanya ibipimo bisimbuka (gahunda ya 1) cyangwa kuzamuka ubudahwema (icyiciro cya 2). Ising moderi ifata ferromagnetism. Hafi yingingo zikomeye: amategeko yo gupima isi yose, uburebure butandukanye, amasomo rusange.
learnUni_physics_f3_task: Kuramo ibikorwa byo kugabana sisitemu yo murwego ebyiri (ingufu 0 na ε). Shakisha ⟨E⟩, C_V = ∂⟨E⟩ / ∂T, na entropy S. Igishushanyo C_V na T (Impinga ya Schottky). Sobanura impinga kumubiri. Koresha ibintu bya Boltzmann kugereranya agace ka molekile muburyo bushimishije kuri T = 300 K niba ε = 0.025 eV.
learnUni_physics_f3_tp1: Entropy hamwe n amategeko ya kabiri
learnUni_physics_f4_desc: Ubukanishi bwa Quantum nigeragezwa ryukuri ryibintu bifatika, bikosora ahantu 12 icumi mubyahanuwe QED. Isimbuza inzira za kera na fonctionnement igenda ihinduka munsi ya Schrödinger ikanasobanura atom, molekile, laseri, semiconductor, na scaneri ya MRI. Biratangaje cyane na filozofiya.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp0: Imikorere ya Wave x (x, t): | ψ | ² nubucucike bushoboka. Ubusanzwe: ∫ | ψ | ² dx = 1. Ubwihindurize bwigihe: iℏ ∂ψ / ∂t = Ĥψ. Guhagarara bivuga: Ĥψ_n = E_n ψ_n - ingufu eigenstates.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp1: Umwanya utagira ingano neza: ψ_n = √ (2 / L) icyaha (nπx / L), E_n = n²π²ℏ² / (2mL²). Urwego rwingufu zingana - rusobanura atomike. Ingufu za zeru E₁> 0 no kuri T = 0.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp2: Oscillator ya Quantum ihuza: E_n = (n + ½) ℏω, n = 0,1,2, ... Kuzamura / kugabanya abakora â €. Imiterere yubutaka ifite imikorere ya Gaussian. Icyitegererezo cya molekulari yinyeganyeza hamwe numwanya wa kwanta.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp3: Hydrogene atom: muburyo bwa Coulomb bushoboka. Ibisubizo byanditswe na numero ya numero n (ingufu), l (umuvuduko w'inguni), m (magnetique). Imiterere ya orbital (s, p, d, f) igena guhuza imiti.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp4: Entanglement na Bell's theorem: ibice bibiri birashobora guhuzwa muburyo budashobora gusobanurwa nibihinduka byihishe. Ubusumbane bw inzogera bwarenze kubigeragezo - byerekana ko atari mukanishi wa kwantike. Shingiro rya kwant kode.
learnUni_physics_f4_task: Gukemura neza 1D itagira ingano: andika ψ_n na E_n. Kubara E₁ kuri electron muri L = 1 nm neza. Agace kateguwe muri ψ = (1 / √2) (ψ₁ + ψ₂). (a) Iyi ni ingufu zidasanzwe? (b) Kubara ⟨E⟩. (c) Sobanura uburyo ⟨x⟩ ihinduka mugihe. (d) Sobanura uko bigenda iyo upimye ingufu.
learnUni_physics_f4_tp0: Imikorere ya Wave na Schrödinger ingero
learnUni_physics_f4_tp1: Oscillator ya Harmonic na hydrogen atom
learnUni_physics_f5_desc: Amashanyarazi agezweho afata urumuri haba nka electromagnetic wave (wave optique) ndetse na fotone (kwant optique). Wave optique isobanura kwivanga, gutandukana, hamwe na polarisiyasi neza. Photonics - siyanse n'ikoranabuhanga byo kubyara no kugenzura - bishimangira lazeri, fibre optique, ingirabuzimafatizo z'izuba, hamwe na tekinoroji ya kwant igaragara.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp0: Umuhengeri wa optique: kwivanga no gutandukana bituruka ku ihame rya Huygens-Fresnel (buri murongo wimbere ni isoko ya kabiri). Umusore wikubye kabiri atanga intera Δy = λL / d.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp1: Fourier optique: lens ikora impinduka ya Fourier mu ndege yibanze. Akayunguruzo k'ahantu - guhagarika imirongo imwe n'imwe - ni ishingiro ryo gutunganya amashusho na microscopi.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp2: Ububiko bwa Laser: guhinduranya kwabaturage kugerwaho na pompe optique cyangwa amashanyarazi. Imyuka ihumanya ibyara itanga urumuri, rukomatanya, urumuri rwerekezo. Umuyoboro wa Laser uhitamo uburyo. Porogaramu: kubaga, lidar, optique ya optique, scan ya barcode.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp3: Fibre optique: kugaragariza imbere imbere (inguni> inguni ikomeye θ_c = arcsin (n₂ / n₁)) imitego yumucyo muri rusange. Fibre imwe-imwe ya fibre itumanaho rirerire; uburyo-bwinshi kubirometero bigufi. Attenuation ~ 0.2 dB / km kuri 1550 nm.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp4: Quantum optique: imibare ya fotone (coherent va nubushyuhe bwumucyo wacanye), inkomoko imwe ya fotone, ifoto ya fotone ifatanye (binyuze muburyo bwihuse bwo guhinduranya). Porogaramu: kugabanganya urufunguzo rwo gukwirakwiza (protocole ya BB84), kwantum teleportasiyo.
learnUni_physics_f5_task: Gutandukanya gusya hamwe n'imirongo 500 / mm bimurikirwa nurumuri rwa λ = 600 nm. Shakisha inguni za m = 1 na m = 2 amategeko yo gutandukanya. Kubara imbaraga zo gukemura R = mN kumirongo ya N = 1000. Noneho shushanya fibre optique ifite intangiriro n₁ = 1.50 hanyuma wambike n₂ = 1.45: shakisha inguni nini na aperture numero NA = √ (n₁² - n₂²).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_desc: Ubuhanga bwa chimie bukoresha fiziki - thermodynamic, kinetics, quantum mechanics - kuri sisitemu yimiti. Irasobanura impamvu reaction zibaho (thermodynamic), uburyo zihuta (kinetics), niki kigena imiterere ya molekile (chimie chimique). Nibisobanuro byibanze bya chimie yose.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp0: Gibbs imbaraga zubusa: ΔG = ΔH - TΔS. ΔG <0: ubwayo; ΔG> 0: bidaturutse; ΔG = 0: kuringaniza. Kuringaniza: ΔG ° = −RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp1: Imiti yimiti: igipimo = k [A] ᵐ [B] ⁿ. Urutonde rwa mbere: t₁ / ₂ = ln2 / k. Ikigereranyo cya Arrhenius: k = Ae ^ {- Ea / RT}. Inzibacyuho ya leta yinzibacyuho: igipimo cyagenwe na ΔG ‡ (Gibbs ingufu zinzibacyuho).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp2: Molecular orbital theory: atomic orbitals ihuza (LCAO) kugirango ihuze (ingufu zo hasi) na antibonding (ingufu zisumba izindi) MOs. Urutonde rwinguzanyo = ½ (guhuza - antibonding electron).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp3: Spectroscopy: UV-Vis (Byeri-Lambert: A = εcl, inzibacyuho ya elegitoronike), IR (vibrasi ya molekulari - imikorere yintoki zitsinda), NMR (ibidukikije bya spin bitanga ibidukikije bihuza na stereochemie), icyerekezo rusange (misile ya molekile no gucamo ibice).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp4: Ibintu bifatika (biterwa numubare wibice bya solute, ntabwo ari indangamuntu): ubutumburuke bwo hejuru (ΔT_b = K_b m), kwiheba gukonje (ΔT_f = K_f m), umuvuduko wa osmotic (Π = MRT). Ikoreshwa muri cryoscopy na osmometrie.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_task: Kubisubizo N₂ + 3H₂ → 2NH₃ kuri 298 K, ΔH ° = −92 kJ / mol na ΔS ° = −198 J / mol · K. (a) Kubara ΔG ° na K. (b) Ese reaction ihita kuri 298 K? Kuri 600 K? (c) Sobanura uburyo ubushyuhe nigitutu bigira ingaruka kumusaruro mubikorwa bya Haber. Isano ihame rya Le Chatelier.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_tp2: Spectroscopy na molekulari ya orbital teoriya
learnUni_chemistry_f1_desc: Kaminuza ya chimie ya kaminuza yiga uburyo bwa reaction kurwego rwa electron, stereochemie, igenamigambi rya synthesis, hamwe no guhindura amatsinda. Ubuhanga ni ngombwa kuri farumasi, ibikoresho bya siyansi, ibinyabuzima, na biologiya y’ibinyabuzima.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp0: Gufata imyambi ifatika: imitwe yuzuye imyambi yerekana icyerekezo cya electron (nucleophile to electrophile). Igice cyumutwe wimyambi yerekana uburyo bukomeye. Umwambi wose ugomba guhera kumasoko ya electron (jyenyine cyangwa umurunga).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp1: Uburyo bwa SN2: guhuriza hamwe intambwe imwe yinyuma inyuma → guhinduranya iboneza (Walden inversion). Ukunzwe: nucleophile ikomeye, substrate yibanze, polar aprotic solvent (DMF, DMSO, acetone).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp2: SN1 uburyo: intambwe ebyiri zinyuze hagati ya karbokasi. Bikunzwe: substrate yo hejuru, polar protic solvent (amazi, Ethanol). Igipimo = k [substrate] gusa. Atanga ivanguramoko.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp3: Stereochemie: ibigo bya chiral, enantiomers, diastereomers. Cahn-Ingold-Prelog (CIP) amategeko agena iboneza R / S. Igikorwa cyiza gipimwa na polarimetry. Thalidomide: R-enantiomer ivura, S-enantiomer teratogenic - akamaro ko kwera kwa stereochemiki.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp4: Isesengura rya retrosynthetic (Corey): gahunda yogusubiramo inyuma - menya gutandukana (kumena imiyoboro yingenzi) kugirango ugaragaze ibikoresho byoroshye gutangira. Kurinda ingamba zitsinda, imikorere yitsinda ryimikorere, hamwe na okiside ya leta ikurikirana nubuhanga bwingenzi.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_task: Tanga uburyo bwuzuye hamwe n'imyambi igoramye kuri: (a) SN2 reaction ya (R) -2-bromobutane hamwe na NaOH - yerekana ibicuruzwa, (b) SN1 reaction ya (CH₃) ₃CBr n'amazi - herekana karbokasi, ivanguramoko, hamwe na stereoisomers y'ibicuruzwa. Sobanura impamvu substrate imwe idashobora kunyura muburyo bumwe icyarimwe.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_desc: Ubutabire bwa chimie bukubiyemo chimie yo guhuza, organometallike, ibikoresho bikomeye-na chimie bioinorganic. Inzibacyuho hamwe na chimie ikungahaye ya d-orbital ishingiye kuri catalizike yinganda, ibikoresho bikora, hamwe nibinyabuzima byingenzi.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp0: Guhuza ibice: icyuma cyo hagati ion + ligands (Lewis base itanga electroni ebyiri). Ingaruka ya Chelate: polydentate ligands (EDTA) ikora ibintu bihamye kuruta monodentate - inyungu ya termodinamike kuva entropiya.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp1: Crystal field theory (CFT): d-orbitals igabanijwe mumurima wa ligand. Gutandukanya Octahedral Δ_o itandukanya t₂g (hepfo) na e_g (hejuru). Imirima ikomeye ligands (CN⁻, CO) → nini Δ_o → kuzunguruka hasi. Intege nke (F⁻, H₂O) → ntoya Δ_o → kuzunguruka cyane.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp2: Ibara na magnetisme kuva CFT: d-d inzibacyuho ikurura urumuri rugaragara color ibara ryuzuzanya ryagaragaye. Ibice byinshi bizunguruka ni paramagnetic (electroni zidakorewe); hasi-spin ni diamagnetic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp3: Ubuhanga bwa chimie Organometallic: ibyuma-karubone (ibyuma bya karubone M (CO) ₙ, metallocène, catalizike ya Wilkinson [RhCl (PPh₃) ₃] ya hydrogenation). 18-amategeko ya elegitoronike ahanura ituze ryimiterere ya organometallic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp4: Chimie ya bioinorganic: Fe muri hemoglobine (reversible O₂ binding), cluster ya Fe-S (transfert ya electron), Zn muri anhydrase ya karubone, Mg muri chlorophyll (photosynthesis), Cu muri cytochrome c oxydease (guhumeka), Co muri Vitamine B₁₂.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_task: Shushanya igishushanyo mbonera cya octahedral kuri [Fe (CN) ₆] ³⁻ na [Fe (H₂O) ₆] ³⁺. Shinga electroni ukoresheje CFT, menyesha imiterere ya spin numubare wa electron zidakorewe kuri buri. Vuga ikurura urumuri rwinshi-n'impamvu. Kubara okiside ya Fe muri buri kigo hanyuma umenye ligande nkumurima ukomeye cyangwa udakomeye ukoresheje urukurikirane rwimikorere.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_desc: Ubuhanga bwa chimie butanga ibikoresho byo kumenya ibintu no gupima ubunini bwabyo muri matriche igoye. Ubuhanga bugezweho bwo gusesengura - HPLC, GC-MS, NMR, kwinjiza atome - ni ntangarugero mu miti ya farumasi, gukurikirana ibidukikije, umutekano w’ibiribwa, ubutabera, no gusuzuma indwara.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp0: Isesengura rya Titrimetric: aside-ishingiro, complexometric (EDTA), redox, hamwe nimitwe yimvura. Kumenya amaherezo-yerekana: ibipimo, metero pH, conductimetry, potentiometrie. Ibisubizo bisanzwe, ibipimo byibanze, hamwe ninyuma-titre.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp1: Chromatografiya: icyiciro gihagaze gisubiza ibice bitandukanye. GC. Icyemezo R = 2 (t₂ - t₁) / (w₁ + w₂).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp2: Mass spectrometrie: ionisation ya electron (EI) itanga cadical radical ibice biranga. Ikirenga-MS itanga formulaire ya molekulari. LC-MS / MS itanga amahitamo ya matrices igoye.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp3: NMR spectroscopy: ¹H NMR: guhinduranya imiti (δ, ppm) yerekana ibidukikije, guhuza (J, Hz) byerekana guhuza H byegeranye, kwishyira hamwe bitanga igipimo cyubwoko bwa H. TechniquesC NMR na 2D tekinike (COZY, HMBC, NOESY) igena imiterere ya 3D yuzuye.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp4: Kwemeza uburyo: imipaka yo gutahura (LOD), imipaka yo kugereranya (LOQ), umurongo (R²), ubunyangamugayo (% gukira), ibisobanuro (RSD%), guhitamo (nta kwivanga), gukomera (kubyara muri laboratoire). Birasabwa gutanga amabwiriza (FDA, EMA).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_task: Ikomatanyirizo ritazwi ryerekana: MW = 122 na MS; IR: ubugari bwa OH burambuye 3200–3500, karubone 1680 cm⁻¹; ¹H NMR: δ 7.8 (d, 2H), 7.5 (d, 2H), 3.9 (s, 3H). Tanga imiterere. Emeza buri kwitegereza. Noneho sobanura uburyo wakwemeza uburyo bwa HPLC kugirango ugereranye iyi compound muri tablet ya farumasi.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_desc: Ibinyabuzima byiga uburyo bwimiti yubuzima - enzyme catalizike, inzira ya metabolike, kwigana ADN, hamwe na selile. Ikiraro cya chimie nubuvuzi: gusobanukirwa enzyme kinetics ifasha gukora ibiyobyabwenge; gusobanukirwa metabolism igaragaza intego zo kuvura diyabete, kanseri, n'umubyibuho ukabije; Ibinyabuzima bya ADN bishimangira guhindura gene CRISPR.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp0: Enzyme kinetics: Ikigereranyo cya Michaelis-Menten v = Vmax [S] / (Km + [S]). Km: substrate yibanze kuri kimwe cya kabiri cyumuvuduko - byerekana isano ya enzyme-substrate. Vmax: igipimo ntarengwa cyo kuzuza substrate. Umurongo ugizwe na Lineweaver-Burk umugambi (1 / v. 1 / [S]).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp1: Enzyme kubuza: kurushanwa (inhibitor ihuza urubuga rukora, byongera Km igaragara, Vmax idahindutse); kudahiganwa (inhibitor ihuza ahandi, igabanya Vmax, Km idahindutse); bidasubirwaho (covalent - aspirine acetylates COX burundu).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp2: Metabolism: catabolism (glucose → 2 pyruvate ikoresheje glycolysis, 2 ATP; Krebs cycle 2 ATP; okiside fosifori ~ 32 ATP ikoresheje proton gradient hakurya ya mitochondrial imbere). Igiteranyo ≈36 ATP kuri glucose.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp3: Ibinyabuzima bya ADN: ibinyabuzima bibiri byahinduwe na Watson-Crick base base (A: T, G: C) hamwe no gutondekanya (π-π imikoranire). Kwigana ADN igice cya conservateur: ADN polymerase yongeraho 5 '→ 3', bisaba primer (RNA). Igipimo cyamakosa ~ 1 muri 10⁹ nyuma yo gusuzuma.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp4: Imiterere ya poroteyine no kuzunguruka: primaire (urukurikirane rwa aminide acide) → icya kabiri (α-helix: H-bonds i kugeza i + 4; Chaperone ifasha kuzinga; kubeshya bitera indwara (Alzheimer, Parkinson, indwara za prion).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_task: Enzyme ifite Km = 2 mM na Vmax = 60 μ mol / min. (a) Kubara v kuri [S] = 1, 2, 6 mM. . (c) Igishushanyo mbonera cyibiyobyabwenge: tekereza uburyo ubumenyi bwimikorere ya enzyme ya site ya geometrie ishobora kuyobora igishushanyo mbonera-cya analogue inhibitor.
learnUni_biology_f2_desc: Ibidukikije bya kaminuza bikoresha urugero rwinshi mubikorwa byabaturage, imikoranire yubwoko, nimikorere yibidukikije. Kubungabunga urusobe rw'ibinyabuzima rukoresha inyigisho z’ibidukikije - umubare muto w’abaturage bashoboka, igishushanyo mbonera, ibidukikije bya koridor - kurinda urusobe rw’ibinyabuzima ku isi irimo guhinduka vuba kw’ibidukikije.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp0: Icyitegererezo cyabaturage: ubwiyongere bwibikoresho dN / dt = rN (1 - N / K) aho r ari igipimo cyimbere cyo kwiyongera kandi K itwara ubushobozi. Umusaruro ntarengwa urambye (MSY) wasaruwe kuri N = K / 2 aho dN / dt ari ntarengwa.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp1: Lotka-Volterra inyamanswa-umuhigo: dN / dt = rN - aNP (umuhigo); dP / dt = baNP - mP (inyamanswa). Abaturage baranyeganyega - byerekanwe na data ya hare-lynx. Isesengura rihamye binyuze muri eigenvalues ​​ya Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp2: Ikirwa cya biogeografiya (MacArthur & Wilson): S_eq uhereye kuringaniza ryimuka (kugabanuka hamwe na S) no kuzimangana (kwiyongera hamwe na S). Ibirwa binini, byegeranye bifite amoko menshi yo mu bwoko → Impaka za SLOSS mugushushanya.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp3: Metapopulation theory (Levins): urusobe rwabaturage baho bahujwe no gutatana. Igice cyafashwe ibice p bigenda bihinduka: dp / dt = cp (1 - p) - ep. Gutura ibintu byingenzi munsi yisi kuzimangana byanze bikunze.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp4: Kubungabunga genomics: ibikoresho byerekeranye nubwoko bwabaturage (FST, umubare munini wabaturage Ne, coefficient F) yerekana ubwoko butandukanye bwabantu, gupima imigendekere ya gene, no gusuzuma indwara yanduye muri gahunda yo korora imbohe.
learnUni_biology_f2_task: Abaturage b'impyisi 200 (K = 1000, r = 0.3 / yr) basarurwa buri mwaka. (a) Kubara umuvuduko wubwiyongere bwabaturage kuri N = 200 no kuri MSY. (b) Ni ibihe bisarurwa byumwaka bingana niterambere ryikura muri MSY? (c) Abaturage ba kabiri ku kirwa kibanyi bafite Ne = 15 - ni izihe ngaruka ibi bihura nabyo, kandi ni ibihe bikorwa byo kubungabunga bikwiye?
learnUni_biology_f2_tp2: Ikirwa cya biogeografiya no kubungabunga genomika
learnUni_biology_f3_desc: Ibinyabuzima by'utugari ku rwego rwa kaminuza bikora iperereza ku kwanduza ibimenyetso, ingirabuzimafatizo, epigenetika, hamwe na molekile y'indwara. Ibinyabuzima bigezweho - PCR, clone ya gene, RNA-seq, CRISPR - itanga ibikoresho byo gusoma, kwandika, no guhindura genome. Izi tekinoroji zirimo guhindura ubuvuzi, ubuhinzi, na siyansi yibanze.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp0: Kugenzura ingirabuzimafatizo: cycle na CDKs (cyclin-biterwa na kinase) itwara ingirabuzimafatizo. Inhibitori ya CDK (p21, p27) ikora nka feri. Rb ikibyimba suppressor ikurikirana E2F ibintu byandikirwa kugeza fosifora na Cyclin D-CDK4 / 6.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp1: Inzira yo gutambutsa ibimenyetso: RTK (reseptor tyrosine kinase) gukora → RAS / MAPK cascade → transcription factor fosifora → imvugo ihinduka. PI3K / Akt / mTOR inzira: gukura no kubaho. Byombi bikunze guhinduka muri kanseri.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp2: Epigenetics: impinduka zikomoka kumagambo ya gene nta ADN ikurikirana. Guhindura amateka ya Histone (acetylation - ikora; methylation - ishingiye ku miterere), methylation ya ADN (CpG methylation icecekesha genes), chromatin ivugurura. Epigenetike isubiramo muri embryogenez na kanseri.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp3: Ibinyabuzima bya RNA: gutera (spliceosomes ikuraho intore), gutera ubundi buryo (gene imwe → poroteyine nyinshi - ~ 95% ya genes zabantu zindi zikoreshwa), RNA idafite code (miRNA icecekesha mRNA, lncRNA igenga chromatine), ribozymes.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: kuyobora RNA iyobora Cas9 kumurongo ukurikirana (kuruhande rwa PAM). Cas9 ikata imirongo yombi. Gusana na NHEJ (kwibeshya-→ knockout) cyangwa HDR (inyandikorugero ed guhindura neza). Porogaramu: kuvura gene, ubuhinzi, ubushakashatsi bwibanze, gusuzuma.
learnUni_biology_f3_task: Ingirabuzimafatizo ya kanseri ifite: (1) igizwe na mutation ya RAS, (2) yasibye gene ya Rb, (3) ihinduka rya p53. Kurikirana ingaruka za molekuline ya buri mutation unyuze mu ngirabuzimafatizo no kwerekana inzira. Menya: igenzura ryananiranye kuri buri, ingaruka ziterwa no gukwirakwiza selile, hamwe nuburyo bubiri bwo kuvura bwibasiye izo nenge.
learnUni_biology_f4_desc: Neuroscience ihuza ibinyabuzima bya molekuline, physiologiya, na psychologiya kugirango isobanure uburyo ubwonko butanga imyitwarire. Kuva kumuyoboro wa ion kugera kumyuka mitsi kugeza kumitekerereze, nimwe mumipaka igoye kandi ishimishije mubinyabuzima. Indwara zifata ubwonko zifata umuntu 1 kuri 6 kwisi yose - kubisobanukirwa bisaba ubumenyi bwimbitse kumiterere yubwonko n'imikorere.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp0: Ubushobozi bwibikorwa: depolarisation yambukiranya ifungura umuyoboro wa voltage wa Na⁺ (depolarisation yihuse kuri +40 mV) → kudakora imiyoboro ya Na⁺ + gufungura imiyoboro ya K⁺ (repolarisation) → hyperpolarisation (igihe cyo kwanga). Byose-cyangwa-ntakintu, ikwirakwiza nta kugabanuka kuruhande rwa axon.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp1: Ihererekanyabubasha: Ca²⁺ yinjira itera SNARE-yunganiwe na viticle fusion → neurotransmitter irekura → postynaptic reseptor binding. Ionotropique yakira (AMPA, GABA_A): ion yihuta. Metabotropic reseptors (mGluR, β-adrenergic): gazi ya G-protein itinda.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp2: Ipasitike ya synaptique: LTP (potentiation y'igihe kirekire) - NMDA yakira impanuka ya reseptor (bisaba guhuza glutamate NA postynaptic depolarisation) → Kwinjiza reseptor ya AMPA → byongera imbaraga za synaptic. Molecular ishingiro yo kwiga no kwibuka.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp3: Imiyoboro ya Neural: ishimishije (glutamatergic) na inhibitori (GABAergic) neuron ikora imirongo isubiramo. E / I kuringaniza: guhungabana bitera igicuri (kwishima birenze) cyangwa anesteziya (kubuza birenze). Oscillations (theta, gamma) ikubiyemo amakuru kandi igahuza uturere twubwonko.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp4: Uburyo bw'indwara zifata ubwonko: Alzheimer's (amyloide-β plaque ihagarika kwanduza synaptic; tau hyperphosphorylation ihungabanya microtubules death urupfu rwa neuronal), Parkinson (igihombo cya dopaminergique neuron muri substantia nigra; α-synuclein Lewy umubiri), Huntington (kwagura polyglutamine).
learnUni_biology_f4_task: Wandika muri neuron ya hippocampal. Umuvuduko mwinshi wa neuron ya presynaptic itera LTP. Sobanura intambwe-ku-ntambwe ibyabaye kuri molekulari: Gukora kwa NMDA kwakirwa, ibimenyetso bya Ca²⁺, gukora CaMKII, gukora fosifora ya AMPA no kwinjiza, hamwe nimpinduka ndende. Noneho sobanura impamvu guhagarika reseptor ya NMDA birinda LTP gushiraho.
learnUni_biology_f5_desc: Immunology ni ubushakashatsi bwuburyo bwo kwirinda umubiri. Ubudahangarwa bw'umubiri butandukanya ubwikunde, bwangiza virusi na kanseri, kandi butera kwibuka indwara. Dysregulation itera indwara ziterwa na autoimmune, allergie, na immunodeficiency. Ubudahangarwa bugezweho - kugenzura ibiyobora, selile CAR-T, inkingo za mRNA - bihindura imiti.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp0: Ubudahangarwa bushya: kwakirwa byerekana imiterere (PRRs, urugero: Kwakira nka Terefone) byerekana imiterere ya molekile ifitanye isano na virusi (PAMPs). Koresha NF-κB → cytokine ikongora (IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β). Uzuza cascade opsonises na lyses pathogens.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp1: Ubudahangarwa bw'imihindagurikire y'ikirere: ingirabuzimafatizo zitanga antigen (selile dendritic, macrophage) zitunganya antigene kandi zigatanga peptide kuri MHC I (kuri CD8⁺ cytotoxic T selile) cyangwa MHC II (kuri CD4⁺ ifasha T selile). Guhitamo clone no kwagura antigen yihariye ya lymphocytes.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp2: B gukora selile na antibodies: Gukora biterwa na T bisaba umufasha T selile (CD40L-CD40 imikoranire + cytokine). Germinal center reaction: hypermutation somatike + gukura kwa affinity + guhinduranya ibyiciro (IgM → IgG, IgA, IgE). Memory B selile ikomeza kumyaka.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp3: Kwihanganira ubudahangarwa hamwe na autoimmunité: kwihanganira hagati - autoreactive T selile yasibwe muri thymus (guhitamo nabi). Kwihanganirana kwa periferique - kugenzura T selile (Tregs) guhagarika selile autoreactive. Kunanirwa: sisitemu ya lupus erythematosus, rubagimpande ya rubagimpande, diyabete yo mu bwoko bwa 1.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp4: Kanseri ikingira indwara: PD-1 / PD-L1 igenzura ikumira ibibyimba birinda ikibyimba → T selile reaction (pembrolizumab, nivolumab - Igihembo cyitiriwe Nobel 2018). CAR-T ivura selile: injeniyeri umurwayi T selile hamwe na chimeric antigen reseptor yibasira ikibyimba antigen - ibisubizo bitangaje muri B selile leukemia.
learnUni_biology_f5_task: Umurwayi agaragaza indwara ziterwa na bagiteri kandi urugero rwa immunoglobuline nkeya. Amaraso ya periferique yerekana selile B idahari ariko selile T zisanzwe. Suzuma ubudahangarwa bw'umubiri (X-ihuza agammaglobulinaemia - mutation ya BTK). Sobanura ishingiro rya molekuline: uburyo BTK isanzwe yerekana mugihe cyo gukura kwa B, ibitagenda neza, nuburyo imiti ikingira immunoglobuline (IVIG) ikora.
learnUni_biology_f5_tp1: Ubudahangarwa bw'umubiri hamwe na selile B
learnUni_biology_f5_tp2: Ubworoherane, autoimmunite, na kanseri ikingira indwara
learnUni_computer_science_f2_desc: Algorithms namakuru yimiterere nifatizo yibanze ya siyanse ya mudasobwa. Imiterere yukuri yamakuru ituma algorithm ikora neza; uwibeshye atuma bidashoboka. Isesengura rya Big-O, ibishushanyo mbonera, hamwe na gahunda yo gutangiza ni ibikoresho by'ibanze buri injeniyeri ya software agomba kumenya.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp0: Big-O: O (1) ihoraho, O (log n) gushakisha binary, O (n) umurongo wo gusikana, O (n log n) guhuza ubwoko, O (n²) bubble sort, O (2ⁿ) exponential. (Urubanza rwiza), Θ (imipaka ifatanye). Isesengura ryahinduwe kubikorwa bya dinamike.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp1: Imiterere yibanze: array (O (1) kwinjira), urutonde ruhujwe (O (1) shyiramo umutwe), imbonerahamwe ya hash (impuzandengo O (1) ops zose), BST (O (log n) iringaniye), ikirundo (O (log n) shyiramo / ikuramo), trie (ibikorwa byibanze byambere).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp2: Igishushanyo mbonera: BFS (inzira ngufi itaremereye, O (V + E)), DFS (cycle cycle, ubwoko bwa topologiya), Dijkstra (inzira ngufi iremereye, O ((V + E) log V)), Bellman-Ford (uburemere bubi, O (VE)), Floyd-Warshall (bombi, O (V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp3: Dynamic programming: optimal substructure + overlapping subproblems. Kwibuka (hejuru-hasi) na tabulation (hasi-hejuru). Ibibazo bya kera: 0/1 Knapsack, LCS, Hindura Intera, Kugwiza Urunigi rwa Matrix, Guhindura ibiceri.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp4: NP-yuzuye: P (igihe kinini gishobora gukemurwa), NP (igihe kinini gishobora kugenzurwa). NP-ibibazo byuzuye (SAT, TSP, Clique) - nta algorithm izwi cyane. Guteka-Levin theorem: SAT ni NP-yuzuye. Kugabanuka byerekana NP-gukomera.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_task: Shyira mu bikorwa algorithm ya Dijkstra (pseudocode ifite umurongo wambere) ku gishushanyo cya 6. Koresha intambwe-ku-ntambwe, werekane intera yimbonerahamwe hamwe numurongo wambere umurongo kuri buri itera. Garagaza igihe kigoye O ((V + E) log V). Noneho sobanura: niba igishushanyo cyari gifite impande mbi, kuki Dijkstra yananiwe, kandi Bellman-Ford yabikemura ate?
learnUni_computer_science_f3_desc: Sisitemu ikora nuburyo bwa software hagati yibyuma na porogaramu - gucunga inzira, kwibuka, kubika, n'umutekano. Gusobanukirwa imbere muri OS bigushoboza kwandika neza, kode ihuriweho, gusobanukirwa imikorere ya sisitemu, no gushushanya sisitemu yatanzwe neza.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp0: Inzira nu murongo: inzira ifite umwanya wihariye wa adresse numutungo; insanganyamatsiko zisangira inzira ya adresse yumwanya. Guhindura imiterere: OS ikiza / igarura leta ya CPU (iyandikisha, PC, icyerekezo). Gahunda: FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, Icyambere, umurongo wa Multilevel.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp1: Ibyago bihuye: imiterere yubwoko, igihe ntarengwa (Imiterere ya Coffman: guhezwa hagati, gufata-gutegereza, nta kubanziriza, gutegereza umuzenguruko), inzara, ubuzima. Guhuza: mutex, semaphore, monitor (imiterere ihinduka), gusoma-kwandika ibifunga.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp2: Gucunga kwibuka: paji - gabanya umwanya wa adresse yumwanya mumapaji-manini yagenwe yashushanyije kumiterere yumubiri ukoresheje imbonerahamwe yurupapuro. TLB ikora ibisobanuro biherutse. Urupapuro rwo gusimbuza algorithms: FIFO, LRU, Isaha (amahirwe ya kabiri). Gukubita mugihe ukora set> RAM.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp3: Sisitemu ya dosiye: VFS (Virtual File System) urwego rwo gutwara. Inode: dosiye metadata + amakuru yo guhagarika amakuru. Kuzenguruka (ext4, NTFS) kugirango impanuka zihoraho. B-ibiti bikoreshwa muri HFS +, NTFS kugirango berekane ububiko. Urwego rwa RAID 0,1,5,6 - imikorere nubucuruzi burenze urugero.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp4: Ubwubatsi bwumutekano: kurinda impeta (uburyo bwabakoresha nuburyo bwa kernel, syscalls nkumupaka ugenzurwa), kugenzura ubushobozi bushingiye kugenzura, kugenzura ibyateganijwe (SELinux / AppArmor), hypervisors (ubwoko bwa 1 ibyuma byambaye ubusa: VMware ESXi, Xen; ubwoko bwa 2 bwakiriwe: VirtualBox). Ibirimwo (Docker) koresha cgroups hamwe nizina ryizina - ntabwo ari VM yukuri.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_task: Inzira eshatu zisangira umutungo R1 na R2. P1: ifite R1, ikeneye R2. P2: ifite R2, ikeneye R1. P3: ikeneye byombi. (a) Shushanya igishushanyo mbonera cyagenewe ibikoresho hanyuma umenye igihe ntarengwa. (b) Erekana leta itekanye ukoresheje Algorithm ya Banki: Max = [R1: 2, R2: 1], [R1: 1, R2: 2], [R1: 2, R2: 2]; Iraboneka = [R1: 1, R2: 1]. Shakisha uburyo bukurikirana. (c) Tanga protocole kugirango ikumire iki kibazo.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp0: Gahunda yo gutunganya no guhuriza hamwe
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp2: Sisitemu ya dosiye n'umutekano wa OS
learnUni_computer_science_f4_desc: Porogaramu yubuhanga ikoresha uburyo bwa sisitemu yo kubaka software yizewe, ishobora kugumaho, yagutse. Imikorere igezweho - Agile, DevOps, microservices, CI / CD - yahinduye uburyo software itangwa. Ibyingenzi byubuhanga - ibisabwa, ubwubatsi, ibizamini, numutekano - bikomeza kuba ngombwa utitaye kuburyo bukoreshwa.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp0: Agile (Scrum, XP, Kanban): itera ibyumweru 2 gusiganwa, guhagarara buri munsi, gusubira inyuma, gusubira inyuma. DevOps: iterambere nibikorwa byahujwe; Imiyoboro ya CI / CD (GitLab CI, Jenkins, Ibikorwa bya GitHub) ikora kubaka, kugerageza, gukoresha kuri buri cyemezo.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp1: Imiterere yububiko bwa software: ibice (UI → logique yubucuruzi access uburyo bwo kubona amakuru), microservices (serivisi yigenga yigenga ifite ububiko bwihariye, kuvugana binyuze kuri REST / gRPC / ubutumwa), itwarwa nibyabaye (serivisi zitwara ibyabaye - Kafka, RabbitMQ), CQRS + Sourcing y'ibyabaye.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp2: Igishushanyo mbonera (GoF): Kurema (Singleton, Uruganda, Umwubatsi, Prototype), Imiterere (Adapter, Umutako, Isura, Proxy), Imyitwarire (Indorerezi, Ingamba, Amabwiriza, Uburyo bw'icyitegererezo, Iterator). Menya igihe cyo gusaba - ntukarengere-injeniyeri.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp3: Ingamba zo kwipimisha: igice (cyihuta, cyitaruye - guterwa urw'agashinyaguro), kwishyira hamwe (ibice byinshi), amasezerano (guhuza API), sisitemu (iherezo-iherezo), kwemerwa (kwemeza inkuru yo gukoresha). TDD: umutuku-icyatsi-reaction. Ikizamini cya mutation kigenzura ubuziranenge bwikizamini.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp4: Umutekano mu buhanga bwa software (OWASP Top 10): inshinge (SQL, itegeko), kwemeza kuvunika, XSS, umutekano udahwitse werekana ibintu, umutekano muke. Icyitegererezo cyugarije (STRIDE), gusubiramo kode itekanye, gusikana intege nke ziterwa (Snyk, Dependabot).
learnUni_computer_science_f4_task: Shushanya kugabana kugabana: (a) Andika inkuru 5 zabakoresha hamwe nibisabwa. (b) Shushanya igishushanyo cya C4 cyubatswe (imiterere, kontineri, urwego rwibigize). (c) Menya uburyo 3 bwo gushushanya bwakoreshejwe kandi bufite ishingiro. . (e) Menya ingaruka 3 z'umutekano wa OWASP no kugabanya.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_desc: Kwiga imashini (ML) ifasha sisitemu kwigira kumakuru. Kwiga byimbitse - imiyoboro yimitsi ifite ibice byinshi - yateye intambwe mubyerekezo, ururimi, nimikino. Gusobanukirwa inyigisho za ML (kubogama-gutandukanya, ibipimo bya VC, guhora) hamwe no kwitoza (PyTorch, hyperparameter tuning, kohereza) ubu nubushobozi bwibanze mubumenyi bwa mudasobwa.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp0: Kwiga kugenzurwa: kugabanya igihombo L (θ) hejuru yamakuru yo guhugura ukoresheje intambwe igabanuka θ ← θ - α∇L. Stochastic gradient descente (SGD), Adam optimiser. Gusanzwe: L2 (kubora ibiro, kugabanya ibiro), L1 (sparsity), guta ishuri (random zeroes neurons zero mugihe cy'amahugurwa).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp1: Imyubakire y'urusobe rw'imyubakire: ihujwe rwose (yuzuye), yemeza (CNN - kugabana ibiro, guhinduranya ibisobanuro - byiza kubishusho), gusubiramo (RNN, LSTM, GRU - amakuru akurikirana), uburyo bwo kwitondera (Transformer - kwiyitaho, O (n²) bigoye, ariko birasa).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp2: Kubogama kubucuruzi-gutandukana: ikosa ryamahugurwa ≈ kubogama; ikosa ryikizamini - ikosa ryamahugurwa ≈ itandukaniro. Ntibikwiye: kubogama cyane (moderi yoroshye cyane). Birenzeho: itandukaniro ryinshi (icyitegererezo cyo gufata mu mutwe amakuru yimyitozo). Guhindura, amakuru menshi, hamwe nicyitegererezo cyoroshye adresse ikwiye.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp3: Isuzumabumenyi rirenze ukuri: kumasomo aringaniye - neza (TP / TP + FP), ibuka (TP / TP + FN), F1 = 2PR / (P + R), AUC-ROC (agace kari munsi yabakiriye ikora iranga umurongo). k-inshuro zinyuranye zitanga igereranya rikomeye.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp4: Icyitegererezo fatizo hamwe na AI ishinzwe: urugero rwururimi runini (GPT, BERT) rwabanje gutozwa kumakuru manini, rwateguwe neza kubikorwa byihariye. Kwibeshya, kubogama, no gukoresha nabi ni ingaruka zikomeye. Umuryango w’ubumwe bw’ibihugu by’Uburayi (2024) ushyira mu bikorwa sisitemu ya AI ku byago kandi ishyiraho ibisabwa mu gusaba ibyago byinshi.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_task: Wubaka ibyiyumvo byerekana (ibitekerezo byiza / bibi). Amahugurwa neza: 97%; kwemeza ukuri: 68%. (a) Suzuma ikibazo. (b) Andika tekinike 4 zo kugikemura. (c) Dataset yawe ni 90% nziza - kubara neza, neza, kwibutsa, na F1 niba ushyize mubintu byose nkibyiza. Kuki F1 ari igipimo cyiza? (d) Shushanya umurongo-wibutsa umurongo kuri moderi ebyiri hanyuma usobanure icyo wahitamo kumurimo wo gusuzuma ubuvuzi.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_tp2: Isuzuma ryibipimo hamwe ninshingano za AI
learnUni_economics_f1_desc: Microeconomics isesengura gufata ibyemezo ningo, ibigo, nisoko. Abaguzi kandi bashikamye, imiterere yisoko kuva mumarushanwa atunganijwe kugeza kuri monopole, hanze, hamwe nimikino yimikino itanga urutonde rwibanze rwo gusesengura ibiciro, ibisubizo byamasoko, ningaruka zimibereho ya politiki.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp0: Abaguzi ibitekerezo: kugwiza ibikorwa byingirakamaro kubangamira ingengo yimari. Nibyiza: MU_x / P_x = MU_y / P_y (ingirakamaro zingana kuri pound). Kutitonda umurongo + umurongo wingengo yimiterere condition imiterere ya MRS = igipimo cyibiciro.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp1: Inyigisho zifatika: inyungu nyinshi aho MR = MC. Amarushanwa atunganye: P = MR = MC muburyo buringaniye buringaniye, inyungu zubukungu zeru. Gukora bigufi: guhagarika niba P <min (AVC).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp2: Imiterere yisoko: kwiharira (MR <P, igihombo kiremereye = igihombo cyimibereho, monopole naturel igengwa nigiciro cyibiciro cyangwa igiciro-byongeye); oligopoly (Cournot - irushanwa ryinshi, Bertrand - irushanwa ryibiciro → ibiciro byigiciro).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp3: Ibicuruzwa hanze nibicuruzwa rusange: hanze mbi → kubyara umusaruro mwinshi (umusoro wa Pigouviya = MEC ikosora). Inyuma nziza → kudatanga umusaruro (inkunga ikosora). Ibicuruzwa rusange: bidakumirwa + bidahiganwa → ikibazo cyabatwara kubuntu → bidatangwa nisoko.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp4: Umukino wimikino: Nash kuringaniza (nta gutandukira inyungu imwe). Ikibazo cy'imfungwa: ingamba ziganje ziganisha kuri Pareto-munsi. Imikino isubirwamo: ubufatanye burambye hakoreshejwe ingamba zo kugabanya niba ibintu bigabanutse bihagije. Icyamunara: igiciro cya mbere (isoko iri munsi yagaciro), igiciro cya kabiri / Vickrey (ingamba ziganje zo gutanga agaciro nyako).
learnUni_economics_f1_task: Indege ebyiri zirahatanira inzira. Buriwese arashobora gushiraho Igiciro Cyinshi cyangwa gito. Matrix yo kwishyura (inyungu £ m): {H, H} = (10,10), {H, L} = (2,15), {L, H} = (15,2), {L, L} = (5,5). (a) Shakisha Nash kuringaniza. (b) Nibyiza Pareto? (c) Niba umukino usubiwemo ibihe bitarondoreka, ni ryari ubufatanye bushobora gukomeza (derive condition on factor factor)? (d) Amategeko agenga amarushanwa abona ate guhuza ibiciro byindege?
learnUni_economics_f2_desc: Econometrics itanga ibikoresho byibarurishamibare kugirango igerageze ibitekerezo byubukungu no kugereranya isano ituruka kumibare yo kureba. Gusubira inyuma kwa OLS, ibikoresho byahinduwe, hamwe nuburyo bwamakuru nuburyo bukoreshwa. 'Impinduramatwara yo kwizerwa' igezweho ishimangira kumenya neza ingaruka zitera ukoresheje ubushakashatsi karemano.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp0: OLS: gabanya Σεᵢ² kugereranya β̂ = (X'X) ⁻¹X'y. Gauss-Markov: OLS ni BLUE munsi ya endogeneity, homoskedasticité, nta multicollinearite itunganye. Kutabogama: E [β̂] = β. Guhoraho: β̂ → _p β nka n → ∞.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp1: Endogeneity: E [ε | X] ≠ 0 kubera kubogama kubogamye kubogamye, kubitera guhinduka, cyangwa ikosa ryo gupima → OLS ibogamye kandi idahuye. IV igisubizo: shakisha igikoresho Z gifitanye isano na X (akamaro: Cov (Z, X) ≠ 0) ariko ntabwo hamwe na ε (guhezwa: Cov (Z, ε) = 0).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp2: Ikibaho cyamakuru: Yᵢₜ = α + βXᵢₜ + μᵢ + εᵢₜ. Ingaruka zihamye (mubigereranya): ikuraho igihe-idahinduka idakurikiranwa itandukanyirizo μᵢ. Ingaruka zisanzwe: gukora neza niba μᵢ ntaho bihuriye na X (ikizamini: Hausman). Itandukaniro rya mbere: Δyᵢₜ = βΔxᵢₜ + Δεᵢₜ.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp3: Itandukaniro-mu-itandukaniro (DiD): gereranya no kuvura no kugenzura amatsinda mbere / nyuma yo guhindura politiki. β_DiD = (Ȳ_ {kuvura, post} - Ȳ_ {kwivuza, pre}) - (Ȳ_ {kugenzura, post} - Ȳ_ {kugenzura, pre}). Igitekerezo cyingenzi: inzira ibangikanye (ubuvuzi budahari, amatsinda yombi yaba yarahindutse kimwe).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp4: Guhagarika kwisubiraho (RD): ubuvuzi butangwa ukurikije niba impinduka ikora irenga imipaka. Gereranya ibisubizo hejuru no hepfo yo guhagarika - randomisation yaho. Ikarishye RD: byose byambuka. Fuzzy RD: gusa bamwe - koresha nk'igikoresho.
learnUni_economics_f2_task: Urashaka kugereranya ingaruka zitera uburezi bwa kaminuza kumafaranga. OLS itanga β̂ = 0.08 (8% umushahara wumwaka ku burezi). (a) Kuki OLS ishobora kubogama? (b) Tanga igikoresho - vuga impamvu yujuje ibisabwa no gukumira. (c) Sobanura ingamba za DiD ukoresheje igeragezwa risanzwe (urugero: guhindura amafaranga y'ishuri) hamwe n'ibitekerezo bisa. (d) Sobanura igishushanyo mbonera cyo guhagarika icyiciro cya bourse.
learnUni_economics_f3_desc: Ubukungu bwimyitwarire bukubiyemo ubushishozi bwimitekerereze yisesengura ryubukungu. Abantu ntibashyira mu gaciro neza - birinda igihombo, kubogama-kubogama, guterwa no gushiraho n'imibereho. Uku gutandukana kurahanurwa kandi kuri gahunda, bituma hashyirwaho politiki nziza binyuze mumutwe no guhitamo imyubakire.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp0: Prospect theory (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979): abantu basuzuma ibyagezweho ugereranije ningingo yerekanwe. Igikorwa cyagaciro: guhuriza hamwe inyungu (kwanga ingaruka), guhuza igihombo (gushaka ibyago), gukomera kubihombo kuruta inyungu (λ ≈ 2 - coefficient de la devis).
learnUni_economics_f3_kp1: Uburemere bushoboka: abantu baremereye cyane amahirwe make (asobanura tombora nubwishingizi) hamwe nuburemere buke buke. Cumulative prospect theory ikora tombora.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp2: Kubogama kurubu: quasi-hyperbolic kugabanya U = u₀ + βΣδᵗuₜ hamwe na β <1. Bitanga igihe kidahuye - gahunda zakozwe ubu ntizizakurikizwa. Irasobanura kurya cyane, kubika bike, gutebya. Abize neza bazi ko babogamye; naives ntabwo - ibisobanuro bitandukanye bya politiki.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp3: Igitekerezo cya Nudge (Thaler & Sunstein, 2008): ubwubatsi bwo guhitamo bushiraho ibyemezo bitabujije umudendezo. Amategeko asanzwe (pansiyo auto-kwiyandikisha), ubutumwa busanzwe ('ingo nyinshi zishyura mugihe'), no koroshya kugabanya inzitizi kumyitwarire yifuzwa.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp4: Ubukungu bwubushakashatsi hamwe na RCTs: laboratoire ya laboratoire igeragezwa muburyo bugenzurwa. Ubushakashatsi bwakorewe mu murima (RCTs) kwipimisha kubipimo. Randomistas (Banerjee, Duflo - Nobel 2019) yahinduye ubukungu bwiterambere mu kugerageza byimazeyo ingamba zihariye.
learnUni_economics_f3_task: Tanga icyerekezo kibogamye (β = 0.7, δ = 0.95) uhitamo niba ukora siporo uyumunsi (igiciro c = 5 ibikoresho) kubwinyungu zizaza (B = 10 ibikoresho byakiriwe mucyumweru gitaha). (a) Umuntu ku giti cye arateganya ku cyumweru gukora imyitozo kuwa mbere? (b) Iyo kuwa mbere ugeze, bakora imyitozo? (c) Sobanura igihe kidahuye. (d) Tegura igikoresho cyo kwiyemeza kubafasha, no kugereranya nigihano cyamafaranga.
learnUni_economics_f4_desc: Iterambere ry'ubukungu ryiga ibitera ubukene na politiki iteza imbere iterambere. Ubukungu bwiterambere bugezweho bwavuye mubitekerezo bikomeye byerekeza ku bimenyetso bifatika bifatika - ukoresheje RCT, ubushakashatsi karemano, hamwe namakuru makuru. Urwego rujyanye no gukura, ibigo, ubuzima, uburezi, nubusumbane.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp0: Gukura icyitegererezo cyo gukura: Y = AK ^ α L ^ {1 - α}. Leta ihamye: ishoramari = guta agaciro; igipimo cyo kuzigama no kwiyongera kwabaturage bigena igipimo cya K / L. Kugabanuka kugaruka → guhuza ibintu. Ibisigisigi A (ibintu byose bitanga umusaruro) itera gukura igihe kirekire - ariko ni exogenous muri Solow.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp1: Gukura kwa endogenous (Romer 1990): ubumenyi K̃ yinjira mubikorwa bitagabanya inyungu. Urwego R&D rutanga ibitekerezo bishya. Ubumenyi busesekara (butarwanya, butarimo igice) → kudatanga udushya nta kurinda IP cyangwa inkunga ya R&D.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp2: Inzego niterambere (Acemoglu & Robinson): ibigo birimo (uburenganzira bwumutungo, kugendera kumategeko, amasoko arushanwa) biteza imbere iterambere. Inzego zivoma (umurage wabakoloni - impfu zimuka zashizeho ibigo byabakoloni) umutego mubihugu mubukene. Ibyingenzi byamateka - gutsimbarara.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp3: RCTs mu iterambere: Duflo & Banerjee (Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab, J-PAL) bakoresha RCT kugirango basuzume ibikorwa byihariye - kwangiza, inguzanyo ziciriritse, kohereza amafaranga ateganijwe, ifumbire mvaruganda. Ibisubizo akenshi biratangaje - inyigisho idafite amakuru ayobya.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp4: Imitego yubukene hamwe na CCT: imitego yubukene ituruka kubiciro byagenwe byishoramari (uburezi, ubuzima, ifumbire) ingo zidafite amikoro make zidashobora kwigurira, bikabuza kongera umusaruro. Kohereza amafaranga asabwa (Oportunidades yo muri Mexico, Bolsa Família yo muri Berezile) itanga amafaranga yinjiza mu ishuri no mu buvuzi - guca umutego n'ingaruka zapimwe.
learnUni_economics_f4_task: Gereranya Koreya yepfo na Nijeriya: byombi byari bifite urwego rwinjiza (~ $ 300 GDP / umuturage) mumwaka wa 1960. Muri 2023 Koreya yepfo ifite ~ $ 33,000, Nijeriya ~ $ 2100. Gukoresha (a) Gukemura icyitegererezo - ni ubuhe buryo bwo kuzigama no gutandukanya imari yabantu bisobanura gutandukana? (b) Icyitegererezo cya Romer - ni gute ubushobozi bwo guhanga udushya? (c) Acemoglu & Robinson - gereranya amateka ya gikoroni n'inzira z'inzego. Kurangiza hamwe nibimenyetso bishingiye kuri politiki isabwa muri Nigeriya, ukoresheje RCT bireba.
learnUni_economics_f4_tp0: Ingero zo gukura hamwe na endogenous moderi zo gukura
learnUni_law_f0_desc: Amategeko shingiro asobanura isano iri hagati ya leta n’abantu ku giti cyabo, no hagati y’inzego za guverinoma. Amategeko rusange agenga ikoreshwa ry'ubutegetsi bwa leta. Gusobanukirwa amahame remezo - gutandukanya ububasha, kugendera ku mategeko, uburenganzira bw’ibanze - ni ishingiro ry’inyigisho zose z’amategeko n’ubwenegihugu bwa demokarasi.
learnUni_law_f0_kp0: Itegekonshinga: rishobora kwandikwa (USA, Ubudage, Ubufaransa - inyandiko imwe yanditse) cyangwa idahinduwe (UK - amategeko ya sitati, amategeko rusange, n'amasezerano). Inzego zinyuranye: amahame-remezo yigenga kuruta amategeko asanzwe.
learnUni_law_f0_kp1: Gutandukanya ububasha (Montesquieu): amategeko (Inteko / Kongere), umuyobozi (guverinoma / perezida), ubutabera (inkiko). Kugenzura no kuringaniza birinda kwibanda ku mbaraga. Isubiramo ry'ubucamanza: inkiko zishobora gukuraho amategeko atanyuranyije n'itegeko nshinga.
learnUni_law_f0_kp2: Kugendera ku mategeko (Dicey): ntawe uri hejuru y'amategeko; igihano gusa kubera kutubahiriza amategeko asobanutse; kugera ku nkiko. Mubikorwa: ubwigenge bwubucamanza, kubuza gufungwa bidatinze (habeas corpus), guhuza ibikorwa bya leta.
learnUni_law_f0_kp3: Uburenganzira shingiro: Amasezerano y’uburayi y’uburenganzira bwa muntu (ingingo ya 2–14: uburenganzira bwo kubaho, kubuza iyicarubozo, kuburanishwa mu buryo buboneye, ubuzima bwite, ubwisanzure mu gutanga ibitekerezo, kubuza ivangura). Gorizontal na vertical verisiyo yuburenganzira.
learnUni_law_f0_kp4: Umuryango w’ubumwe bw’ibihugu by’Uburayi: gusumba amategeko y’ubumwe bw’ibihugu by’Uburayi (Costa na ENEL, 1964), ingaruka zitaziguye (Van Gend en Loos, 1963), ihame ry’uburinganire, kugoboka. Nyuma ya Brexit: Ubwongereza ntibukigengwa n'amategeko y’ubumwe bw’ibihugu by’Uburayi.
learnUni_law_f0_task: Gisesengura imyanya shingiro yubucamanza bwigenga muri demokarasi. Ukoresheje ingero ziva mu nzego eshatu zitandukanye zemewe n'amategeko (UK, Amerika, Ubudage), gereranya: uburyo ubwigenge bw’ubucamanza burinzwe, urugero rw’isuzuma ry’ubucamanza, n’urubanza rumwe aho inkiko zatesheje agaciro cyangwa ibikorwa bike. Suzuma niba isuzuma ry'ubucamanza rijyanye n'amategeko ya demokarasi.
learnUni_law_f1_desc: Amategeko agenga amasezerano agenga amasezerano yemewe n'amategeko. Igena igihe amasezerano yashizweho, icyo ababuranyi bategekwa gukora, ibiba mugihe inshingano zitubahirijwe (kutubahiriza), nuburyo bwo kuboneka. Amategeko agenga amasezerano ashimangira ubucuruzi, akazi, n’imibanire myinshi yemewe hagati y’ababuranyi.
learnUni_law_f1_kp0: Ibigize amasezerano yemewe: gutanga (icyifuzo gisobanutse neza kugomba kwemerwa), kwemerwa (bidashidikanywaho, bihuye nibyifuzo - itegeko ry 'indorerwamo ishusho), gutekereza (ikintu cyagaciro kungurana ibitekerezo - gutekereza kera ntabwo ari ugutekereza), umugambi wo gushiraho umubano wamategeko.
learnUni_law_f1_kp1: Amasezerano yamasezerano: imvugo isobanutse (ivugwa neza), amagambo yerekanwe (bivuzwe na sitati - Igurisha ryibicuruzwa; cyangwa ninkiko - ikizamini cyubucuruzi). Ibisabwa (kutubahiriza uburenganzira birangira + ibyangiritse), garanti (kutubahiriza ibyangiritse gusa), amagambo atavuzwe (umuti biterwa ningaruka zo kutubahiriza).
learnUni_law_f1_kp2: Impamvu zifatika: kubeshya (kuvuga ibinyoma byerekana amasezerano → gukuraho + ibyangiritse), guhatirwa (igitutu kitemewe → impfabusa), ingaruka zidakwiye (inyungu zidakwiye zafashwe → zidafite ishingiro), ikosa (ikosa ryibanze / rinyuranye → ridafite ishingiro cyangwa ridafite agaciro).
learnUni_law_f1_kp3: Kurenga no gukemura: kurenga kubiteganijwe (kwanga gukora mbere yimikorere bikwiye party ishyaka ryinzirakarengane rirashobora kubyemera no kurega ako kanya). Umuti: ibyangiritse (primaire - ishyira uruhande rwinzirakarengane nkaho amasezerano yakozwe), imikorere yihariye (iringaniye - ihatira imikorere, itangwa aho ibyangiritse bidahagije), irangizarubanza, kwant meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp4: Ingingo zisonewe: zigomba gushyirwamo (integuza, umukono, cyangwa inzira yo gucuruza); byasobanuwe neza (contra proferentem - kudasobanuka ku ishyaka rishingiye ku ngingo); hubahirijwe UCTA 1977 na CRA 2015 (ingingo zidafite ishingiro zidashobora gukurikizwa mumasezerano yabaguzi).
learnUni_law_f1_task: Umwubatsi avuga £ 50.000 yo kuvugurura inzu. Nyir'urugo arabyemera. Mugihe cyakazi, umwubatsi avumbuye ibibazo byuburyo butunguranye kandi asaba andi 70.000. Nyir'urugo asinya amasezerano mashya ku gitutu. Iyo birangiye, nyir'urugo yanze kwishyura amafaranga 20.000 y'inyongera. Impanuro: (a) amasezerano yumwimerere afite agaciro? (b) Ese itandukaniro ryubahirizwa? (c) Ni ubuhe buryo bubaka umwubatsi afite? (d) Ni ubuhe bwunganizi nyir'urugo ashobora kuzamura?
learnUni_law_f2_desc: Amategeko mpanabyaha asobanura imyitwarire ibujijwe na leta kandi iteganya guhana abakoze ibyaha. Irinda abantu n’umuryango ibyago, ikumira amakosa, kandi ikagaragaza ko twamaganye hamwe. Gusobanukirwa amategeko mpanabyaha bisaba kumenya actus reus, mens rea, kwiregura, n'amahame yo kuryozwa icyaha.
learnUni_law_f2_kp0: Ibigize icyaha: actus reus (igikorwa cyicyaha - gikubiyemo ibikorwa kubushake, gusiba aho inshingano zihari, ibisubizo, ibihe) na mens rea (ibitekerezo byicyaha - umugambi, uburangare, cyangwa uburangare). Ihame ry'impanuka: AR na MR bigomba guhura mugihe.
learnUni_law_f2_kp1: Urwego rwa mens rea: intego itaziguye (intego ni ukuzana ibisubizo), umugambi mubi (ibisubizo ingaruka zimwe na zimwe, byateganijwe nka - R v Woolin), uburangare budafite ishingiro (Cunningham - gufata ibyago), uburangare bufite intego (gutandukana gukabije kubantu bashyira mu gaciro).
learnUni_law_f2_kp2: Ubwicanyi: ubwicanyi (kwica mu buryo butemewe n'amategeko + umugambi wo kwica cyangwa gutera GBH - igihano cy'igifungo cya burundu); kwica ku bushake (ubwicanyi bwagabanijwe no gutakaza ubuyobozi cyangwa kugabanya inshingano); kwica umuntu utabishaka (ibikorwa bitemewe cyangwa uburangare bukabije - nta bwicanyi MR).
learnUni_law_f2_kp3: Ubwunganizi: kwirwanaho (imbaraga zingana zo guhashya iterabwoba ritemewe - gushyira mu gaciro ariko ntabwo byanze bikunze urubanza rutunganye); kwemererwa (imipaka kubishobora kwemerwa - R v Brown); ubusinzi (ubusinzi kubushake nta kwirwanaho kubushake bwihariye, kwirwanaho igice kubushake bwibanze); ubusazi (amategeko ya M'Naghten - inenge yibitekerezo biturutse ku ndwara zo mu mutwe → nta cyaha azira kubera ubusazi).
learnUni_law_f2_kp4: Shyiramo ibyaha no kubigiramo uruhare: kugerageza (birenze ibikorwa byo kwitegura ufite intego); ubugambanyi (amasezerano yo gukora icyaha); gutera inkunga / ubufasha (Itegeko rikomeye ry'icyaha 2007). Uruganda ruhuriweho: uwitabira ibikorwa byamatsinda araryozwa iyo babonye mbere yuko umuyobozi ashobora gukora icyaha hamwe na MR bisabwa.
learnUni_law_f2_task: D na V barwana. D gukubita V ugamije guteza ibyago bikomeye. V, itazwi na D, ifite igihanga kidasanzwe ('igi igi ryamagi'). V arapfa. Gisha inama D ku buryozwacyaha: (a) Actus reus yubwicanyi niki? (b) D afite MR yo kwica? (c) Amategeko yoroheje yerekeye amategeko ahana? (d) Ubwunganizi bwigice burahari? Ni izihe ngaruka zishobora kubaho?
learnUni_law_f3_desc: Amategeko mpuzamahanga agenga umubano hagati y’ibihugu, kandi, abantu ku giti cyabo n’imiryango mpuzamahanga. Bitandukanye n’amategeko y’imbere mu gihugu, ntabura ubuyobozi bukuru - kubahiriza biterwa no kubyemera, gusubiranamo, n’igitutu mpuzamahanga. Amategeko mpuzamahanga rusange akubiyemo amasezerano, gukoresha ingufu, ubusugire, n'uburenganzira bwa muntu.
learnUni_law_f3_kp0: Inkomoko y'amategeko mpuzamahanga (Art. 38 Sitati ya ICJ): amasezerano (kubahiriza amashyaka - pacta sunt servanda - Amasezerano y'i Vienne 1969), amategeko mpuzamahanga gakondo (imyitozo ya leta ihamye + opinio juris - ihuza ibihugu byose), amahame rusange y'amategeko, n'ibyemezo by'ubucamanza / inyandiko z'ubumenyi (inkomoko y'ishami).
learnUni_law_f3_kp1: Ubusugire bwa Leta: ihame rivuga ko ibihugu bifite ubutware buhebuje mu karere kabo kandi bingana n'amategeko mpuzamahanga. Kutivanga: inshingano zo kutivanga mu bibazo by’imbere mu bindi bihugu - byangijwe n’inshingano zo kurinda (R2P).
learnUni_law_f3_kp2: Gukoresha ingufu: Ingingo ya 2 (4) Amasezerano y’umuryango w’abibumbye abuza iterabwoba cyangwa gukoresha ingufu ku gihugu icyo ari cyo cyose. Ibidasanzwe: kwirwanaho (Ingingo ya 51 - bigomba kuba ngombwa kandi bigereranijwe, bigashyikirizwa Inama ishinzwe umutekano) hamwe n’inama y’umuryango w’abibumbye ishinzwe umutekano (Umutwe wa VII - guhungabanya amahoro, guhungabanya amahoro, ibikorwa by’igitero).
learnUni_law_f3_kp3: Amategeko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha: inkiko za Nuremberg zashyizeho inshingano z’inshinjabyaha ku mategeko mpuzamahanga. Sitati y'i Roma (2002) yashyizeho ICC - ububasha kuri jenoside, ibyaha byibasiye inyoko muntu, ibyaha by'intambara, n'ubugizi bwa nabi. 'Gukurikiza amabwiriza' ntabwo ari ukwirwanaho kwuzuye.
learnUni_law_f3_kp4: Amategeko yinyanja (UNCLOS 1982): inyanja yubutaka (kilometero 12 nautique - ubusugire bwuzuye), akarere kihariye k'ubukungu (200 nm - uburenganzira bwumutungo wigenga), inyanja ndende (kurenga ububasha bwigihugu - ubwisanzure bwo kugenda). Gukemura amakimbirane: Urukiko mpuzamahanga rushinzwe amategeko y'inyanja (ITLOS).
learnUni_law_f3_task: Leta A yibasiye Leta B, isaba kwirwanaho nyuma y’igitero cyagabwe ku nzego z’ubutasi B. Gisesengura: (a) Igitero cya cyber kigizwe nigitero cyintwaro nkuko biteganywa ningingo ya 51? (b) Igisubizo cya A gikenewe kandi kiringaniye? (c) Ni uruhe ruhare akanama gashinzwe umutekano ku isi gashobora kugira? (d) Abayobozi b'igihugu A bashobora gukurikiranwa na ICC? Ni iki kigomba kwemezwa? Tanga ingingo zijyanye n'amasezerano n'imanza mpuzamahanga.
learnUni_law_f4_desc: Uburyo bwemewe nubuhanga nubuhanga bwo gutekereza neza: gusoma imanza, gusobanura statuts, kubaka impaka, no kwandika byemewe. Jurisprudence (teorite yemewe / filozofiya y'amategeko) isuzuma imiterere, inkomoko, n'intego z'amategeko ubwayo - kubaza niba amategeko n'amahame atandukanye, icyatuma amategeko yemerwa, n'uburyo abacamanza bagomba guca imanza zikomeye.
learnUni_law_f4_kp0: Gutekereza ku manza: kugereranya decidendi (ihame ryamategeko ryaciwemo urubanza - kubahiriza inkiko zibanza hakurikijwe ibyemezo), obiter dicta (amagambo yibyabaye - yemeza gusa). Gutandukanya (kugabanya urugero), kurengana (urukiko rwisumbuye ruvuguruza urubanza rwabanje), no kugenda (Urukiko rw'Ikirenga ruva ku rukiko rwarwo).
learnUni_law_f4_kp1: Ibisobanuro byemewe n'amategeko: amategeko asanzwe (koresha ibisobanuro bisanzwe byamagambo), itegeko rya zahabu (irinde ibisubizo bidasobanutse), amategeko mabi (ni ikihe kibi Inteko ishinga amategeko yashakaga gukiza - Urubanza rwa Heydon). Uburyo bugezweho bufite intego (Inteko ishinga amategeko yari igamije iki?). ECHR s.3 HRA 1998: amategeko agomba gusomwa neza hamwe nuburenganzira bwamasezerano kugeza igihe bishoboka.
learnUni_law_f4_kp2: Positivisme yemewe (Austin, Hart): amategeko nukuri kwimibereho - amategeko yemewe yashyizweho nuburyo bwemewe, hatitawe kubikubiyemo. Hart 'amategeko yo kumenyekanisha' agaragaza amategeko yemewe. Amategeko / gutandukanya imyitwarire.
learnUni_law_f4_kp3: Inyigisho y'amategeko karemano: amategeko agomba guhuza n'amahame mbwirizamuco - amategeko arenganya ntabwo ari itegeko ryukuri (lex iniusta non est lex - Aquinas, amahame y'imbere ya Fuller). Amategeko y'Abanazi yakurikijwe n'inkiko - impaka nyuma y'intambara yo kumenya niba positivism yemewe yarashoboje ikibi.
learnUni_law_f4_kp4: Amategeko ya Ronald Dworkin 'nk'ubunyangamugayo': amategeko ntabwo akubiyemo amategeko gusa ahubwo ni amahame (uburenganzira bwo guhangayikishwa no kubahwa). Abacamanza bagomba kubona 'igisubizo kiboneye' gihuye neza nicyemezo cyahise ndetse na morale ya politiki. Imanza zikomeye: amahame, ntabwo ari amategeko gusa, ayobora ibyemezo. Kunegura positivism ya Hart.
learnUni_law_f4_task: Sitati ivuga ngo 'nta modoka iri muri parike'. Mugire inama niba buri kimwe muri ibyo kibujijwe: (a) igare, (b) imodoka yo gukinisha umwana, (c) ambulanse itabara byihutirwa, (d) ikigega cyo kwibuka intambara. Koresha amategeko atatu yose gakondo yo gusobanura amategeko. Noneho, ukoresheje positivism ya Hart hamwe n amategeko ya Dworkin nkubunyangamugayo, sobanura uburyo buri tewolojiya yakwegera 'penumbra yubudashidikanywaho' mumategeko.
learnUni_medicine_f0_desc: Anatomy ni ubushakashatsi bwimiterere yumubiri wumuntu - ingingo, ingirangingo, na sisitemu. Ubumenyi bwuzuye bwa anatomiya nishingiro ridasubirwaho ryubuvuzi bwamavuriro: ntushobora gusuzuma cyangwa kuvura ibyo udashobora kwiyumvisha. Ubuvuzi bwa anatomiya buhuza anatomiya ikabije, amateka y’amateka, insoro, na anatomiya ya radiologiya.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp0: Ijambo rya Anatomical: indege (sagittal, coronale, transvers), icyerekezo (hagati / kuruhande, hejuru / munsi, imbere / inyuma, hafi / kure), uturere, hamwe ningendo (flexion / kwaguka, gushimuta / kwiyongera, kuzunguruka, kuvuga / hejuru).
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp1: Sisitemu yumutima nimiyoboro yumutima: umutima uri muri mediastinum. Uruhande rw'iburyo (sisitemu y'amaraso) → kuzunguruka kw'ibihaha. Uruhande rw'ibumoso (ogisijeni) → kuzenguruka kuri sisitemu. Imiyoboro y'amaraso: ibumoso imbere imanuka (LAD), ibumoso buzengurutse (LCx), imiyoboro y'amaraso iburyo (RCA). LAD infarct = 'ukora umupfakazi'.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp2: Sisitemu ya musculoskeletal: amagufwa 206 muri skeleton akuze. Ihuriro: fibrous (sutures), karitsiye (symphysis pubis), synovial (ingingo zigenda cyane - ikibuno, ivi, igitugu). Brachial plexus (C5-T1) igenzura ingingo yo hejuru - imitsi yimitsi yumutima itanga uburyo bwihariye bwo kubura.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp3: Viscera yo munda: peritoneum (imirongo ya parietal urukuta rw'inda; visceral itwikiriye ingingo). Ibice bya retroperitoneal (SADPUCKER): glande suprarenal, aorta, duodenum (2-4), pancreas, ureter, colon (kuzamuka / kumanuka), impyiko, esofagusi, urukiramende.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp4: Neuroanatomy: imitsi 12 ya Cranial (I Olfactory, II Optic, III Oculomotor, IV Trochlear, V Trigeminal, VI Abducens, Isura ya VII, VIII Vestibulocochlear, IX Glossopharyngeal, X Vagus, XI Ibikoresho, XII Hypoglossal). Uruti rw'umugongo rurangirira kuri L1-L2 - gucumita mu gihimba kuri L3-L4.
learnUni_medicine_f0_task: Umurwayi agaragaza intege nke mu kuboko kwabo kw'iburyo, gutakaza ibyiyumvo bya pinprick mu rutoki ruto no ku kuboko hagati, no guta imitsi y'intoki. Hindura ibisebe muburyo budasanzwe: (a) niyihe mitsi igira ingaruka? (b) Indwara irihe - kuri brachial plexus cyangwa nervice yitwa? (c) Ni izihe mpamvu zishobora gutera? (d) Ni ubuhe buryo butandukanye bwahagaritswe? Shyiramo igishushanyo cyanditseho plexus ijyanye.
learnUni_medicine_f1_desc: Physiology isobanura uburyo sisitemu yumubiri ikora - uburyo umutima utera amaraso, uburyo impyiko zungurura kandi zikagenga electrolytite, uburyo ibihaha bihana gaze, nuburyo imisemburo ihuza ingingo za kure. Ihuza anatomy (imiterere) nubuvuzi bwa clinique (dysfunction). Physiology ni ishingiro ryuburyo bwo gusuzuma.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp0: Imiterere yumutima: Frank-Starling uburyo - ubwonko bwubwonko bwiyongera hamwe nubunini bwanyuma-diastolique (preload) - umutima urambuye → imbaraga nyinshi. Ibisohoka byumutima = umuvuduko wumutima volume ingano yubwonko. Hagati yumuvuduko wa arterial = ibisohoka byumutima × byose birwanya periferique.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp1: Imiterere yubuhumekero: ubwinshi bwamazi (500 mL kuruhuka), ubushobozi bwingenzi, umwanya wapfuye (~ 150 mL - inzira zumuyaga zitagira uruhare mu guhanahana gaze). Guhuza umuyaga (V / Q) guhuza: byiza V / Q = 1. Kudahuza bitera hypoxaemia (hasi ya O₂). Hypercapnia (CO₂ yo hejuru) niyambere itera imbaraga zo guhumeka.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp2: Imiterere yimpyiko: igipimo cyo kuyungurura isi (GFR isanzwe ~ 100 mL / min). Tubular reabsorption (Na⁺, glucose, aside amine) hamwe no gusohora (H⁺, ibiyobyabwenge). Sisitemu ya Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone (RAAS): umuvuduko ukabije wamaraso → renin → Ang II → aldosterone → Na⁺ no gufata amazi → BP irazamuka.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp3: Endocrine physiologie: insuline (β-selile, glucose gufata imitsi / ibinure, synthesis ya glycogene, ibuza gluconeogenezi), glucagon (α-selile, irwanya insuline - glycogenolysis, gluconeogenez), cortisol (HPA axis - igisubizo gihangayikishije, anti-inflammatory, izamura glucose), imisemburo ya tiroyide (umuvuduko wa metabolike, gukura).
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp4: Neurophysiology: ubushobozi bwibikorwa, ihuriro rya neuromuscular (acetylcholine → nicotinic reseptor → ubushobozi bwa plaque ya nyuma potential ubushobozi bwibikorwa → kugabanuka kwimitsi hakoreshejwe uburyo bwo kunyerera). Sisitemu ya Autonomic nervous system: impuhwe (kurwana / kuguruka - noradrenaline) na parasimpatique (kuruhuka / digest - acetylcholine).
learnUni_medicine_f1_task: Usanga umurwayi yaguye hamwe na BP 80/50, umuvuduko wumutima 120, no guhumeka 28 / min. Gazi yamaraso yerekana pH 7.25, pCO₂ 30 mmHg, HCO₃⁻ 13 mEq / L. Gisesengura: (a) Ni ubuhe bwoko bwo guhungabana aside-ishingiro? (b) Hariho indishyi z'ubuhumekero? (c) Kubara icyuho cya anion (Na = 138, Cl = 100, HCO₃ = 13). (d) Ni ubuhe buryo bwa physiologique (RAAS, ubuhumekero, impyiko) buzakora mu masaha ari imbere kugeza amasaha kugirango bikosorwe?
learnUni_medicine_f2_desc: Pathologiya nubushakashatsi bwa siyanse yindwara - ibitera (aetiologiya), uburyo (pathogenez), impinduka zimiterere (morphologie), ningaruka zakazi. Indwara rusange y’indwara isuzuma inzira zikunze kugaragara ku ndwara nyinshi: gutwika, neoplasia, trombose, no kwangirika. Indwara ya pologologi ikoreshwa muburyo bwindwara.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp0: Gutwika: gukara (iminota - iminsi - impinduka zamaraso, kwinjira kwa neutrophil, byahujwe na histamine, prostaglandine, kinins, byuzuzanya). Indwara idakira (amezi - imyaka - macrophage, lymphocytes, fibroblast - kwibumbira muri granuloma muri TB, Crohn's, sarcoidose).
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp1: Neoplasia: benign (itandukanijwe neza, ikubiyemo, idatera) na malignant (itandukanijwe nabi, itera, metastasising). Ibiranga kanseri (Hanahan & Weinberg): ikwirakwizwa ryinshi, kwirinda guhagarika imikurire, kurwanya urupfu rw'uturemangingo, kudapfa kwinshi, angiogenezi, gutera / metastasis, ihungabana rya genome, gutera ibibyimba.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp2: Thrombose: Inyabutatu ya Virchow - gukomeretsa kwa endoteliyale (cyane cyane), gutembera kw'amaraso adasanzwe (turbulence cyangwa stasis), na hypercoagulability. Arterial trombi: platine ikungahaye, yera. Venous trombi (DVT): umutuku (RBC-fibrin). Embolism yibihaha: DVT ibice byacumbitse mumaraso.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp3: Gukomeretsa no gupfa kwa selile: ischaemia (ATP depletion → Na⁺ / K⁺ kunanirwa pompe → kubyimba selile → necrosis). Apoptose (progaramu ya progaramu ya selile - caspase cascade, kanseri ya kirimbuzi, imibiri ya apoptotique - nta gutwika). Necrosis (pasive, guturika selile → inflammation). Ubwoko: coagulative, liquefactive (ubwonko), caseous (TB), gangrenous.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp4: Atherosclerose: iterwa na lipide, indwara idakira yinkuta za arterial. Ingirabuzimafatizo (macrophage zifata okiside LDL) → ibinure binini → fibrous plaque plaque plaque igoye (ibisebe, haemorrhage, calcification, trombose). Impamvu zishobora gutera: hypertension, hyperlipidaemia, itabi, diyabete, amateka yumuryango.
learnUni_medicine_f2_task: Umusaza w'imyaka 65 unywa itabi hamwe na diyabete yo mu bwoko bwa 2 yerekana ububabare butunguranye bwo mu gatuza buturuka ku kuboko kw'ibumoso, diaphoresis, no kuzamuka kwa ST kuri ECG. Troponine I yazamutse cyane. Sobanura: (a) inzira y’indwara itera MI ikaze ikoresheje triad ya Virchow na atherosclerose, (b) ibiba kuri cardiomyocytes nyuma yiminota 30, amasaha 6, namasaha 24 ya ischaemia, (c) ubwoko bwa nérosose bivamo, na (d) uburyo bwo gutwika no gukiza mubyumweru bikurikira.
learnUni_medicine_f3_desc: Farumasi yiga uburyo ibiyobyabwenge bikorana na biologiya. Pharmacokinetics (ibyo umubiri ukora kumiti) hamwe na farumasi (ibyo imiti ikora kumubiri) bishimangira kwandikirwa. Ibiyobyabwenge byose bifite reseptor, uburyo, hamwe ningaruka mbi zigomba kumenyekana kubikorwa byubuvuzi bwiza.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp0: Pharmacokinetics - ADME: Absorption (bioavailability F = agace kagera kumuzunguruko wa sisitemu), Ikwirakwizwa (ingano yo gukwirakwiza Vd = dose / [plasma], imiti ifitanye isano na poroteyine nyinshi ifite Vd nkeya), Metabolism (cyane cyane imisemburo ya CYP450 - ingaruka zambere-zambere), Kurandura (igice cya kabiri cyubuzima t₁ / ₂ = 0.693 × V
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp1: Pharmacodynamics: ibiyobyabwenge bikora kubakira (GPCRs, imiyoboro ya ion, reseptor nucleaire, bifitanye isano na enzyme). Agonist (ikora reseptor), antagonist (guhagarika - guhatana cyangwa kudahiganwa). EC50: kwibanda bitanga 50% ingaruka nziza. Ingaruka (max effect) va imbaraga (EC50).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp2: Imikoreshereze ya reseptor yibiyobyabwenge: kugenzura reseptor (nyuma ya antagonism idakira - isobanura ibintu byongeye kugaruka), kugabanuka (nyuma ya agonism idakira - kwihanganira). Ibyakirwa neza. Agoniste igice: efficacy ya submaximal nubwo 100% yakira reseptor - irashobora gukora nka antagonist imbere ya agonist yuzuye.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp3: Ibyiciro byingenzi byibiyobyabwenge: beta-blokers (antagonistes kurushanwa kuri β₁ / ₂-adrenoeptors - kugabanya umuvuduko wumutima na BP), inhibitori ya ACE (guhagarika angiotensin ihindura enzyme → gake Ang II → vasodilation + nkeya ya aldosterone → yagabanije BP), statin (HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor → nkeya ya cholesterol LDL → up.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp4: Ingaruka mbi zibiyobyabwenge (ADR): Ubwoko A (bwongerewe - buteganijwe, buterwa na dose, urugero nko kuva amaraso hamwe na warfarin), Ubwoko B (bizarre - bitateganijwe, ubudahangarwa bw'umubiri, urugero: anaphylaxis hamwe na penisiline), Ubwoko C (gukoresha karande), Ubwoko D (bwatinze - kanseri, teratogenezi), Ubwoko E (kurangiza gukoreshwa). Imikoreshereze yibiyobyabwenge: Indwara ya CYP (rifampicin igabanya ingaruka zo kuboneza urubyaro), inhibitor ya CYP (erythromycine izamura urugero rwa simvastatine → myopathie).
learnUni_medicine_f3_task: Umurwayi ufite fibrillation atriyale atangirwa kuri warfarin (intego INR 2-3) hanyuma akandura indwara zubuhumekero zisaba erythromycine. Nyuma y'ibyumweru bibiri INR = 5.8 hamwe no kuva amaraso. Sobanura: (a) uburyo bwa warfarin n'impamvu INR ikurikiranwa, (b) imikoranire ya farumasi na erythromycine, (c) ni ubuhe buryo bukenewe ubu, (d) ni ubuhe buryo bukwiye gutegurwa. Shyiramo ibyiciro byibiyobyabwenge, reseptor / enzyme, nibipimo byihariye bya kinetic.
learnUni_medicine_f3_tp1: Imiti ya farumasi nubwoko bwa reseptor
learnUni_medicine_f4_desc: Ubuvuzi bwa Clinical buhuza anatomiya, physiologiya, patologiya, na farumasi mukuvura abarwayi. Gufata amateka no gusuzuma umubiri nubuhanga bwibanze bwubuvuzi butanga isuzuma ritandukanye. Ubunyamwuga, imyitwarire yubuvuzi, nubuvuzi bushingiye ku bimenyetso nibyo shingiro ryimikorere myiza yubuvuzi.
