learnUni_medicine_f4_kp0: Gufata amateka: kwerekana ikirego (PC), amateka yo gutanga ikirego (HPC - SOCRATES: urubuga, gutangira, imiterere, imirasire, amashyirahamwe, amasomo yigihe, gukabya / kugabanya ibintu, ubukana), amateka yubuvuzi bwashize (PMH), amateka yibiyobyabwenge (DHx), amateka yumuryango (FHx), amateka yimibereho (SHx - itabi, isuzuma ryakazi, umubano).
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp1: Isuzuma rya Clinical: ubugenzuzi rusange signs ibimenyetso byingenzi (BP, HR, RR, SpO₂, ubushyuhe, GCS) → sisitemu yihariye. Uburyo bwa ABCDE bwo gusuzuma cyane: Umuhanda, Guhumeka, Kuzenguruka, Ubumuga (neuro), Kumurika. AMAKURU2 amanota kubarwayi bangirika.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp2: Imyitwarire yubuvuzi (amahame ane - Beauchamp & Childress): ubwigenge (kubaha uburenganzira bwumurwayi bwo gufata umwanzuro), kugirira akamaro (gukora inyungu zumurwayi), kutagira ubugabo (ubanza, ntugirire nabi - primum non nocere), ubutabera (kugabana umutungo neza, gufata neza). Amakimbirane hagati y'amahame arasanzwe mubikorwa.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp3: Kwemererwa kubimenyeshwa: bisaba ubushobozi (gusobanukirwa, kugumana, gupima, kuvugana), amakuru (ingaruka zumubiri, ubundi buryo, ingaruka zo kutavurwa), nubushake (nta gahato). Ubushobozi bwo mu mutwe Amategeko 2005 (UK): niba adafite ubushobozi, icyemezo cyinyungu zifatwa nitsinda ± ububasha burambye bwa avoka.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp4: Ubuvuzi bushingiye ku bimenyetso (EBM): isuzuma rifatika + meta-gusesengura (ibimenyetso bihanitse ku bibazo by’amavuriro), RCTs, ubushakashatsi bwakozwe, ubushakashatsi bugenzura imanza, urukurikirane rw'imanza, ibitekerezo by'impuguke. Isuzumabumenyi ryingenzi: gusuzuma agaciro imbere (ubushakashatsi bwakozwe neza?), Iyemezwa ryo hanze (ibisubizo bireba umurwayi wanjye?), N'ubuvuzi (NNT, ingano yingaruka).
learnUni_medicine_f4_task: Umugore w'imyaka 45 ufite igicuri kizwi yemerwa nta ubwenge. Mugenzi we avuga ko amaze icyumweru atarafata imiti igabanya ubukana. Nta bubasha afite bwo kunganira kandi ntashobora kubyemera. Ukoresheje amahame ane yimyitwarire yubuvuzi n amategeko agenga ubushobozi bwo mumutwe, gusesengura: (a) ubuvuzi bushobora gutangwa utabanje kubiherwa uruhushya? (b) ni ubuhe buryo bwiza bw'inyungu? (c) namara kugarura ubushobozi, ni iki kigomba kuganirwaho? (d) nigute ushobora kwegera guhuza imiti?
learnUni_psychology_f0_desc: Imitekerereze ya kaminuza ni disipuline ya siyansi - ikoresha uburyo bw'igerageza, imibare, hamwe n'ibimenyetso byasuzumwe n'urungano kugira ngo bige ibitekerezo n'imyitwarire. Ibikorwa byingenzi byingenzi biva mu kugabanya ibinyabuzima kugeza ku mibereho myiza. Gusobanukirwa amateka na filozofiya ya psychologiya ikubiyemo ubushakashatsi bwose bwakurikiyeho.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp0: Icyerekezo nyamukuru: ibinyabuzima (ubwonko, genetika, imisemburo), kumenya (gutunganya amakuru, kwerekana ibitekerezo), imyitwarire (Skinner - conditioning, kwiga operant), psycodynamic (Freud - ubwenge butamenyekana, gukandamizwa, uburyo bwo kwirwanaho), ubumuntu (Maslow, Rogers - kwimenyekanisha), imibereho (Tajfel, Milgram - ingaruka zabaturage).
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp1: Uburyo bwubushakashatsi: kugerageza (koresha IV, gupima DV, kugenzura urujijo), guhuza (isano yo gupima, r = −1 kugeza kuri +1, ntishobora kwemeza impamvu), kwitegereza (naturiste, abitabiriye), ubushakashatsi bwakozwe (ubujyakuzimu ariko bugarukira muri rusange), ubushakashatsi (ingero nini, kwiyitirira kubogama). Muburyo butandukanye hagati yubushakashatsi.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp2: Urufatiro rwibarurishamibare: null hypothesis isobanura akamaro (NHST) - p-agaciro <0.05 amasezerano (Uburobyi). Ingano yingaruka (Cohen's d, η²) - mubyukuri bifite akamaro nubwo bitaba imibare. Ikibazo cyo kwigana: ibisubizo byinshi bya kera byananiwe kwigana (priming social, ego depletion) - siyanse ifunguye no kwiyandikisha mbere ni ibisubizo.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp3: Imyitwarire (code ya BPS): kumenyeshwa amakuru, uburenganzira bwo gukuramo, kurinda ibibi, ibanga, gutanga ibitekerezo. Ubushakashatsi bwa Gereza ya Stanford (Zimbardo 1971) na Milgram ubushakashatsi bwateje impaka zirambye ku ngaruka z’ubushakashatsi zemewe. Komite ishinzwe imyitwarire ya IRB / imyitwarire ubu ni itegeko.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp4: Ishingiro ryibinyabuzima ryimyitwarire: sisitemu yimitsi (CNS + PNS + ANS). Imiterere yubwonko: imikorere yubwonko (imikorere yingenzi), sisitemu ya limbic (amarangamutima, kwibuka - hippocampus, amygdala), ganglia basal (kugenzura moteri, ibihembo), ubwonko bwubwonko (kumenya cyane, imiterere). Neuroimaging: fMRI (gutembera kw'amaraso), EEG (igihe), PET (ikarita ya neurotransmitter).
learnUni_psychology_f0_task: Suzuma neza ikirego 'psychologiya ni siyanse'. Mu gisubizo cyawe: (a) gusobanura 'siyanse' ukoresheje ibipimo bya Popper byo kwibeshya, (b) gusuzuma urugero uburyo inzira nyamukuru ya psychologiya yujuje iki gipimo, (c) kuganira ku kibazo cyo kwigana nicyo gihishura kuri NHST, (d) gutanga ivugurura ryuburyo bubiri bwashimangira ubumenyi bwa psychologiya.
learnUni_psychology_f1_desc: Iterambere ryimitekerereze yiga uburyo abantu bahinduka mubuzima bwabo bwose - kuva bakura mbere yo kubyara kugeza mubuto, ubwana, ubwangavu, gukura, nubusaza. Irasuzuma iterambere ryubwenge, imibereho, amarangamutima, nimyitwarire, hamwe nubusabane hagati yo gukura kwibinyabuzima nuburambe bwibidukikije.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp0: Piaget ibyiciro byiterambere byiterambere: sensorimotor (0-2y, burundu ibintu), preoperational (2-7y, egocentrism, nta kubungabunga), ibikorwa bifatika (7-12y, kubungabunga, guhindukira), ibikorwa byemewe (12 + y, ibitekerezo bidafatika, ibitekerezo bya hypothettike).
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp1: Vygotsky's sociocultural theory: Zone of Development Proximal Development (ZPD) - itandukaniro riri hagati yibyo umwana ashobora gukora wenyine hamwe no gusebanya kubandi babizi. Ururimi nigikoresho cyibanze cyo kumenya. Itandukaniro hamwe na Piaget yibanze kubushakashatsi bwonyine.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp2: Umugereka wumugereka (Bowlby, Ainsworth): impinja zikora umugozi wibanze wingenzi mugutezimbere. Uburyo butangaje bwo gutondekanya umugereka: umutekano (65%), umutekano muke-wirinda (20%), umutekano muke-wuzuye (15%), utunganijwe. Imikorere yimbere imbere iyobora umubano uzaza.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp3: Iterambere ryingimbi: Indangamuntu ya Erikson nicyiciro cyo kwitiranya uruhare. Iterambere ryimyitwarire ya Kohlberg: ibanziriza (inyungu-bwite), ibisanzwe (amategeko mbonezamubano), ibyakurikiyeho (amahame rusange). Ubwonko bw'ingimbi: sisitemu ya limbic irakura mbere ya cortex ibanza - gufata ibyago, guhindagurika kumarangamutima.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp4: Iterambere ry'abakuze no gusaza: Icyiciro cya nyuma cya Erikson - gukundana no kwigunga (umusore ukuze), kubyara no guhagarara (abakuze hagati), ubunyangamugayo no kwiheba (umuntu mukuru). Gusaza ubwenge: gutunganya umuvuduko bigabanuka; ubwenge bwa kristu (ubumenyi bwakusanyirijwe) bugumaho muri 70. Gusaza neza: Moderi ya Baltes ya SOC (guhitamo, gukora neza, indishyi).
learnUni_psychology_f1_task: Umwana wimyaka 4 yerekwa ibirahuri bibiri bifite amazi angana, hanyuma amazi ava mubirahuri kimwe asukwa mubirahure birebire, bigufi. Umwana avuga ko ikirahure kirekire gifite amazi menshi. (a) Ni ikihe cyiciro cya Piagetian umwana arimo? (b) Ni izihe mbogamizi zubwenge zisobanura ibi? (c) Vygotsky yasobanura ate ibintu bimwe muburyo butandukanye? (d) Tegura ubushakashatsi bwo gusuzuma niba scafolding ishobora kwihutisha ubushobozi bwo kubungabunga. Suzuma ibibazo by'imyitwarire.
learnUni_psychology_f2_desc: Ivuriro rya psychologiya rikoresha siyanse ya psychologiya mugusuzuma, gusuzuma, no kuvura ubuzima bwo mumutwe. Imitekerereze idasanzwe isuzuma imiterere, ibitera, n'inzira z'imitekerereze mibi. Ihuza imyumvire yimbitse ya psychopathologie hamwe nibikorwa bishingiye ku bimenyetso nka CBT, DBT, hamwe na psycodynamic therapy.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp0: Gusobanura ibintu bidasanzwe: kutagira imibare mibare, gutandukana nu mibereho, kunanirwa gukora bihagije (Rosenhan), hamwe nubuzima bwiza bwo mumutwe (Jahoda). DSM-5 (APA) na ICD-11 (OMS) batanga ibipimo byo gusuzuma indwara zo mu mutwe - sisitemu y'ibyiciro ifite aho igarukira.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp1: Indwara ikomeye yo kwiheba: inyabutatu (Beck - ibitekerezo bibi byo kwikunda, isi, ejo hazaza), yize gutabarwa (Seligman), hypothesis ya monoamine (kugabanya serotonine na noradrenaline). Umuti: SSRIs (umurongo wa mbere wa farumasi yubuvuzi), CBT (kuvugurura ubwenge, kuvugurura imyitwarire), kuvura hamwe.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp2: Schizophrenia: ibimenyetso byiza (salusiyo, kwibeshya, imvugo idahwitse), ibimenyetso bibi (ingaruka mbi, alogiya, avolition). Hypothesis ya Dopamine (ibikorwa birenze urugero bya D2 yakira inzira ya mesolimbic). Antipsychotics: D2 antagonist. Irage ryerekanwe ~ 80% (MZ concordance 48%).
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp3: Ubuvuzi bwimyitwarire yubuvuzi (CBT): Aaron Beck - ibitekerezo byikora bidahwitse nibitekerezo bikomeza imvururu. Icyitegererezo cya ABC: Gukora ibyabaye → Imyizerere → Ingaruka. Ibikorwa: ibitekerezo byibitekerezo, ubushakashatsi bwimyitwarire, kwerekana no gukumira ibisubizo (ERP kuri OCD). Ibimenyetso bifatika: inkunga ikomeye ya RCT yo kwiheba, guhangayika, OCD, PTSD.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp4: Icyitegererezo cya biopsychosocial (Engel): ihungabana ryo mu mutwe rituruka ku binyabuzima (gen, chimie y'ubwonko), imitekerereze (kumenya, imiterere, amateka yo kwiga), hamwe n'imibereho (ihahamuka, ubukene, umubano, umuco). Sobanura impamvu nta buvuzi bumwe bukorera buri wese n'impamvu isuzuma ryuzuye ari ngombwa.
learnUni_psychology_f2_task: Umugore w'imyaka 28 yerekana umutima mubi, kugabanuka ibiro 6, kubyuka kare mu gitondo, kudashobora guhugukira, no kumva ko nta gaciro afite mumezi 3. Nta bimenyetso byo mu mutwe afite. (a) Tanga isuzuma ritandukanye ukoresheje DSM-5. (b) Sobanura ibimenyetso bye ukoresheje icyitegererezo cya Beck. (c) Vuga amasomo 4 yambere ya CBT nicyo wifuza kugeraho muri buri. (d) Ukoresheje urugero rwa biopsychosocial, menya ibinyabuzima bimwe, imitekerereze imwe, hamwe nimpamvu imwe yo kubungabunga imibereho.
learnUni_psychology_f3_desc: Imitekerereze ya psychologiya yiga inzira zo mumutwe - kwitondera, imyumvire, kwibuka, ururimi, gutekereza, no gukemura ibibazo - ukoresheje ikigereranyo cyo gutunganya amakuru. Ishingiye kuri psychologiya yuburezi (uburyo bwo kwigisha neza) hamwe nubuvuzi (kuki kwibuka bibeshya, uburyo kwitabwaho kunanirwa muri ADHD, uburyo gutekereza bitagenda neza mukwiheba).
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp0: Icyitegererezo cyo kwibuka: Atkinson-Shiffrin moderi yububiko bwinshi (sensory → STM → LTM binyuze muri repetition). Icyitegererezo cyo kwibuka (Baddeley & Hitch): loop fonologiya, igishushanyo mbonera cya visuospatial, episodic buffer, umuyobozi mukuru. Urwego rwo gutunganya (Craik & Lockhart): byimbitse, birambuye kodegisi → kugumana neza.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp1: Amakosa yo kwibuka: gushushanya umwihariko (Thomson & Tulving - ibimenyetso byo kugarura bigomba guhuza imiterere ya kodegisi). Ingaruka mbi (Loftus): amakuru yibyabaye nyuma yibintu bihindura kwibuka. Ubuhamya bwababyiboneye ntabwo bwizewe cyane - ibyiringiro ntibisobanura neza. Kwibuka ibinyoma birashobora guterwa.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp2: Icyitonderwa: kwitondera guhitamo (Cherry's cocktail party party, moderi ya attenuation ya Treisman). Gutandukana kugabanijwe: imikorere-ibiri ikora igarukira kumurongo umwe wo gutunganya kurwego rwo kwiyumvisha. Ubuhumyi butabishaka (Simons & Chabris - igeragezwa ry'ingagi). Kwitonda kuramba no kugabanuka kuba maso.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp3: Ururimi: Ikibonezamvugo cya Chomsky ku isi yose - igikoresho cyo kuvuka ururimi (LAD). Ibihe bikomeye hypothesis: ururimi rugomba kuboneka mbere yubugimbi kugirango ubone ubushobozi bwuzuye (Kwiga ikibazo cya Genie). Indimi zijyanye (Sapir-Whorf): ururimi rugira ingaruka kubitekerezo - verisiyo ikomeye yanze, verisiyo idashyigikiwe.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp4: Gukemura ibibazo no gutekereza: heuristique (kuboneka - birashoboka ko umucamanza bishoboka kuburyo ingero ziza mubitekerezo byoroshye; guhagararirwa - gucira urubanza bisa na prototype; inanga). Kwemeza kubogama (gushaka gushaka ibimenyetso byemeza). Ibice bibiri-byubaka (Kahneman): Sisitemu 1 (byihuse, byikora, heuristic) na sisitemu 2 (buhoro, nkana, isesengura).
learnUni_psychology_f3_task: Loftus & Palmer (1974) yerekanye ko inshinga yakoreshejwe mugihe ubajije ibyerekeye impanuka yimodoka ('yamenetse', 'gukubita', 'kugonga') byagize ingaruka kumuvuduko uteganijwe hanyuma nyuma yamakuru yerekana ibirahure bimenetse. (a) Sobanura ibisubizo ukoresheje igishushanyo mbonera n'ingaruka zitari zo. (b) Shushanya kwigana hamwe bibiri byanonosoye imbere yimbere. (c) Muganire ku ngaruka zabajijwe n'abapolisi n'ubuhamya bw'abatangabuhamya mu rukiko. (d) Suzuma agaciro k'ibidukikije ubushakashatsi bwa laboratoire.
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp0: Icyitegererezo cyo kwibuka hamwe na kodegisi
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp1: Amakosa yo kwibuka hamwe nubuhamya bwababyiboneye
learnUni_psychology_f4_desc: Imitekerereze ya biologiya isuzuma imyifatire, imisemburo, na genetike yimyitwarire nibikorwa. Ihuza imitekerereze ya psychologiya na neuroscience - isobanura uburyo ubwonko butanga ubwenge, uburyo imisemburo ikora imyifatire nimyitwarire, nuburyo ihinduka ryimiterere rigira ingaruka kumiterere nubuzima bwo mumutwe.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp0: Imisemburo n'imyitwarire: cortisol (igisubizo cyibibazo - HPA axis: hypothalamus → CRH → pituito → ACTH → adrenal cortex → cortisol). Guhangayika karande: kugabanya amajwi ya hippocampal (cortisol toxic to neurons), kubangamira kwibuka no gukora neza. Testosterone: igitero gihuza cyoroheje kandi gishingiye kumiterere.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp1: Irondakoko ryimyitwarire: heritability = igipimo cyo gutandukana bitewe nubwoko butandukanye. Kwiga impanga: MZ (bisa) na DZ (ubuvandimwe). Kwiga. Intelligence heritability ~ 50-80% (biterwa n'imiterere). Schizophrenia: h²≈80%, nta gene imwe - polygeneque, irondakoko ryinshi. GWAS igaragaza ibintu byinshi bisanzwe hamwe ningaruka nto.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp2: Ubwihindurize nimyitwarire: fitness ikubiyemo (Hamilton), guhitamo abavandimwe, altruism yo gusubiranamo (Trivers). Ubwihindurize psychologue: module yo kumenya isura, gutahura abashuka, guhitamo abo mwashakanye, gushaka ururimi. Kunegura: inkuru zijyanye no guhuza n'imihindagurikire y'ikirere akenshi zidashobora kwemerwa - zikeneye ibimenyetso by'iterambere.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp3: Ubushishozi: ikibazo gikomeye (Chalmers - kuki hariho uburambe bufatika na busa?) Nibibazo byoroshye (guhuza imyumvire nubwonko). Neural ihuriro ryimyumvire (NCC): inyigisho yumwanya wisi yose (Baars / Dehaene), inyigisho zamakuru (Tononi). Ubushakashatsi bwubwonko (Sperry): ibice bibiri birashobora kugira imyumvire yigenga.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp4: Gusinzira no kurota: ibyiciro byo gusinzira: Icyiciro cya NREM 1-3 (N1 urumuri → N3 gahoro gahoro, kugarura) na REM (kugenda mumaso byihuse - kurota, guhuriza hamwe kwibuka). Kubura ibitotsi: byangiza kwitabwaho, kwibuka, imikorere yumubiri, kumutima. Neuroscience yo kurota: Dortsolateral prefrontal cortex yahagaritswe (yagabanije gutekereza kunegura - isobanura kudasanzwe kurota).
learnUni_psychology_f4_task: Muganire ku miterere y'ibinyabuzima yo guhangayika. . (b) Ni izihe ngaruka ndende ziterwa n'imihangayiko idakira kuri hippocampus na sisitemu y'umubiri? (c) Sobanura igishushanyo mbonera cyo gutandukanya imisanzu ikomoka ku bidukikije no kubungabunga ibidukikije. (d) Suzuma ibisobanuro biologiya ya PTSD (ihungabana nyuma yo guhahamuka) n'ingaruka zayo.
learnUni_psychology_f4_tp2: Gusinzira, injyana ya biologiya, na PTSD
learnUni_sociology_f0_desc: Sociology isuzuma societe muri rusange - imiterere, ibigo, ubusumbane, nimbaraga. Abashakashatsi bashinze - Marx, Weber, na Durkheim - batanze inkuru zinyuranye zerekana uko sosiyete igezweho ikora. Ibitekerezo by'iki gihe byubaka kandi bivuguruza iyi mfatiro. Kumenya gusoma no kwandika ni ngombwa kugirango twumve ibimenyetso bya sociologie.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp0: Durkheim: societe nukuri kwi sui generis - irenze umubare wabantu. Imibereho (ibigo, amahame, indangagaciro) ibuza imyitwarire. Anomie: gusenyuka bisanzwe mubihinduka ryihuse ryabaturage → kongera gutandukana no kwiyahura. Ubufatanye bwa mashini (societe gakondo) nubufatanye bwimbaraga (bigezweho, byuzuzanya byihariye).
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp1: Marx: ubutunzi bwamateka - ishingiro ryumuryango (umubano wubukungu, imbaraga / umubano wumusaruro) bigira imiterere (amategeko, umuco, idini, politiki). Capitalism: burugumesitiri atunze uburyo bwo gukora; proletariat igurisha imbaraga zumurimo, zirakoreshwa (agaciro karenze), kandi uburambe bwo kwitandukanya. Ingengabitekerezo itangiza ubusumbane.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp2: Weber: ibikorwa byimibereho - gusobanukirwa nubusobanuro bwimyitwarire (Verstehen). Ubwoko butatu bwubutegetsi: gakondo, charismatique, gushyira mu gaciro-byemewe. Bureaucracy: ubwoko bwiza - urwego, amategeko, ubuhanga - byombi bikora neza kandi bitesha umuntu agaciro ('akazu k'icyuma'). Imyitwarire y'abaprotestanti n'umwuka wa capitalism: ibitekerezo birashobora gutera impinduka zifatika.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp3: Imikorere (Parsons, Merton): societe ni gahunda yo kwiyobora; ibigo byuzuza imirimo yo kubungabunga sisitemu. Kunegura: yirengagije amakimbirane, ubwumvikane burenze bushingiye kuri teleologiya. Ibitekerezo bivuguruzanya (Dahrendorf): amakimbirane ni ibisanzwe kandi ni isoko yimpinduka zabaturage, ntabwo ari patologiya.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp4: Igitekerezo cya none: Giddens (imiterere - imiterere ninzego birahuza), Bourdieu (umurwa mukuru: ubukungu, umuco, imibereho, ikigereranyo; imyitozo; umurima), Habermas (ibikorwa byitumanaho nibikorwa bifatika - isi ikoronijwe na sisitemu). Postmodernism (Baudrillard, Lyotard): inkuru zikomeye zarasenyutse; Ukuri ni kwigana.
learnUni_sociology_f0_task: Ukoresheje byibuze ibitekerezo bitatu, gusesengura impamvu ziterwa na sociologie zitera ubusumbane bwuburezi. Kuri buri cyerekezo: vuga ibyingenzi byingenzi, umenye uburyo butanga ubusumbane, vuga ubushakashatsi bumwe bufatika, kandi usuzume uruhare rwa politiki. Kurangiza usuzume icyerekezo gitanga ibisobanuro byuzuye.
learnUni_sociology_f1_desc: Inzego z'imibereho nuburyo bukomeza bwimibanire ninzego zigena imyitwarire ya buri muntu n'amahirwe y'ubuzima. Umuryango, uburezi, idini, ubukungu, itangazamakuru, na leta ninzego zikomeye. Abahanga mu by'imibereho y'abantu basuzuma uburyo izi nzego zigaragaza ubusumbane nuburyo zihinduka mugihe.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp0: Umuryango: ibitekerezo byabakozi (Murdock - isi yose, umuryango wa kirimbuzi ufite imirimo ine: igitsina, imyororokere, ubukungu, uburezi). Ibitekerezo bya Marxiste (Engels - umuryango werekana gahunda ya ba capitaliste na ba sokuruza). Kunegura abategarugori (Oakley - umurimo wo mu rugo udahembwa, kugabana uburinganire). Postmodern: gutandukanya imiterere yumuryango.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp1: Uburezi: ukora (Durkheim - ubufatanye nubuhanga; Davis / Moore - gutondeka meritocratique). Marxiste (Bowles & Gintis - integanyanyigisho zihishe zigaragaza umubano wibyiciro; ihame ryandikirana - indorerwamo yishuri aho bakorera). Imyororokere yumuco (Bourdieu - umurwa mukuru wumuco ugena intsinzi yuburezi).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp2: Iyobokamana: Durkheim - idini itesha agaciro indangagaciro rusange; ikora umurimo wuzuye. Marx - idini ni 'opium yabaturage' - ingengabitekerezo yemeza ubusumbane. Weber - idini rishobora kuba imbaraga zimpinduka zabaturage (Calvinism na capitalism). Isomo rya Secularisation: idini rigabanuka mubyingenzi muri societe zigezweho (zirahatana).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp3: Leta n'imbaraga: Ibitekerezo byinshi (amatsinda menshi aharanira inyungu). Igitekerezo cya Elite (Mills, Pareto) - imbaraga zibanze mu ntore nto. Igitekerezo cya Marxiste - leta ikorera inyungu z'abategetsi. Hegemony ya Gramscian - itsinda riri ku butegetsi rikomeza imbaraga binyuze mu bitekerezo, ntabwo ari agahato gusa.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp4: Itangazamakuru na societe: igitekerezo cyo gushyiraho gahunda (McCombs & Shaw - itangazamakuru rigena icyo abaturage batekereza, ntabwo ari icyo batekereza). Moderi y'urushinge rwa Hypodermic (itangazamakuru ryinjiza ubutumwa muburyo bworoshye) va gukoresha no gushimisha (abumva bahitamo itangazamakuru kubyo bakeneye). Itangazamakuru rya digitale: gushungura ibituba, algorithmic curation, amakuru atariyo.
learnUni_sociology_f1_task: Koresha uburyo bubiri butandukanye bwa sociologie (urugero: imikorere na Marxisme) kugirango usesengure gahunda yuburezi mugihugu cyawe. Kuri buri cyerekezo: sobanura uruhare rwuburezi muri societe, umenye inyungu ninde utishoboye, vuga ubushakashatsi bumwe bufatika, kandi utange ibitekerezo kuri politiki. Noneho suzuma icyerekezo gitanga konti ihagije y'ibyavuye mu burezi kubanyeshuri-bakozi.
learnUni_sociology_f2_desc: Ubusumbane mu mibereho - isaranganya ridasa ry'umutungo, amahirwe, n'imbaraga - nicyo kibazo nyamukuru cya sociologie. Icyiciro, igitsina, ubwoko / ubwoko, n'imyaka nibyo bipimo nyamukuru byo gutondeka. Gutandukana byerekana ko ibyo bipimo bihuza kandi bigakorana. Gusobanukirwa ubusumbane bisaba isesengura ryimiterere no kwitondera uburambe bwabayeho.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp0: Icyiciro rusange: Weber's multidimensional view (class + status + party). Igishushanyo mbonera cya Goldthorpe (NS-SEC): gishingiye ku mibanire y'akazi. Ubushakashatsi bukomeye bwabongereza (2013): ibyiciro birindwi birimo 'intore' na 'precariat'. Icyiciro kigira ingaruka ku buzima, uburezi, ubutabera mpanabyaha, no kugira uruhare muri politiki.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp1: Ubusumbane bushingiye ku gitsina: abakurambere - gutegeka abagabo mu nzego z’imibereho, ubukungu, na politiki. Ikinyuranyo cy’imishahara yuburinganire: abagore binjiza ~ 80% yumushahara wabagabo buri saha mubwongereza (2023). Igisenge cy'ikirahure (inzitizi zitagaragara ku nshingano zikomeye) hamwe n'ikirahure (abagore bashyirwaho mu buyobozi mu bihe bikomeye). Sociology yubugabo: Ubugabo bwa Connell bwa hegemonic.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp2: Ubwoko nubwoko: primordialism (indangamuntu yubwoko nkibisanzwe, ihamye) nubwubatsi (ubwoko / ubwoko nkuko byubatswe mubuzima - ubwoko butandukanye bwasobanuwe muburyo butandukanye mubihe bitandukanye). Ivanguramoko rishingiye ku nzego (Raporo ya Macpherson - Polisi ya Metropolitan): inzira y'ivangura yashyizwe mu mashyirahamwe, ntabwo ari urwikekwe ku giti cye.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp3: Gutandukana (Kimberlé Crenshaw): ibipimo byinshi biranga (icyiciro, igitsina, ubwoko, ubumuga, igitsina) bikorana byinshi, ntabwo byongeyeho. Uburambe bw'umugore w'umwirabura ntabwo ari 'ivanguramoko + ivangura rishingiye ku gitsina' - ihuriro ritera uburyo budasanzwe bw'ingaruka zonyine zidafata.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp4: Imyitwarire yimibereho: ibisekuruza (ibyiciro byabana ugereranije nababyeyi) hamwe no kubyara (inzira yumwuga). Ubwongereza bwimibereho: bifitanye isano cyane nicyiciro cyababyeyi / amafaranga yinjiza. Kugenda kwuzuye (societe-rugari hejuru yimbere) va kugendana ugereranije (umwanya mubisaranganya). Fungura na sisitemu zifunze sisitemu.
learnUni_sociology_f2_task: Ukoresheje guhuza nkurwego rwawe rwo gusesengura, gusesengura umwanya w’abagore b’abirabura bamugaye ku isoko ry’umurimo mu Bwongereza. Shushanya: ibimenyetso byerekana ingaruka za buri cyiciro ukwacyo, ibimenyetso byuburyo bikorana, konti imwe yerekana, hamwe ningaruka kuri politiki yo kurwanya ivangura. Kurangiza usuzume niba guhuza ari ingirakamaro mu gusesengura kuruta gusesengura umurongo umwe.
learnUni_sociology_f3_desc: Ubushakashatsi bwa sociologie bukoresha uburyo butandukanye kandi bufite ireme bwo gukora iperereza ku mibereho. Guhitamo uburyo byerekana inzitizi zifatika hamwe ninshingano zimbitse za epistemologiya - kubyerekeranye nubumenyi bwa sociologie yemewe. Guhindura ibintu - kumenya umushakashatsi kumenya umwanya wabo mubushakashatsi - ni ikintu cyihariye cya siyansi yimibereho myiza.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp0: Uburyo butandukanye: ubushakashatsi bwimbonezamubano (ibibazo byubatswe, ingero nini, uhagarariye, rusange), imibare yemewe (amakuru ya leta - ubugizi bwa nabi, kuvuka, amafaranga yinjiza - ariko agaragaza imikorere yo gufata amajwi, ntabwo ari 'ukuri kwimibereho'), isesengura ryibirimo (code ya sisitemu yinyandiko cyangwa itangazamakuru). Epistemologiya positivist: isi yimibereho irashobora kwigwa muburyo bwubumenyi.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp1: Uburyo bufite ireme: kubaza byimbitse (igice cyubatswe cyangwa kitubatswe - amakuru akize, ashingiye ku miterere), amatsinda yibanze (amatsinda yibikorwa, gukora ibisobanuro rusange), amoko (kwitegereza abitabiriye - abashakashatsi bibiza mumibereho, akenshi mumezi cyangwa imyaka). Epistemologiya isobanura: ibisobanuro byubatswe, ntabwo bipimwe.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp2: Icyitegererezo: ibishoboka (bidasubirwaho, bitondekanye, cluster - rusange) nibigamije (theoretical, snowball - byatoranijwe kubwimbitse kandi bifatika, ntabwo bihagarariwe). Ingano ntangarugero nuburebure: ingano ikenera nini n; ubuziranenge bugera ku kwiyuzuzamo.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp3: Kwizerwa (ibisubizo bimwe niba byongeye - imbaraga zubushakashatsi bwuzuye), agaciro (gupima ibyo isaba - imbaraga zujuje ubuziranenge). Kumenyesha amakuru, kutamenyekana, kurinda ibibi. Abashakashatsi bahindagurika: kwemeza uburyo umwirondoro w'umushakashatsi ugira ingaruka ku ikusanyamakuru no gusobanura.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp4: Uburyo buvanze: bukurikiranye (bufite ireme noneho bwuzuye, cyangwa ibinyuranye), bihujwe (byombi icyarimwe, ibisubizo byahujwe). Inyabutatu: ukoresheje uburyo bwinshi kugirango uhuze kumyanzuro imwe. Urugero: ubushakashatsi bwuzuye bugaragaza icyuho-cyo kugeraho; ibibazo byujuje ubuziranenge bisobanura uburyo.
learnUni_sociology_f3_task: Urashaka kwiga impamvu abanyeshuri-bakozi-bakozi badahagarariwe muri kaminuza zikomeye. Tegura uburyo buvanze-uburyo bwo kwiga: (a) icyiciro cyo kubara ukoresheje ubushakashatsi namakuru yemewe - vuga ikibazo cyubushakashatsi, icyitegererezo, ingamba, nisesengura. (b) Icyiciro cyujuje ubuziranenge ukoresheje ibiganiro - ingamba zo gutoranya, kuyobora ikiganiro (ibibazo 8), nuburyo bwo gusesengura. (c) Nigute uzahuza ibyiciro byombi? (d) Menya ibibazo bibiri byimyitwarire yihariye kubushakashatsi bwurubyiruko rutishoboye.
learnUni_history_f0_desc: Amateka ni ubushakashatsi bwukuntu amateka yanditse - inyigisho, uburyo, nibisobanuro abahanga mu by'amateka bakoresha. Irabaza: ubumenyi bwamateka bufite intego burashoboka? Nigute umwirondoro wamateka, icyerekezo, nigihe mugihe gihindura amateka bandika? Kumenya amateka yamateka ningirakamaro mugusuzuma ingingo zose zamateka.
learnUni_history_f0_kp0: Inkomoko yamateka: ibanze (yaremewe icyo gihe - inyandiko, ibihangano, ubuhamya bwo mu kanwa, amafoto), icyiciro cya kabiri (gusesengura inkomoko yibanze nabanyamateka), icyiciro cya gatatu (syntheses - ibitabo, encyclopaedias). Inkomoko yo kunegura: umwanditsi, itariki, abumva, intego, kubogama, kwemeza.
learnUni_history_f0_kp1: Amateka ya Rankean: amateka 'nkuko byari bimeze' (wie es eigentlich gewesen) - kugarura ibintu byashize binyuze mumasoko y'ibanze. Umwuga wo mu kinyejana cya 19 wabigize umwuga. Kunegura: ntibishoboka kuba intego yuzuye; Inkomoko ubwayo ni igice.
learnUni_history_f0_kp2: Ishuri rya Annales (Braudel, Bloch, Febvre): kuva mubyabaye n'abantu bakomeye ukajya mubikorwa birebire (longue durée - geografiya, ubukungu, imitekerereze). Amateka yose - guhuza ibintu byose byuburambe bwabantu. Birakomeye cyane mumateka yabantu.
learnUni_history_f0_kp3: Postmodernism hamwe n '' imvugo ihinduka ': Umweru (Metahistory) - inkuru zamateka zubatswe nkubwoko bwubuvanganzo (urwenya, ibyago, urukundo, urwenya) - abahanga mu by'amateka barubaka aho kuvumbura ibyahise. Derrida: gutunganya inyandiko. Ibisobanuro: relativism, byinshi byemewe 'amateka'.
learnUni_history_f0_kp4: Indangamuntu n'amateka: amateka ya nde? Amateka ya gikoloni yanditswe nabakoloni - ubushakashatsi bwimbitse (Spivak, Guha) bugarura ibitekerezo byabakoloni. Amateka y'abagore, amateka yabirabura, amateka yumurimo - byose byamaganaga inkuru gakondo 'umugabo ukomeye'. Inyigisho zo kwibuka: uburyo abaturage bibuka bakibagirwa ibyahise.
learnUni_history_f0_task: Gereranya uburyo butatu bwamateka (Rankean positivism, Annales, postmodernism) muburyo bwabo bwo gufata ibyabaye - Impinduramatwara y'Abafaransa. Kuri buri buryo: vuga uburyo bwibanze bwibanze, nibibazo bibaza, inkomoko / uburyo ikoresha, nicyo yanzura. Suzuma: ubumenyi bwamateka bufite intego burashoboka?
learnUni_history_f0_tp1: Amateka ya Rankean nishuri rya Annales
learnUni_history_f1_desc: Isi ya kera yatangije urufatiro rw’imico y’iburengerazuba na Aziya: polisi y’Abagereki, repubulika y’Abaroma n’ubwami, ingoma z’Abashinwa, ibihugu by’umujyi wa Mezopotamiya, n’ubwami bwa Misiri. Gusobanukirwa gahunda zabo za politiki, ubukungu, nibikorwa bagezeho mu muco byerekana inkomoko yinzego zikomeje muri iki gihe - amategeko, demokarasi, filozofiya, idini, n’umujyi.
learnUni_history_f1_kp0: Ubugereki bwa kera: polis (umujyi-leta) nkigice cya politiki shingiro. Demokarasi ya Atene (ikinyejana cya 5 MIC): inteko (ekklesia), inama (boule), inkiko z'amategeko. Sparta: oligarchy ya gisirikare. Intambara z'Abaperesi (490–479 MIC). Intambara ya Peloponnesian (431–404 BGC - Isesengura nyaryo rya Thucydides). Intsinzi ya Makedoniya n'isi y'Abagiriki.
learnUni_history_f1_kp1: Roma ya kera: Repubulika (509-27 BGC) - SPQR (Sena n'Abaroma), tribune, konseye, populares v. Julius Sezari, kugwa kwa Repubulika, Augustus n'Umuyobozi. Amategeko y'Abaroma, ubwubatsi (imiyoboro y'amazi, imihanda), n'ubuyobozi bw'intara. Kugabanuka no kugwa - Gibbon, Pirenne impaka.
learnUni_history_f1_kp2: Mezopotamiya na Egiputa: Ibihugu byo muri Sumeriya (kwandika, ziggurats, Code ya Ur-Nammu c.2100 MIC). Kode ya Hammurabi (c.1754 MIC) - amategeko 282, 'ijisho ryijisho'. Igihugu cya Misiri faraonike - ubwami bwimana, ubwubatsi bukomeye. Ubwami bushya (1550–1070 MIC) - Tutankhamun, Ramesses II.
learnUni_history_f1_kp3: Han Ubushinwa (206 MIC - 220 GC): bureaucracy yibanze (meritocracy Confucian meritocracy ikoresheje ibizamini bya leta), ubucuruzi bwa Silk Road, udushya (impapuro, compas, seisimografi). Gereranya n'Ingoma y'Abaroma - icyarimwe 'classique' imico itandukanye kuruhande rwubucuruzi.
learnUni_history_f1_kp4: Ubukungu bwa kera: ahanini ubuhinzi, hamwe nuburetwa bwibanze hagati yumusaruro wubugereki nu Baroma. Ubucuruzi burebure (Umuhanda wa Silk, Mediterane): ibicuruzwa byiza, ingano, ibyuma. Impaka: Igitekerezo cya 'primitivist' ya Finley (ubukungu bwa kera butandukanye cyane - nta cyerekezo cyo gukura) na Scheidel igereranya.
learnUni_history_f1_task: Gereranya na politiki ya Atenayi ya kera na Repubulika y'Abaroma. Kuri buri wese: gusobanura itegeko nshinga, kumenya abafite uburenganzira bwa politiki, gusobanura uburyo ubutegetsi bwagabanijwe no kugenzurwa, no gusuzuma uko 'demokarasi' cyangwa 'oligarchic' buri wese yari. Noneho usesengure impamvu amaherezo sisitemu zombi zahaye inzira ubutegetsi bwigenga - ibi bitubwira iki kubijyanye na demokarasi ikenewe?
learnUni_history_f2_desc: Igihe cyambere cya kijyambere cyahinduye isi: Renaissance yongeye guhindura ibihangano no kwiga, Ivugurura ryacitsemo ibice amadini yiyita aya gikristo, kwaguka kw’iburayi byafunguye ingoma z’isi n’ubucuruzi bw’abacakara, kandi Impinduramatwara y’ubumenyi yahinduye uburyo abantu bumva ibidukikije. Kumurikirwa byatanze ibitekerezo bya politiki - umudendezo, uburenganzira, impamvu - byateje impinduramatwara y'Abanyamerika n'Abafaransa.
learnUni_history_f2_kp0: Renaissance (14-17-c.): Kuvugurura imyigire ya kera, ubumuntu (Erasimusi, Ibindi - kwibanda ku bushobozi bwa muntu aho kuba ubutware bw'Imana), ubuhanzi bushya (Leonardo, Michelangelo, Raphael - icyerekezo, kamere), icapiro (Gutenberg c.1440 - amakuru yahinduwe akwirakwizwa).
learnUni_history_f2_kp1: Ivugurura (1517): Ibitekerezo 95 bya Luther - byamaganaga indulgensiya, ubutware bwa papa, no kunga abapadiri. Sola scriptura, sola fide. Intambara y'Abahinzi, Inama ya Trent, Intambara z'Iyobokamana (Igifaransa: 1562-98, Intambara y'Imyaka mirongo itatu: 1618-48 - Amahoro ya Westphalie 1648 principle ihame ry'ubusugire bwa leta).
learnUni_history_f2_kp2: Kwaguka kw’Uburayi n’Ubukoloni: Ubushakashatsi bw’Abanyaporutugali n’Abesipanyoli (1490s-1500s), Guhana kwa Kolombiya (ibihingwa, indwara, abantu baja mu bucakara), kwigarurira Amerika (Cortés, Pizarro - ibyago by’imiterere y’abasangwabutaka). Ubucuruzi bw'abacakara ba Transatlantike: miliyoni 12 z'Abanyafrika babaye imbata, miliyoni 2 bapfa kwambuka.
learnUni_history_f2_kp3: Impinduramatwara ya siyansi (16-17th c.): Copernicus (heliocentrism, 1543), Galileo (ubukanishi na telesikope), Kepler (amategeko y’imibumbe), Newton (Principia Mathematica 1687 - uburemere rusange, amategeko yimikorere). Uburyo bushya: igerageza, imibare, gushidikanya kubutegetsi bwa kera.
learnUni_history_f2_kp4: Kumurikirwa (18 c.): Impamvu, umudendezo, niterambere. Locke (uburenganzira karemano, guverinoma babyumvikanyeho), Voltaire (kwihanganira idini, kuvuga ijambo), Rousseau (ubushake rusange), Montesquieu (gutandukanya ubutegetsi). Impinduramatwara y'Abanyamerika (1776 - Locke yagize uruhare mu gutangaza ubwigenge), Impinduramatwara y'Ubufaransa (1789 - Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité).
learnUni_history_f2_task: Gisesengura ibitera Impinduramatwara y’Abafaransa yo mu 1789. Suzuma ikintu kimwe ubona ko gikomeye, kandi urengere igisubizo cyawe kubindi bisobanuro.
learnUni_history_f3_desc: Ikinyejana cya 20 na 21 cyazanye kurimbuka kutigeze kubaho (intambara ebyiri z'isi, itsembabwoko, intwaro za kirimbuzi) hamwe n'iterambere ridasanzwe (decolonisation, uburenganzira bwa muntu, impinduramatwara mu ikoranabuhanga). Gusobanukirwa iki gihe bisaba kwishora mumasoko y'ibanze, gusobanura guhatanira, hamwe numurage udakemuwe ugereranya ibihe byacu.
learnUni_history_f3_kp0: Intambara ya Mbere y'Isi Yose (1914-1918): itera impaka - impaka za Fischer (ibitero by’Abadage n’intambara bigamije) na Albertini (kubara nabi no kwishyiriraho ubumwe). Intambara yo mu mwobo, gusenya ikoranabuhanga (~ miliyoni 17 zapfuye). Amasezerano ya Versailles (1919): ingingo yicyaha cyintambara, indishyi - 'imbuto ya WWII'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp1: Totalitarism: Ubudage bw'Abanazi (Hitler - ingengabitekerezo y'amoko, Führerprinzip, itsembabwoko - Itsembabwoko, Abayahudi miliyoni 6; intambara zose hamwe na jenoside yakorewe Abayahudi nk'impaka zishingiye ku mateka n'impaka zishingiye ku mateka). Leta zunze ubumwe z'Abasoviyeti (Stalin - gukusanya, gulags, Iterabwoba rikomeye). Hannah Arendt 'Inkomoko ya Totalitarism'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp2: Decolonisation (1945-1975): ibikorwa byubwigenge muri Aziya, Afrika, na Karayibe. Ubwigenge n’Abahinde (1947 - urugomo, ~ miliyoni imwe yapfuye). Intambara yo muri Alijeriya (1954-62). Ikibazo cya Congo. Intambara y'ubutita: Amerika na SSSR byombi birwanya ubukoloni mu mvugo ariko bishyigikira abaterankunga. Ubukoloni bushya: ubwigenge bwa politiki nta bwigenge mu bukungu.
learnUni_history_f3_kp3: Intambara y'ubutita (1947-1991): guhangana n'ingengabitekerezo, ubukungu, na geopolitike hagati ya Amerika na SSSR. Inyigisho zirimo (Kennan), Intambara yo muri Koreya, Ikibazo cya Missile Cuba (1962 - hafi y’intambara ya kirimbuzi), Intambara ya Vietnam, Détente, isiganwa ry’intwaro za Reagan. Gusenyuka kwa SSSR (1991): Glasnost / perestroika ya Gorbachev, kugwa k'urukuta rwa Berlin (1989).
learnUni_history_f3_kp4: Isi ya nyuma ya 1991: ubumwe (Fukuyama 'Iherezo ry'Amateka' na Huntington 'Clash of Civilizations'), 9/11 n'intambara yo kurwanya iterabwoba, ikibazo cy'amafaranga yo mu 2008, Isoko ry'Abarabu, izamuka ry'Ubushinwa, icyorezo cya COVID-19, ikibazo cy'ikirere. Kuba isi ihinduka hamwe n’ibidahwitse - populism, ubusumbane, hamwe no kwamagana amahanga mpuzamahanga.
learnUni_history_f3_task: Suzuma ibitera Itsembatsemba. Inyandiko yawe igomba: (a) kwishora mu mpaka zishingiye ku bushake / imikorere y’amateka, (b) gusesengura imiterere yimiterere (antisemitism, imbaraga za leta, intambara) hamwe n’ikigo (uruhare rwa Hitler, SS, abarebera hafi), (c) gukoresha byibuze amasoko atatu y’ibanze cyangwa ayisumbuye, (d) gusuzuma niba Itsembabwoko ry’Abayahudi ryarabaye ikintu kidasanzwe cya none (Bauman's 'modernism and Holocaust').
learnUni_philosophy_f0_desc: Epistemologiya ni ishami rya filozofiya ijyanye n'ubumenyi - imiterere, inkomoko, urugero, n'imbibi. Kumenya ikintu bisobanura iki? Nigute dushobora gutandukanya ubumenyi no kwizera gusa? Nubuhe soko yubumenyi (impamvu, uburambe, ubuhamya)? Ibi bibazo bihuza no gushidikanya, siyanse, hamwe nibikorwa bya buri munsi byibyorezo.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp0: Isesengura gakondo ryubumenyi: umuntu S azi ko P iff (i) P ari ukuri, (ii) S yemera P, (iii) S ifite ishingiro mukwizera P. Konti yukuri yemewe (JTB). Gettier (1963): ingero zerekana JTB idahagije kubumenyi - ikibazo cya Gettier cyabyaye imyaka 60 yo gusubiza.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp1: Inkomoko yubumenyi: empirisism (Locke, Hume, Berkley) - ubumenyi bwose buva kuburambe; nta bitekerezo bivuka. Gushyira mu gaciro (Descartes, Leibniz, Kant) - ubumenyi bumwe na bumwe (mbere yuburambe), bushingiye kubitekerezo. Synthesis ya Kant: ibitekerezo bishyiraho ibyiciro (umwanya, umwanya, impamvu) kuburambe.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp2: Gushidikanya: Uburyo bwa Descartes bwo gushidikanya - Impaka mbi ya Demon - gusa 'cogito ergo sum' irokoka gushidikanya gukabije. Gushidikanya kwa Pyrrhoniya: guhagarika urubanza kubibazo byose bitagaragara. Muri iki gihe: Ubwonko bwa Putnam mu cyombo, Moore 'hano ni ikiganza' igisubizo gisanzwe, guhuza ibitekerezo.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp3: Ubumenyi bwa siyanse: Popper's falsificationism - siyanse itera imbere mubitekerezo bitinyutse no kugerageza kubeshya, ntabwo byatewe no kwinjiza. Ihinduka rya Kuhn rihinduka - siyanse isanzwe iyobowe na revolisiyo. Lakatos: gahunda zubushakashatsi (intoki ikomeye + umukandara urinda). Feyerabend: 'ikintu cyose kigenda' - anarchism epistemologiya.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp4: Imibereho ya epistemologiya nubuhamya: byinshi mubyo tuzi biva kubandi. Ubuhamya nisoko yibanze yubumenyi (anti-reductionism - Coady). Ariko ubutware bubogamye, gushungura ibintu byinshi, no kutumvikana kwinzobere bitera ibibazo byibyorezo. Akarengane k'ibyorezo (Fricker): akarengane k'ubuhamya (gutanga icyizere gike kubera urwikekwe), akarengane ka hermeneutical (kubura ibitekerezo byo kumva ibyakubayeho).
learnUni_philosophy_f0_task: Suzuma neza ibivugwa ko gushidikanya gukabije bidashobora kuvuguruzwa. Mu gisubizo cyawe: (a) vuga ibitekerezo bya Dekartes byo gushidikanya (kurota, umudayimoni mubi) hamwe nigisubizo cya cogito, (b) kwerekana imyumvire rusange ya Moore hamwe n’ibisubizo bya Wittgenstein 'On Cer sure', (c) gusobanura ibyorezo by’ibyorezo no gusuzuma niba bikuraho cyangwa birinda ikibazo, (d) gusuzuma niba guhakana gushidikanya bifite akamaro mubikorwa byubumenyi bwa buri munsi.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_desc: Imyitwarire isuzuma imiterere yimyitwarire nuburyo tugomba gukora. Inyigisho eshatu zingenzi zimyitwarire - inkurikizi, deontologiya, hamwe nimyitwarire myiza - itanga ibisubizo bitandukanye. Metaethics ibaza niba imvugo iboneye ari ukuri cyangwa ibinyoma, kandi niba aribyo, ni ubuhe buryo. Imyitwarire ikoreshwa ikoresha inyigisho kugirango ikemure ibibazo nyabyo mu buvuzi, politiki, n'ibidukikije.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp0: Utilitarianism (Bentham, Mill): igikorwa cyiza cyerekana umunezero rusange / akamaro (ibyiza byinshi kumubare munini). Kora utilitarianism (buri gikorwa cyaciwe ningaruka) va kugenga utilitarianism (kurikiza amategeko muri rusange aringirakamaro cyane). Inzitizi: ubutabera (gusarura ingingo), ubunyangamugayo, gusaba.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp1: Kontian deontologiya: agaciro keza kubitekerezo (inshingano, ntabwo ari ingaruka). Icyiciro Cyingenzi: (1) kora gusa kuri byinshi ushobora gushobora kwisi yose, (2) gufata abantu burigihe nkimpera muri bo, ntibigere gusa nkuburyo, (3) gukora nkumunyamuryango wubwami bwimpera. Inshingano zuzuye (urugero ntuzigere ubeshya) ninshingano zidatunganye (kuba umugiraneza mugihe bishoboka).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp2: Imyitwarire myiza (Aristote): wibande ku mico kuruta amategeko cyangwa ibisubizo. Imico myiza (ubutwari, ubutabera, kwitonda, ubwenge) ni imyifatire ihamye yo gukora neza, yungutse kubikorwa (eudaimoniya - gutera imbere kwabantu nkintego). Inyigisho yuburyo: ingeso nziza ziri hagati yikirenga no kubura.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp3: Metaethics: Imyifatire mbonezamubano (ibintu bifatika bifatika - Moore's non-naturism, Cornell realism), anti-realism (inyigisho yibeshya: Mackie - ibirego byose ni ibinyoma; Expressivism: Ayer, Blackburn - imyifatire yerekana imyitwarire; relativism: imyitwarire iratandukanye hagati yimico). Ikibazo-gikwiye (Hume): ntishobora gukuramo 'igikwiye' kuva 'ni'.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp4: Imyitwarire ikoreshwa: gukuramo inda (ubumuntu, ubwigenge bw'umubiri - gucuranga inanga ya Thomson), euthanasiya (ubwigenge n'ubuzima bwera, ahantu hanyerera), ubutabera ku isi (Umuhanzi - abantu bakize bategekwa gutanga ubukene ku isi; Rawls - ihame ry'ubutandukanye ku isi)
learnUni_philosophy_f1_task: Ikibazo cya trolley: trolley yahunze izahitana abantu 5 keretse iyo uyerekeje kumuhanda aho izica 1. (a) Niki muri buri nyigisho eshatu zingenzi zivuga ko ugomba gukora, kandi kuki? (b) Muburyo bwa 'footbridge', urashobora guhagarika trolley usunika umuntu munini kumuraro. Ibi bihindura igisubizo cyawe? Kuki cyangwa kuki? (c) Ni ubuhe buryo bufatika abantu benshi bahindura mu rubanza rwa mbere ariko atari ubwa kabiri butubwira kubyerekeye ishingiro rya psychologiya (aho gushyira mu gaciro)?
learnUni_philosophy_f2_desc: Filozofiya yo mu mutwe isuzuma imiterere yimitekerereze - ubwenge, ubushake, nubusabane bwubwenge-umubiri. Ikibazo gikomeye cyimitekerereze kibaza impamvu hariho uburambe bufatika. Imikorere, umubiri, hamwe na dualisme bitanga konti zirushanwa. Izi mpaka zifite aho zihurira n'ubwenge bwa gihanga na siyanse yo kumenya.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp0: Ikibazo cyubwenge-umubiri: ibintu bibiri (Descartes - ubwenge numubiri nibintu bitandukanye; ikibazo cyimikoranire), imitungo ibiri (imitungo yo mumutwe nibintu bitari umubiri byubwonko), umubiri / umubiri (imitekerereze irasa cyangwa igerwaho nubwonko bwumubiri). Gukuraho ubutunzi (Churchland) - imitekerereze ya rubanda ni ibinyoma; neuroscience izabisimbuza.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp1: Imikorere (Putnam, Fodor): imitekerereze isobanurwa ninshingano zabo zikorwa (kwinjiza-gusohora umubano), ntabwo ari substrate yumubiri. Ibintu byinshi bifatika: imitekerereze imwe irashobora kugerwaho na sisitemu zitandukanye (silicon kimwe na neuron). Inzitizi: Ned Block's inverted qualia, qualia idahari.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp2: Ubushishozi na qualia: qualia nibintu bifatika, ibintu byuburambe ('uko bimeze' kubona umutuku, kumva ububabare). Ikibazo gikomeye (Chalmers): na konte yuzuye yumubiri yubwonko ntabwo yasobanura impamvu hariho uburambe bufatika. Filozofiya zombie yatekereje igerageza: kuba umeze nkanjye ariko nta bwenge.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp3: Ubushake: 'ibyerekeye' imitekerereze - imyizerere n'ibyifuzo bijyanye nibintu. Brentano: nkana ni ikimenyetso cyibitekerezo. Icyumba cy'Ubushinwa cya Searle kirwanya AI ikomeye: mudasobwa ikoresha ibimenyetso ntabwo yunva - ibura nkana. Igisubizo cya Dennett: imyifatire nkana.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp4: Indangamuntu yawe: niki kigutera kuba umuntu umwe mugihe? Gukomeza imitekerereze (Locke - kwibuka; Parfit - guhuza imitekerereze no gukomeza, nta kintu cyimbitse kijyanye n'irangamuntu), gukomeza ibinyabuzima (ubwonko), indangamuntu (Ricoeur). Parfit 'igabanijwe duhagaze': imanza zicamo zerekana indangamuntu ntabwo aricyo cyingenzi - kubaho ni ngombwa.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_task: Sobanura ikibazo gikomeye cyimyumvire n'impamvu physiism irwana nayo. (a) Vuga ikibazo neza (Chalmers). . (c) Suzuma niba zombie filozofiya ishobora gutekerezwa nibikurikira niba aribyo. (d) Muganire ku ngaruka z'ikibazo gikomeye cyo kumenya ubwenge - AI irashobora kumenya mubyukuri?
learnUni_philosophy_f3_desc: Filozofiya ya politiki isuzuma ishingiro ry’inzego za politiki - ni iki cyerekana ubutware bwa Leta, ubutabera ni iki, imbaraga za politiki zigomba gutangwa gute? Kuva ku bafilozofe-bami ba Platon kugeza kuri Rawls yitwikiriye ubujiji no kwishyira ukizana kwa Nozick, izi nzego zitanga inkuru zitandukanye za guverinoma yemewe na sosiyete ikiranuka.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp0: Gutsindishiriza leta: umuco w'amasezerano mbonezamubano. Hobbes (Leviathan, 1651): udafite leta, ubuzima ni 'wenyine, umukene, mubi, ubugome, kandi bugufi'; abakozi bashyira mu gaciro basezerana kureka umudendezo karemano kubwumutekano. Locke: imiterere ya kamere ni amahoro; leta yashinzwe kurengera uburenganzira karemano (ubuzima, umudendezo, umutungo); guverinoma babyumvikanyeho, impinduramatwara ifite ishingiro niba ihohotera uburenganzira.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp1: Rousseau (Amasezerano mbonezamubano, 1762): ubushake rusange - icyo abaturage bazashaka ku nyungu rusange, butandukanye nubushake bwa bose (igiteranyo cyinyungu bwite). Ubutegetsi bwemewe busaba demokarasi yitabira. Gutandukana: gutunga umutungo bitera ubusumbane kandi byangiza ibyiza bisanzwe.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp2: Rawls (Theory of Justice, 1971): umwanya wambere + umwenda wubujiji - abakozi bashyira mu gaciro bahitamo amahame batazi imyanya yabo. Amahame abiri: (1) ubwisanzure bwibanze, (2) ihame ryo gutandukanya - ubusumbane bwemewe ari uko bungutse inyungu nkeya. Filozofiya ikomeye ya politiki yubuntu yo mu kinyejana cya 20.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp3: Nozick (Anarchy, Leta, na Utopiya, 1974): igisubizo cyigenga kuri Rawls. Inyigisho zemewe: kugabura gusa = kuboneka binyuze mu kwimura gusa cyangwa kugura umwimerere. Leta ntoya niyo yagutse cyane leta ifite ishingiro. Amahame yicyitegererezo yo kugabura (nka Rawls ') bisaba guhonyora uburenganzira bwa buri muntu.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp4: Ibibazo by'iki gihe: ubukomunisiti (MacIntyre, Sandel, Taylor) - kwishyira ukizana kwa buri muntu birengagiza itegeko nshinga ry'imibereho; abaturage, imigenzo, nibicuruzwa bisangiwe bifite akamaro. Feminism: Wollstonecraft, Beauvoir ('igitsina cya kabiri'), Okin - ibitekerezo byubuntu birengagiza imiterere yuburinganire bwurwego rwigenga. Postcolonialism: Fanon - Filozofiya ya politiki y’iburengerazuba yirengagije ihohoterwa rya gikoloni.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_task: Rawls na Nozick bagereranya bibiri bya filozofiya ya politiki ikomeye yo mu kinyejana cya 20. (a) Sobanura aho umwimerere wa Rawls uhagaze n'amahame abiri y'ubutabera. (b) Sobanura igitekerezo cya Nozick cyo gutanga uburenganzira hamwe na Wilt Chamberlain. (c) Menya ubwumvikane buke hagati yabo kubyerekeye imiterere yubutabera. (d) Ukoresheje urugero rufatika (urugero: kugabana umutungo ukoresheje imisoro), erekana uburyo buri mufilozofe yatekereza. Kurangiza n'umwanya wawe ufite ishingiro.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_desc: Metaphysics ikora iperereza kubintu byingenzi bifatika byukuri: ni iki kibaho, ni ibihe byiciro by'ibanze byo kubaho, hari ubushake bwo kwihitiramo ibibanogeye, igihe nikihe, hari ibintu bidafatika? Ontology ni ubushakashatsi bwo kumera gutya. Ibi nibibazo bidasobanutse cyane muri filozofiya, nyamara ibisubizo byabo bifite ingaruka kubumenyi, imyitwarire, nubuzima bwa buri munsi.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp0: Kubaho na ontologiya: Ibipimo bya Quine - kuba ni ukuba agaciro k'ibihinduka bihujwe. Ni ibihe byiciro bya ontologiya bihari? Byumwihariko (ibintu kugiti cye) nibisanzwe (imitungo, umubano - realism: isi yose ibaho yigenga; nominalism: gusa umwihariko urahari).
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp1: Ubushake bwo kwihitiramo ibibanogeye: kugena ibintu bikomeye (ibyabaye byose byagenwe biterwa → nta bushake bwo kwihitiramo ibibanogeye), guhuza ubumwe (uburenganzira bwo kwihitiramo ibihuye na determinism - ibikorwa byubuntu = bidahujwe nimpamvu zituruka hanze, kabone niyo byaba byaragenwe, ibitekerezo bya meshi ya Frankfurt), uburenganzira bwubwigenge (kubitera abakozi, indeterminism). Ikibazo cya Neuroscience: Ubushakashatsi bwa Libet bwerekana ibikorwa byubwonko bibanziriza ubushake.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp2: Imiterere yigihe: A-urukurikirane (rwakaye - rwahise, urw'ubu, urw'ejo hazaza) na B-urukurikirane (rudafite ishingiro - mbere / nyuma / icyarimwe). Presentism (gusa ibyubu birahari), ubuziraherezo / bine-bine (ibyahise, ibya none, nibizaza ni ukuri - 'guhagarika isanzure'). Kugereranya icyarimwe ibibazo bigezweho.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp3: Uburyo bushoboka hamwe nisi ishoboka: ibisobanuro byisi byisi (Lewis) - imvugo yuburyo bwakozwe nukuri nibishobora kubaho mwisi ishoboka. Realism modal realism: isi yose ishoboka irahari. Actualism: isi nyayo irahari; isi ishoboka ni abstract (Plantinga). Byakoreshejwe mu gusesengura ibinyuranye, ibikenewe, na essence.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp4: Impamvu: Ubusanzwe Humean (causation = guhuza buri gihe - ntaho bihuriye). Isesengura rinyuranye (Lewis): C yateje E iff mwisi yegeranye ishoboka aho C itabaho, E ntibibaho. Interventionist theory (Woodward): C itera E niba gutabara kuri C byahindura E. Imbaraga zibitera (Armstrong, Inyoni): imyifatire ni ontologiya yibanze.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_task: Ubwisanzure burashobora guhuzwa na determinism? Andika inyandiko yubuhanga: Intego yo gusobanura neza filozofiya muri rusange.
